A transcript reveals that Fox News edited a 2024 Trump interview to
remove references to Jeffrey Epstein. Should Paramount be required to
pay another $10 million to the president?

unvaccinated QAnon members at a Wendy's in Toms River.
### **Cliff 's Note: The MAGA Brain Trust Doesn't Know Who to Root For in the Putin v Trump Shooting War**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/82091e14-d233-4664-9a11-37707a29787c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So Trump says he's gonna _**help** Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky?_ Did I get this correct, or am I going through a Karoline-Leavitt moment here?
The guy who got impeached the first time for _blackmailing_ Zelensky? Berated him in the Oval Office like a junkyard dog with untreated gonorrhea--is suddenly borrowing an outfit from Kristi Noem's vast dress-up closet to perform pretend-Ukraine ally?
Are we f*king kidding here? Am I the next Pope? (Well, they do like American Popes at this point in history. Not sure about the whole *Jewish thing,* though). Well in any case, welcome to the _Inception_ of MAGA foreign policy, where nobody knows WTF is going on and we all slightly suspect we've been unwittingly roofied.
So this guy, [the tubby golf-cheater with a hard-on for strongmen](https://substack.com/redirect/27970140-8945-4705-84fa-dbbf4f5eb96f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the one who spent _years_ praising Vladimir Putin like he watched his shirtless horsey rides in slow-mo, is turning on him? The guy he bowed to at the Bowling Green Massacre in Helsinki?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d509e7b0-e8d4-4295-af96-2a9cdd54e9d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And Trump started speaking out against Putin in the weeks following [Putin's beginning to publicly air his frustrations with the nincompoop](https://substack.com/redirect/8d015040-658e-4939-8383-5cb479bd6505?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The one who Putin helped install in the White House, along with his rent-a-wife, to deliver him Ukraine. Except he can't deliver him Ukraine _._
Didn't Putin see what happened with Trump Taj Mahal, Trump University and Eric? Did that give him confidence Trump could accomplish...anything?
Well, it seems there's now some breaking up to do, [as I predicted two weeks ago](https://substack.com/redirect/8d015040-658e-4939-8383-5cb479bd6505?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while [corporate-media thumbs twiddled](https://substack.com/redirect/635ed3f0-040f-4c40-ac37-d45a82da3b15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And, ya know, breaking up is hard to do, as Neil Sedaka crooned. So this is gonna be one fun custody battle over all the grift!
To get back to our story, Putin's been needling Trump for weeks now--criticizing him over Iran, Syria, NATO, Ukraine -- because, let's face it, Putin was pretty confident he _owned_ Trump. _And he did_. Until now.
Now Trump's out here pretending he's _pro-[Zelensky](https://substack.com/redirect/d9e83b30-5f74-4aa8-b0da-9203b9875b54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), _and with Trump, you just need to ask the simple questions: It's either *[how's he making money off this](https://substack.com/redirect/7ea55ca5-48ab-4e9b-a8d2-b4ed78268b52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)* or *who convinced him this will fix his Hades-level polling numbers* or *has the narcissistic injury of Putin ripping him a new one the last month finally led to Trump's Waterloo, with respect to his love affair with the St. Petersburg pirate?*
These are questions inquiring minds want to know. But it's definitely one of those, and here are _some things we absolutely do know_.
Charlie Kirk? Glenn Beck? Jack Posobiec? Elon Musk? Megyn Kelly? Even disgraced General Michael Flynn--Trump's Q-adjacent, NSA in his first term for like two Scaramucci's? They're ALL attacking Trump. Candace Owens? Laura Ingraham? Alex Jones? Laura Loomer? Yup. (Side note: What an excellent cast for a "Con Air" reboot).
Lemme say that again: **they 're all** **a** _**ttacking Trump!**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1bea8e6b-e1d5-46a6-b089-f8d1efbb9f4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While still vociferously and vivaciously waving their little Kremlin flags. These are the same geniuses who've spent years downplaying Russia's war crimes, their cyberwarfare against a U.S. election and luridly lying that Ukraine attacked Russia.
They've pushed every single talking point this side of the Moskva River--when not embarking on a fun shopping trip at the супермаркет, like Tucker Carlson, and accidentally delivering us some quality parody straight out of "The Americans."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5cef0989-ccb8-4309-aa72-78912a98c912?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
These are _Putinites_ who suddenly can't decide whether they're America First, Trump First, or Moscow First. They just so very confused.
But one thing's clear: a movement that once goose-stepped in lockstep behind Trump was already splintering into various factions over his budget bill, bombing Iran, tariffs and who has to deliver Don Jr.'s magic 8-ball. And now Putin just lit a fuse.
After pouring a gallon of kerosene all over the area. With some borscht, for the F of it.
So what do we call this? A civil war of traitors? A lovers' quarrel between despots and their once-favorite hand puppets? Or just another truculent Tuesday in the [cruel, anti-social-disordered, MAGA cinematic universe](https://substack.com/redirect/8e4ccd16-ba6d-4863-bb89-358342c26915?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?
Who knows, and who really cares. Because while Trump and Putin slap-fight over who has a bigger nuke, with Ukraine embarrassing Russia daily and Trump's Epstein implosion, the rest of us are watching the walls close in on both of them.
Which, if you're counting, would be the first wall Trump ever actually built.
If [the world can benefit from the fascist division](https://substack.com/redirect/cd069300-b2c1-41cd-9d6f-767382b5b835?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and find a way to depose both Putin and Trump? [That is America's reincarnation](https://substack.com/redirect/23c42080-ce89-402d-a595-11f7d593dacb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And a world I can 100% get behind.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d15c20ad-e605-486a-9b64-683009a26d08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
__ There is no strict Constitutional amendment against having sex with
minors, being blackmailed about it, murdering the person who is
blackmailing you, and altering the videotape of the murder. So
it's hard to see why some on the left are so upset with Trump.

by Jonathan Turley
### _**... Yo, Check This Out!**_
#### **Trump 's Epstein Flip-Flops: From "I'll Release Them" to "Shut Up or Get Lost"**
* **" I'm gonna release them!"**
- For months, Trump rode the conspiracy wave, promising to drop the entire Epstein file--including that rumored "client list"--as a centerpiece of his MAGA mystique. Then... radio silence.
* **" They don't exist!"**
- In a 180° pivot, the DOJ and FBI leaked a memo: no hidden client list, no evidence Epstein was murdered. Trump's camp has since embraced this denial, insisting the whole thing was overblown.
* **" It was written by Obama/Biden/Comey!"**
- Trump retreated into full-blown conspiracy mode--blaming "Comey and Obama and Biden" for cooking up the documents, as if they had a shared, undying grudge against him .
* **" It's a 'hoax', a 'scam', 'boring' -- and only for 'bad people'."**
- He's called the Epstein saga "biased" and "boring," dismissing anyone curious as "pretty bad people." On Truth Social: "Jeffrey Epstein Hoax... hook, line and sinker... weaklings".
* **" If you care about this, I don't want your support!"**
- In a vindictive rebuke, Trump openly yelled at his base: if they're still mouthing conspiracies, "I don't want their support anymore." He even called them "weaklings" and claimed they were "doing the Democrats' work".
* **Latest twist - meltdown over "supporters"**
- Just today, he erupted on Truth Social, labeling loyalists who won't drop the Epstein files as past supporters, saying they've "bought into this bulls‐t" and he wants no part of them.

So it's hard to see why some on the left are so upset with Trump. by Jonathan Turley ... Yo, Check This Out! Trump 's Epstein Flip-Flops: From "I'll Release Them" to "Shut Up or Get Lost" " I'm gonna release them!" - For months, Trump rode the conspiracy wave, promising to drop the entire Epstein file--including that rumored "client list"--as a centerpiece of his MAGA mystique. Then... radio silence. " They don't exist!" - In a 180° pivot, the DOJ and FBI leaked a memo: no hidden client list, no evidence Epstein was murdered. Trump's camp has since embraced this denial, insisting the whole thing was overblown. " It was written by Obama/Biden/Comey!" - Trump retreated into full-blown conspiracy mode--blaming "Comey and Obama and Biden" for cooking up the documents, as if they had a shared, undying grudge against him . " It's a 'hoax', a 'scam', 'boring' -- and only for 'bad people'." - He's called the Epstein saga "biased" and "boring," dismissing anyone curious as "pretty bad people." On Truth Social: "Jeffrey Epstein Hoax... hook, line and sinker... weaklings". " If you care about this, I don't want your support!" - In a vindictive rebuke, Trump openly yelled at his base: if they're still mouthing conspiracies, "I don't want their support anymore." He even called them "weaklings" and claimed they were "doing the Democrats' work". Latest twist - meltdown over "supporters" - Just today, he erupted on Truth Social, labeling loyalists who won't drop the Epstein files as past supporters, saying they've "bought into this bulls‐t" and he wants no part of them. VIDEO ON DEMAND! `Independent Media For.26/day!` We 're only 23 paid subs from 1000! Let's reach it tonight and amplify our work!! Benefits we 've created for those who upgrade to paid: Substack AMA each week w/ Cliff & David Shuster, video posted for paid subs Insider stories in semi-regular columns/videos, live shout-outs to paid members, pics from trips like my recent one to Italy, lottery for free merch & periodic celebrity shout-outs Ability to comment on all content and send us DMs (we are setting this set up) Support our Soundcheck Fund --create an ecosystem of independent media to save democracy You're currently a free subscriber to . clean_body: | ~ Peter, I was just checking Actblue to review our fundraising numbers from last month, and I was stunned. $22.43. That was our average donation in June. It’s indisputable proof: Since Day One, our movement has truly been people-powered, people-centric, and proud of it. Remember when nobody thought my progressive campaign could win in DeSantis’s Florida? Thanks to generous people like you giving just $22.43, we’ve been able to defy the odds and build a real youth-powered movement whose influence stretches across Florida. So, I hate asking for money, but the stakes are too high for me not to reach out. I know that our movement has real momentum, and if we can hit every fundraising goal – we can flip Florida blue. But it doesn't happen if I can’t count on you, Peter. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Thank you, Maxwell Frost | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. subject: When President Obama and Attorney General Holder founded this movement

body:
Make a donation to power our democracy-saving work for the long-haul
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111611545/557802603/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNDJjZjBmLWExNjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K6-xN9o1q9hzThJan1ws3QYQzV-NhAySaRccjdJ6BJY=&emci=e995f61e-c360-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3f42cf0f-a162-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)

Peter, Eight years ago, Attorney General Eric Holder and President Barack Obama founded the National Democratic Redistricting Committee (NDRC) after Republicans seized control of the redistricting process to create an artificial political advantage and gerrymander their way to power. This was just days before Donald Trump was inaugurated in 2017. MAGA Republicans were manipulating voting districts, blocking common-sense gun control measures, failing to curb the impact of climate change, and disenfranchising voters, especially Democrats and people of color. **[The NDRC was launched to be a centralized hub to stave off their attacks and fight for fair maps. And that’s exactly what we’ve done every day since.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111611546/557802604/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Reintroduction_email_20250716-NDRC-Tier1-Reintroduction_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250716-NDRC-Tier1-Reintroduction_&utm_campaign=Reintroduction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNDJjZjBmLWExNjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K6-xN9o1q9hzThJan1ws3QYQzV-NhAySaRccjdJ6BJY=)** Fighting to defeat the SAVE Act — one of the most dangerous threats to voting rights we’ve seen in a generation. Working year-round to stop partisan and racial gerrymandering in state legislatures. Electing pro-democracy legislators, state supreme court judges, and other state officials across the country. **This movement has been fighting for what we believe in every step of the way.** As we approach a decade since our inception, our mission has never been more urgent. A second Trump administration and Republican-led Congress means our democracy is facing threats like never before. From trying to steal a state supreme court seat in North Carolina to attempting to tamper with the 2030 Census to undercount the LGBTQ+ community, Native communities, and people of color — the GOP is doing whatever it takes to undermine fair representation and fair elections in America. The good news is, our movement was created for this moment, and we have the power to shape a future of fair maps and fair representation. But the hard work of protecting our freedoms requires all of us chipping in whatever we can, whenever we can. **[Will you make a donation to power our democracy-saving work for the long-haul? We need your support to make sure we can keep up fighting back against right-wing assaults on our rights at every turn.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111611547/557802605/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Reintroduction_email_20250716-NDRC-Tier1-Reintroduction_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250716-NDRC-Tier1-Reintroduction_&utm_campaign=Reintroduction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNDJjZjBmLWExNjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K6-xN9o1q9hzThJan1ws3QYQzV-NhAySaRccjdJ6BJY=)**
We’re so grateful to have you as part of this movement. The National Democratic Redistricting Committee | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111611548/557802606/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Reintroduction_email_20250716-NDRC-Tier1-Reintroduction_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250716-NDRC-Tier1-Reintroduction_&utm_campaign=Reintroduction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNDJjZjBmLWExNjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K6-xN9o1q9hzThJan1ws3QYQzV-NhAySaRccjdJ6BJY=)

[MAKE A DONATION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111611550/557802608/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Reintroduction_email_20250716-NDRC-Tier1-Reintroduction_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250716-NDRC-Tier1-Reintroduction_&utm_campaign=Reintroduction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNDJjZjBmLWExNjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K6-xN9o1q9hzThJan1ws3QYQzV-NhAySaRccjdJ6BJY=)
If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. [Privacy Policy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111611551/557802609/1234366096?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNDJjZjBmLWExNjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K6-xN9o1q9hzThJan1ws3QYQzV-NhAySaRccjdJ6BJY=&emci=e995f61e-c360-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3f42cf0f-a162-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)

We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. **[Click here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111611552/557802610/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Reintroduction_email_20250716-NDRC-Tier1-Reintroduction_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250716-NDRC-Tier1-Reintroduction_&utm_campaign=Reintroduction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNDJjZjBmLWExNjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K6-xN9o1q9hzThJan1ws3QYQzV-NhAySaRccjdJ6BJY=)** to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression.

body:

| _Folks, we’re disgusted:_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/epstein-list/?source=VPP_20250716_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=20653%2E878179%2EADOViM) [**The American people deserve to know the TRUTH. name: Mark Harris
subject: IT'S TIME TO PUT OUR STUDENTS FIRST! – Stop the NEA’s Overreach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Harris for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/markharrisforcongress.com/its-time-to-put-our-students-first-stop-the-neas-overreach?e=4024c5123e)
---
| | [ ](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=e0d5dd3dcf&e=4024c5123e)
---
| **Dear Friend,** **I’m proud to lead the charge in introducing the National Education Association Charter Repeal Act in the House of Representatives.** This critical legislation aims to revoke the federal charter of the National Education Association (NEA), the nation’s largest teachers union, which has strayed from its mission to support teachers and students, becoming a partisan advocacy group instead.
---
| [FOX NEWS: Rep. Mark Harris to introduce bill to repeal largest teachers union's federal charter](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=b3eb6cef80&e=4024c5123e "FOX NEWS: Rep. Mark Harris to introduce bill to repeal largest teachers union's federal charter")
---
| **The NEA has ABANDONED its mission to serve teachers and students, morphing into a radical political machine that’s poisoning our kids’ classrooms with divisive agendas.The NEA’s betrayal is blatant. They’re pushing extremist ideologies and targeting political foes instead of focusing on reading, writing, and math.**

Their 1906 charter to “elevate the profession of teaching”? They’ve TRASHED it. It’s time to END Congress’s seal of approval for this out-of-control union!

But the NEA’s woke allies are gearing up to fight dirty. They’ve got deep pockets and deeper influence, and they’ll stop at nothing to protect their power. **That’s why I need YOU to join this battle RIGHT NOW. Your support will ignite a grassroots FIRESTORM, amplify our message, and make Congress feel the heat.**
* _Donate $25, $50, or $100 to fuel our campaign to pass the National Education Association Charter Repeal Act._
* _Your gift will fund grassroots outreach, advocacy, and efforts to rally support for this historic reform._
* _Together, we can put students first and hold the NEA accountable._

I know firsthand the importance of quality education. Let’s stand together to ensure our classrooms prioritize students over politics. Your support today will make a difference for America’s future.
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=90b0ef9d69&e=4024c5123e "DONATE NOW!")
---
| _Thank you for standing with us._

Sincerely,

Mark Harris
---
| | | | | | | [](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=70086346ee&e=4024c5123e)

That’s a massive shift from Republicans losing this office by 10 points last election._** _The reason:_**_John James joined the race._****_ _** John James knows what it means to serve. As a combat pilot, he defended our nation. As a businessman, he created jobs and opportunity. And as a father, he’s fighting for a stronger future for every Michigan family. name: Abigail
subject: I want you to hear this from me personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
How much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send.

Hi Peter, it's Abigail. Our first deadline of the new fundraising quarter is tonight, and I wanted you to hear this from me personally:
_Tonight's deadline is one of the biggest of our campaign so far._
And yes, how much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. _It's about the message we send._
We have momentum on our side right now. But that could change once our fundraising numbers become public.
If they're strong, the press and my opponent will see the grassroots strength of our campaign. If we fall short, it sends a signal to Winsome Earle-Sears and national Republicans that they can win and bring Trump's agenda to our Commonwealth.
**That's why I feel the responsibility not just to win, but to win big.**
[__**So, I'm asking one last time: Will you contribute your first $25 before our mid-month deadline at midnight to become one of my Founding Donors?**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111612581/557827211/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-16_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGRiMzQ5NzctYTc2Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7-OP2iBFFU6af5BwpmgKgukTmvGm5mUyU0-jK1DMdMM=)

clean_body: How much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send. Hi Peter, it's Abigail. Our first deadline of the new fundraising quarter is tonight, and I wanted you to hear this from me personally: Tonight's deadline is one of the biggest of our campaign so far. And yes, how much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send. We have momentum on our side right now. But that could change once our fundraising numbers become public. If they're strong, the press and my opponent will see the grassroots strength of our campaign. If we fall short, it sends a signal to Winsome Earle-Sears and national Republicans that they can win and bring Trump's agenda to our Commonwealth. That's why I feel the responsibility not just to win, but to win big. = = Thank you, Abigail By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: MAGA Meltdown?
subject: They knew. They let it happen.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend,
The MAGA machine isn’t just corrupt, it’s complicit .
Donald Trump’s team released a memo about Jeffrey Epstein, and now the fallout is exposing the MAGA loyalists who stood by, nodded along, and helped cover tracks for years .
And who was front and center, cheering them on?
Ashley Moody . Florida’s own “law and order” Senator who has never hesitated to punish the powerless while giving a free pass to predators, grifters, and billionaires in suits.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387059666369695471696C5333302B574D486D515238705646547249712F7A585456595942777A58547A6C776B4A43686145435747732F716B4F616775534D70/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-16%20at%209.24.40%E2%80%AFPM.png]
While families struggled, she handed loyalty to Trump like it was a campaign button.
While survivors spoke out, she stayed silent .
While corruption bloomed, she made excuses .
Let me be absolutely clear:
There is no “loyalty test” between Trump and MAGA, they’re one and the same.
And if we don’t beat them at the ballot box, they’ll keep doing this again. And again. And again.
I'm not just running against Ashley Moody. I'm running against every system that made this rot possible.
If you’re with me, rush a donation right now. Let’s take our government back from the enablers :
[DONATE HERE] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Time and time again they have bent the rules, twisted morality, and ignored the people. Let’s bring justice to D.C.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]

Peter — Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files. As did his Attorney General and his FBI Director. But last week, they announced that they would not be releasing any of the Epstein files because nothing of relevance is included. **Hmmm... I wonder if that about-face had anything to do with Trump’s close relationship with Epstein?** But he’s already changed his tune. Instead of asserting that there is nothing relevant in the Epstein files, he’s claiming that the files are a “hoax” created by the Biden administration (even though Trump was President in 2019 when Epstein was charged and subsequently killed himself). Democrats and Republicans are united about at least one thing: The American people deserve transparency about the Epstein files. So today, I went straight to the belly of the beast — **I joined Truth Social.** I posted my first “Truth” calling on Donald Trump, Kash Patel, and Pam Bondi to testify and finally release the Epstein files. No more games. No more secrets. _Just the honest truth._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111613063/557844126/-97912667?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250716_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGUxNzI1Yy1hZTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3iz1ww8riCnGlItZ-KEAhULnpSkAUGKMZmEpky_RY4M=&emci=9f2bbc21-a962-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c4e1725c-ae62-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13556823) Trump is up to his old tricks, laying the foundation to claim that if (when?) evidence of his involvement in Epstein’s despicable child sex trafficking ring comes to light, he will just call it “fake news.” **But we can’t let him get away with it. We know it’s coming, so we must be prepared.** Now all we need is for Bondi to release the files. **[I am demanding answers, and I need you with me. name: Matthew Frohlich, WAGOP Executive Director
subject: Election Integrity Efforts Heat Up as Signature Gathering Begins for Proof of Citizenship Initiative (IL26-126).
body:
Election Integrity Efforts Heat Up as Signature Gathering Begins for Proof of Citizenship Initiative (IL26-126). | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/please-support-wagops-election-integrity-efforts-2699348?e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| | **Election Reform Efforts Heat Up as
Signature Gathering on Proof of Citizenship Initiative (IL26-126) Begins **
**Bellevue** —"We are challenged in WA state with one of the least secure voting systems in the country," Washington State Republican Party (WAGOP) Chairman Jim Walsh told Steve Stern, host of the Stern America Podcast, recently.

Chairman Walsh, the author and sponsor of IL26-126 to require proof of citizenship to vote, joined a panel of guests, including MyPillow CEO Mike Lindell and others on Monday to highlight election reform efforts across the country ahead of the 2026 Midterm Elections.

"The polling on reform efforts is strongly bi-partisan,” said Chairman Walsh during the [two-hour-long podcast](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5cf81b5c74&e=6a281f566d). “It's a matter of cleaning up our processes so people trust our elections more."

Chairman Walsh’s appearance on the Stern American Podcast comes after a big win for election reform last week as a judge in Thurston County ruled in favor of the proof of citizenship initiative that was being challenged in court by a left-wing pro-open borders group.

The favorable ruling means signature gathering on the narrowly focused IL26-126 can begin.

In the meantime, please consider supporting our election integrity efforts. Fixing what’s broken in Olympia begins with securing our elections. We cannot do it alone. Best,

Matthew Frohlich

clean_body: Election Integrity Efforts Heat Up as Signature Gathering Begins for Proof of Citizenship Initiative (IL26-126). | | | | | | | Election Reform Efforts Heat Up as Signature Gathering on Proof of Citizenship Initiative (IL26-126) Begins Bellevue —"We are challenged in WA state with one of the least secure voting systems in the country," Washington State Republican Party (WAGOP) Chairman Jim Walsh told Steve Stern, host of the Stern America Podcast, recently. Chairman Walsh, the author and sponsor of IL26-126 to require proof of citizenship to vote, joined a panel of guests, including MyPillow CEO Mike Lindell and others on Monday to highlight election reform efforts across the country ahead of the 2026 Midterm Elections. "The polling on reform efforts is strongly bi-partisan,” said Chairman Walsh during the . “It's a matter of cleaning up our processes so people trust our elections more." Chairman Walsh’s appearance on the Stern American Podcast comes after a big win for election reform last week as a judge in Thurston County ruled in favor of the proof of citizenship initiative that was being challenged in court by a left-wing pro-open borders group. The favorable ruling means signature gathering on the narrowly focused IL26-126 can begin. In the meantime, please consider supporting our election integrity efforts. Fixing what’s broken in Olympia begins with securing our elections. We cannot do it alone. . Thank you. Best, Matthew Frohlich WAGOP Executive Director | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved. body:
We need to have an honest conversation about who we allow into our country. Let me introduce you to Zohran Mamdani

|

| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3u4b5tg7lj0fsgacq9o71llm2auaqfp4hlgjc88_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctim0o34c5h2bs)
Friend,

We need to have an honest conversation about who we allow into our country.

**Let me introduce you to Zohran Mamdani: The socialist candidate for mayor of New York City.**
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo1fnmc6lhgr4umkm0nk3d9h5o86t3psa8i55rc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctim0o34c5h2bs)
It took this guy approximately ZERO days to confirm our worst suspicions.

Mamdani, a self-declared socialist, wants to “globalize the intifada” and import values into the West that will destabilize our civilization.

_Everything about him runs counter to America First_.

**The fact that he could win in arguably America's greatest city proves that, while we won Congress and the White House, the fight for the heart, soul, and future of America still rages on.**

Turning Point PAC is working harder than ever to [BUILD THE RED WALL](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2t73a8e32bu5pp4l2nb70fd8ro9ivl6n5rli55g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctim0o34c5h2bs).

We must ensure that radical socialists like Mamdani do NOT gain power in cities, counties, and states across the country.

Help us [put America First](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7v7uutbmd4em5pqsqilpedg2ce9qjppckbu2v60_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctim0o34c5h2bs) and [stop the spread of socialism in America](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ooeberlbllbabrh3ik65goqol1dhgtcc9e6n9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctim0o34c5h2bs) by donating today.

**Friend, the future of Trump’s agenda will be decided on the streets of Los Angeles, Chicago, and New York.**

While I frequently run into those who think that conservatives should just throw up their hands and leave New York to its fate, it's a mistake.

New York symbolizes America to the world.

It’s the nerve center for the entire global economy. It has America's most famous sports teams, museums, buildings, and more. It is the global capital of finance, media, and the arts.

America simply giving up on New York is like the British Empire giving up on London or the Roman Empire giving up on Rome.

**And of course, that's exactly why Marxists like Mamdani want to conquer it.**

If we won't fight for one of our nation's crown jewels, then we deserve to lose it.

Turning Point PAC is taking back critical swing states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire from radical socialists like Mamdani.

But we can’t do it without you, Friend.

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. # **[Vance casts tiebreaking vote to advance DOGE cuts after Republicans defy Trump](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Vice President JD Vance had to cast another tiebreaking vote in the Senate to advance President Donald Trump's agenda.The Senate narrowly advanced the DOGE cuts package in a 51-50 vote late Tuesday night. Republican Sens. Lisa Murkowski of Alaska, Susan Collins of Maine, and Mitch McConnell of Kentucky voted to block the DOGE cuts, prompting Vance to cast his tiebreaking vote. # Trump’s Reset Can Give Birth To
# America’s Greatest Era Yet
# A 90-Year cycle may end soon, creating real wealth for early adopters
In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate. Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard earned wealth at the stroke of FDR’s pen. Now, 92 years later, [President Trump has focused his energy on making things right.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlqr8e5pokd2o5v0ev6550aem816kbpmslm3g08g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctimcor2chh2bs) His next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people. A provision buried in the U.S. Code Title 31, Section 5117 allows the U.S. Treasury to revalue America’s gold reserves from an outdated $42 per ounce to today’s market price. That’s a 72x increase!
---
If activated, it could
* **Reinforce America’s financial dominance**
* Reignite trust in value-backed money, making the dollar valuable again
* **Spark a modern day gold rush once the public understand their choices**

---
And the best part... Over 60 Million Americans are eligible to become a first wave benefactor in Trump’s Gold Reset. However, only those who download a copy of our 2025 Wealth Protection Guide will know the simple steps needed to take part in this historic wealth reset. name: Troy Downing
subject: From combat rescue to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
My back’s against the wall again, but I’m not backing down. I just need your help.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTIwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcxN19UTS1GSi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NzAzNDMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MTdfVE0tRkouMTEwMTE3X3QxNjcwMzQzLTI4OTkifQ/brNYPAtjAzaqZnqq79aVfQ)Peter, this is USAF/ANG combat veteran Troy Downing.
When I served in Afghanistan with a Combat Search and Rescue squadron, I learned something I’ll never forget: **You never back down, even when your back's against the wall.**
I fought for America then. And I’m fighting for her now.
_But the battle has only gotten tougher._
Democrats have marked Montana as a top target. They’re pouring **MILLIONS** into our state, desperate to take back the House majority.
I’ve built the plan to fight back, from the airwaves to the ground game.
_TV. Radio. Digital. Door-to-door. It’s all ready to go._
**But I need the firepower to deploy it. That’s where YOU come in.**
If we raise enough tonight, we can start the counteroffensive tomorrow. If we wait, we risk losing momentum, and the Left will seize the opportunity to CRUSH the GOP.
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTIwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcxN19UTS1GSi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NzAzNDMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MTdfVE0tRkouMTEwMTE3X3QxNjcwMzQzLTI4OTkifQ/XPCHFSM_pvYdYkmqz_yS2w)[Can I count on you to help me win this battle?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTIwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcxN19UTS1GSi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NzAzNDMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MTdfVE0tRkouMTEwMTE3X3QxNjcwMzQzLTI4OTkifQ/r5P70FiAfwINB9BmQDuhUA)[ENDORSE TROY & CHIP IN NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTIwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcxN19UTS1GSi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NzAzNDMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MTdfVE0tRkouMTEwMTE3X3QxNjcwMzQzLTI4OTkifQ/_U7uRlc4n4XWtdvJRj1GFA)I would be forever grateful if you chipped in anything you can.
Thank you, Peter,
**Troy Downing** Combat Veteran in Congress
|
* * *
JULY END-OF-MONTH DEADLINE COUNTDOWNThe July end-of-month deadline is bearing down on me, and this may be our final shot to get back on track. I'm not looking for a handout or a huge donation. A small donation from every Patriot will keep my campaign in the air. Will you stand with me and chip in a few bucks to help a combat vet take down the Democrat war machine? [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[Rush your gift to my campaign to defend this critical House seat.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[RUSH IMMEDIATE SUPPORT

| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pzaiov-OWTYGXkaBUDED0A~~/AARclBA~/XhNF0yT5dVNCYQ8UbgoRLBXvPA6nBb7flD9g0ThRBlIEPrqDXiPPcnsW3hgr9GoDMHm6I0H_dxy_NLu1JrP6YG1mNZs6Q21cZ2FPxteWRS4wlX3IAU7FQR4m939-4TS6xELWxZtwVVdkmOnNjyHH9GGqRCtFmjJc7-tJEEguCRFyIrTVxnU3XHGp_EdniVMjlilERuUTcSTl5KPpxELS3orRVkOUvUcjNhPMHbkrmxNbuAUBJEpzIvQ2yFUp7myEfKRX25_1n_wzS-hBEBHCOVvAuKAua5zmQp8AGhY1xYPIQes1lc71YTzzuaAeCf5qzwfzDTnPwJeUK0-RbV1GYuScdkz78AwdyFdVe_B5lLA~)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.

body:
A powerful 7.3 magnitude earthquake struck near Sand Point, Alaska, on Wednesday, [prompting tsunami warnings](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL_yoyAQx58GOx3YgGhBcQ1drr3S2ciiXFBygnF8-xszeYNftc1-_33-3Ic7hhjW6TcuZIpPw0pHjlQKbUPJ-4pLOHBbwzqNacQxRcz7NAAHVXNdCz04DPEcZOWMJwK6VWSEVqBl2_a6mg08uKKHR-lQoQPC0betU1qMrutUp6pgLjeuhRacS9k3HLlHr2h0ohceOyY5uVDS1vxNYS0z-XimN23NmJYqmrmUV2a3XwwsA3scR7NnLMnheT0wsLmk7WRgr2XXwRLSysBesQws1wysaBlYwq3M_3Z8Uo0R8xPrL4H6i4CB7RTIrhc3_pFVm3GvI8QYcquZ5NOCIX56lR_BfBv4HwAA__8CzYfL) along roughly 700 miles of the state's southern coast.

# Thursday, July 17, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1955, Disneyland opened after a year of construction and a $17 million investment. ABC aired the grand opening live with _Dateline Disneyland_ , hosted by Art Linkletter, Ronald Reagan, and Bob Cummings. [See photos of the grand opening here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1yqzAQhZ9GdDArWSBTqLgNnW-bktlIC95ESIwkm_HbZ0iKPEDK3fnOz5y323xDDhzX_7iRrUuaIx0lUK2U51oeETc-MEeOq0sOXQpYHuusQPUtmFaa2SOH16wbbxciRZeGrDS9MnoYRtPc7QAX1_eOpMSeFhjdAO5qNBK8j1pL07A93cBIIwG0HjtAWHDpyXk5ygWvQgN5ril3H4ljvdMSXulJuXNpa4K917oXcfkn1CTUdBxH56nwelb2XCK9Tk6oacf8WYSafp4Bo28zlZSrUNOazzPtdKraX0KoqcnW7weHwGUwQsO6IYfv6PqnvZ5WfQUAAP__YZeBww). Yesterday, we asked if you've ever found yourself the only one who could help. Plenty of you responded, with one reader recalling a frigid day on a remote lake, when two strangers capsized their canoe in 40-degree water. Alone and nearby, he acted fast, rescuing both men from the brink of hypothermia. We admire your acts of bravery! Today, we report on a new study suggesting your brain might be better at [picking up unspoken emotions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D9vwyAUBPBPgzdHgPljDwxdvKVrR-sFnu1XYYiAJMq3r9ype_ef7nT3dV2uQJHS9gkHurbmJeGrRmwNy9LqI8FBLyiJ0uazB58j1Me2SC51z20v7BKA4ntRXXArosShQyesllYZM9ludzejb0bYYKfBTADBjjqoYPUAQaAeVUfuTONWWMG5UtOFA19h1eiDmMQKI1McA7VcLt-ZUttxje_8xHLx-eii21u7VzZ8MDkzOSd8lFw9YfJ4TjkRk_OtAKUejzu0_d3_Rb2clBmZnLviwv1FMVI1lim-HUDxt6P965inkz8BAAD__8_heI4) than you think. Have you ever walked into a room and just _knew_ what someone was feeling, whether they said it or not? Let us know by replying to this email. Stay hydrated and stay sharp this summer with today's sponsor, [LMNT](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7Fu6yAUgOGnsbdYgMGQgeEu2XLXjugYDs5pMUSYBOXtq1R9g-6_Pun_uLorUKK8_YcdbYvFZexHwtawunY8MuzUoWbKmy8efElwPDYnmFAnpk9cuwCUXk6OwUZEgfOIlmsltFyWsx5vdoZ1MUZjXIWJGqSelVfGrIah4qsQI9m3xjTXnDEpzxMDFiEq9IGfeQQzSIaBWqnTZ6HcbhjTqzyxTr7sY7K31u7HMP8bxGUQl977FCrlr7Tn9i4Gcfntx2rDvVNKdCx6kGzbgdIP0v50_rTiOwAA___02W39), offering a free sample of their electrolyte hydration drink mixes in today's edition.
|
---
## Tsunami Warning Follows Alaska Quake
A powerful 7.3 magnitude earthquake struck near Sand Point, Alaska, on Wednesday, [prompting tsunami warnings](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL_yoyAQx58GOx3YgGhBcQ1drr3S2ciiXFBygnF8-xszeYNftc1-_33-3Ic7hhjW6TcuZIpPw0pHjlQKbUPJ-4pLOHBbwzqNacQxRcz7NAAHVXNdCz04DPEcZOWMJwK6VWSEVqBl2_a6mg08uKKHR-lQoQPC0betU1qMrutUp6pgLjeuhRacS9k3HLlHr2h0ohceOyY5uVDS1vxNYS0z-XimN23NmJYqmrmUV2a3XwwsA3scR7NnLMnheT0wsLmk7WRgr2XXwRLSysBesQws1wysaBlYwq3M_3Z8Uo0R8xPrL4H6i4CB7RTIrhc3_pFVm3GvI8QYcquZ5NOCIX56lR_BfBv4HwAA__8CzYfL) along roughly 700 miles of the state’s southern coast. The [U.S. Tsunami Warning Center advised](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj0FuhCAUQE8DuzGAKLpg0Y276bZL8sWP_gZhooxkbt-06Q3mAO_lva-7uwNFSusn7GhLyC5hPSOWgocr5zPBThWORGn12YPPEc7n6pRQ3U2YmzRuAYovp_liA6LClqOVplNG9_1o-GblLPpg5lHpII2W4-BxCChMC60aVDdzsr82YaSRQmg9NgJEgNChX-QoAwxMC1yo5KP5zpTKhiG-8oVH4_POo91KeZys_WBqYmqqtTb_3c2aL6YmftjlUSlGOnvDtFh3oPjHlreGL6t-AgAA___CO2n6) residents in coastal communities, including Kodiak and King Cove, to evacuate to higher ground. The quake hit around 12:30 p.m. local time and was felt across the Aleutian Islands. Officials in the Pacific Northwest said there is no current threat to the Lower 48. Monitoring continues as emergency crews assess damage and potential aftershocks.
## Trump Weighs Firing Fed Chair, Then Backs Off
President Trump told GOP lawmakers Tuesday night he was considering firing Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, citing frustration over interest rates and the cost of the Fed’s headquarters renovation. However, he [said Wednesday that it is “highly unlikely”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpDAQBNCvMVmPbAPTQ0BwCdleeiHqsxvoXWMj2yyavz9xv7BxqZ5K9edj_iAJEtfftPNYlzRHvkrgWjnPtZyRdrkoR4mrS45cClTOdbba9qARDM6eJLznrvHjwmy5bXg02Fvsns8Bm230BtExYtsO5tWTR_LOvrAfPLbkBt3IeGsaDRqtu254aNILLT07bwaz0Et1mr3UlB-fSWLdeAnv9M354dLehHGr9Siq_aXspOwU30cq9Y6UnW5Y2UmjspN5Kjv9PYtELkXZ6chcxHOsUPO5H1BT8FDTAWs6INC10xfnAhvDJSFAkC8Ob1gkMyzswW0kGT45p53hSBeHACWd2fGNN3n0x92T8kTV6XUnCf_31h-d_D3afwEAAP__efaS6g) unless serious misconduct, such as fraud, is proven. [Markets reacted swiftly](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSnCAURp9Gu-sA6qIFRRq7P21K5wYuShbBwN11fPvM5hX-_ptvzjm_vtYvDDGk7SceZNjnNdFVIzFTWbm-Eh7hwpJC2my2aHPE-tpWJdQIQoPUq8MQ73VonfFEivqWjNSj0sPjMet2N1rNch4np733Dzn1Qrm-x36afltpx162wXzehJZaCjEMcydQePQjWSdn6XFqBkEucC7dnxwS7-Tjnd9UOpuPNpqd-axN_6NRS6MWHxImS92Ne86fRaOWj1Kjlhje1KilcrZPOLA8iYGzwxtcvqCeMAoBCavDv0DJwR62nQqgZyrA5XWcFc58UYzAGJ9QTyzPCu8ckUMk4IIupA2UEOMwqUF2Ox-xLcadV4gx1IduBrEdGOJ_dP5W77dR_wIAAP__UvGW_A): the dollar fell and U.S. Treasury yields rose before stabilizing after Trump’s remarks, while stock indexes recovered from early losses by midday. Legal experts note that Powell is protected by law and can only be removed for cause. However, some House Republicans, including members of the Freedom Caucus, have urged Trump to act, accusing Powell of mismanaging monetary policy and [wastefully spending on the Fed’s $2.5 billion headquarters](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGu2yAURL8G74iAkBAvvEhVWeriddNF1ZV1AxfnPmFAgMPL31fuL3Q30mhGR-f3x_IBFCiuP2HDqfm0ROw1YGtYllb3CBt1KJHiapMFmwLUfV2UUBcuDJdmcUDhvejBTR5R4XnASZqLMvp6Hc3wnDQ-zAhaSxgfHpy_CSWVdfamjDSXBw40HW_CSCOF0Ho8CRAe_AWtk6P0cGNaoKOWyukzUWxP9OGdXlhONm1DmJ6t5crOd6Zmpube-2mr8eiYmjHyvTI15xSokT3iekzjhrExNXt0HL9yAIqVU6t8wxV4wZhe0ChFnkv6RNs4VN7KvmWeC9a6F6w8p44hMDVD4fe7_PE1_insPCdLjp2_fzucYq-_sOShTC53CoHq1TAt1g0o_KNv_6X8Nam_AQAA___Mx5na) project.
## Brains Pick Up Feelings We Miss
A new study found that people’s [brains can sense what someone’s really feeling](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D9vwyAUBPBPgzdHgPljDwxdvKVrR-sFnu1XYYiAJMq3r9ype_ef7nT3dV2uQJHS9gkHurbmJeGrRmwNy9LqI8FBLyiJ0uazB58j1Me2SC51z20v7BKA4ntRXXArosShQyesllYZM9ludzejb0bYYKfBTADBjjqoYPUAQaAeVUfuTONWWMG5UtOFA19h1eiDmMQKI1McA7VcLt-ZUttxje_8xHLx-eii21u7VzZ8MDkzOSd8lFw9YfJ4TjkRk_OtAKUejzu0_d3_Rb2clBmZnLviwv1FMVI1lim-HUDxt6P965inkz8BAAD__8_heI4), even when their guesses are off. Using brain scans, researchers spotted two patterns: one showing what the speaker meant to express, the other showing what the listener thought they felt. Even when those didn’t match, the brain still quietly picked up the speaker’s true emotions. The closer those patterns lined up, the better folks were at reading the room, offering a fresh look at how empathy works behind the scenes. [Watch a video explaining this](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uszAYRq_GbEH-xfHgIZ-ifB2aduyIXsxrcGRwCgYrd1_RW-j6PNI50vm6t3cIMczDB0xos0_tjGWNmDMubV63GaZQYJnDPLjkwKUI6za0nHJ1ovrEdNtDiK9WVr31iBxFhZZpxbVsGqOr0TpNdWe6zkujFApnmALfmbPy545T4apgDxrVTDNKpTQ1BerBK3Q9M8zDmUiKfchpqR8pzHlEH19px6V2aaqiHXN-rkRcCL8Rfiul1K-05a3D4z8WyG4k4rYTcb3A8vl4e9__fw-ENzA9ifiXibgyulaL7Z8lxBjWRhNJhwlC_FXkP3XZLf8JAAD__7-zdpY).

clean_body: A powerful 7.3 magnitude earthquake struck near Sand Point, Alaska, on Wednesday, along roughly 700 miles of the state's southern coast. | | | | | | Thursday, July 17, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1955, Disneyland opened after a year of construction and a $17 million investment. ABC aired the grand opening live with Dateline Disneyland , hosted by Art Linkletter, Ronald Reagan, and Bob Cummings. . Yesterday, we asked if you've ever found yourself the only one who could help. Plenty of you responded, with one reader recalling a frigid day on a remote lake, when two strangers capsized their canoe in 40-degree water. Alone and nearby, he acted fast, rescuing both men from the brink of hypothermia. We admire your acts of bravery! Today, we report on a new study suggesting your brain might be better at than you think. Have you ever walked into a room and just knew what someone was feeling, whether they said it or not? Let us know by replying to this email. Stay hydrated and stay sharp this summer with today's sponsor, , offering a free sample of their electrolyte hydration drink mixes in today's edition. | Tsunami Warning Follows Alaska Quake A powerful 7.3 magnitude earthquake struck near Sand Point, Alaska, on Wednesday, along roughly 700 miles of the state’s southern coast. The residents in coastal communities, including Kodiak and King Cove, to evacuate to higher ground. The quake hit around 12:30 p.m. local time and was felt across the Aleutian Islands. Officials in the Pacific Northwest said there is no current threat to the Lower 48. Monitoring continues as emergency crews assess damage and potential aftershocks. Trump Weighs Firing Fed Chair, Then Backs Off President Trump told GOP lawmakers Tuesday night he was considering firing Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, citing frustration over interest rates and the cost of the Fed’s headquarters renovation. However, he unless serious misconduct, such as fraud, is proven. : the dollar fell and U.S. Treasury yields rose before stabilizing after Trump’s remarks, while stock indexes recovered from early losses by midday. Legal experts note that Powell is protected by law and can only be removed for cause. However, some House Republicans, including members of the Freedom Caucus, have urged Trump to act, accusing Powell of mismanaging monetary policy and project. Brains Pick Up Feelings We Miss A new study found that people’s , even when their guesses are off. Using brain scans, researchers spotted two patterns: one showing what the speaker meant to express, the other showing what the listener thought they felt. Even when those didn’t match, the brain still quietly picked up the speaker’s true emotions. The closer those patterns lined up, the better folks were at reading the room, offering a fresh look at how empathy works behind the scenes. . subject: At the end of my wits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
#
[https://secure.winred.com/zinke-for-congress/fight-back/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250702_WAMA1.117704_t1663696-2081&ex_tid=20250702_WAMA1.117704_t1663696-2081]

I thought my last message would've worked, but I guess not.

I thought more people would step up to help a Navy SEAL, but I guess
not.

And at this point, I'm at the end of my wits, friend.
[https://secure.winred.com/zinke-for-congress/fight-back/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250702_WAMA1.117704_t1663696-2081&ex_tid=20250702_WAMA1.117704_t1663696-2081]

If I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, Democrats will see
this as a major pickup opportunity and start flooding cash into my
race.

This is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of
the Interior and was Ground Forces Commander for SEAL Team 6.

In 2022 and 2024, I led the team of Navy SEALs running for Congress,
and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm the
toughest Republican in Washington, D.C.

So, I'm going to be blunt with you. If the Left can get their foot in
the door this early, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have
a chance.

But you have my word; as a former Navy SEAL and SEAL Team 6 Commander,
if you help me out today, I can promise you that we will ruin the
Left's plan to destroy our nation.
[https://secure.winred.com/zinke-for-congress/fight-back/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250702_WAMA1.117704_t1663696-2081&ex_tid=20250702_WAMA1.117704_t1663696-2081]

name: Craig Riedel for State Senate
subject: Riedel Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Craig Riedel
body:
| | | | |
---
Riedel Campaign Update | July 17, 2025
---
Craig Riedel Announces Impressive Quarter 2 Fundraising Haul
---
|
---
Upon the close of the 2nd quarter, the Riedel Campaign prepared a press release for a campaign fundraising update. The campaign was able to raise more than $250,000 dollars in Q2 alone, all without any self-funding. Craig is extremely grateful for the outpouring of support for his candidacy from all across the 1st District. In Craig's personal statement, he said the following:
"As a state representative, I worked hard to be present in our communities and accessible to my constituents; I will put in the same effort each day as the next Senator for this district. I am grateful to all those who have invested their hard-earned money in our campaign."

---
|
---
Craig Riedel Hosts Meet-and-Greets in Several Counties Throughout the District
Over the last month, Craig has hosted meet-and-greets with constituents in Logan, Van Wert, and Hancock counties to lay out his vision for the 1st Senate District. These meet-and-greets have given voters the chance to speak with Craig personally and ask questions about the issues that are important to them.

---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Craig & Danette Attend Event with VP JD Vance
Craig and Danette were excited to support Vice President JD Vance at an event hosted by the Ohio Republican Party. The Vice President spoke on all of the Trump Administration's accomplishments so far and why he's grateful to be from Ohio.
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Craig & Danette Participate in Parades Across the District
With summer parades and festivals in full swing, Craig and Danette continue to be active in communities all across the district. Both Craig and Danette have already enjoyed walking in parades and attending festivals in Williams, Putnam, Hancock, Hardin, and Fulton counties.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
# Craig Attends County Fairs in District 1

With county fair season picking up, Craig and Danette are making every fair a priority. Over the last month Craig has enjoyed spending time at the Paulding, Putnam, and Logan county fairs. Craig is looking forward to making it to all 10 county fairs in the 1st District throughout the summer.
---
| |
---

---
| |
---

---
| |
---

---
| |
---
| Craig Attends Events Supporting Vivek Ramaswamy for Governor
Over the past month, Craig has attended several events in support of Vivek Ramaswamy's candidacy for Governor of Ohio. Craig and Vivek share a similar vision for the state, as well as many of the same conservative principles. Like Vivek, Craig believes that Ohio's and America's best days still lie ahead.
---
| |
---
| |
---

clean_body: | | | | | Riedel Campaign Update | July 17, 2025 Craig Riedel Announces Impressive Quarter 2 Fundraising Haul | Upon the close of the 2nd quarter, the Riedel Campaign prepared a press release for a campaign fundraising update. The campaign was able to raise more than $250,000 dollars in Q2 alone, all without any self-funding. Craig is extremely grateful for the outpouring of support for his candidacy from all across the 1st District. In Craig's personal statement, he said the following: "As a state representative, I worked hard to be present in our communities and accessible to my constituents; I will put in the same effort each day as the next Senator for this district. I am grateful to all those who have invested their hard-earned money in our campaign." | Craig Riedel Hosts Meet-and-Greets in Several Counties Throughout the District Over the last month, Craig has hosted meet-and-greets with constituents in Logan, Van Wert, and Hancock counties to lay out his vision for the 1st Senate District. These meet-and-greets have given voters the chance to speak with Craig personally and ask questions about the issues that are important to them. | | | | | | | | | | Craig & Danette Attend Event with VP JD Vance Craig and Danette were excited to support Vice President JD Vance at an event hosted by the Ohio Republican Party. The Vice President spoke on all of the Trump Administration's accomplishments so far and why he's grateful to be from Ohio. | | | | | | Craig & Danette Participate in Parades Across the District With summer parades and festivals in full swing, Craig and Danette continue to be active in communities all across the district. Both Craig and Danette have already enjoyed walking in parades and attending festivals in Williams, Putnam, Hancock, Hardin, and Fulton counties. | | | | | | | | | Craig Attends County Fairs in District 1 With county fair season picking up, Craig and Danette are making every fair a priority. Over the last month Craig has enjoyed spending time at the Paulding, Putnam, and Logan county fairs. Craig is looking forward to making it to all 10 county fairs in the 1st District throughout the summer. | | | | | | | | | Craig Attends Events Supporting Vivek Ramaswamy for Governor Over the past month, Craig has attended several events in support of Vivek Ramaswamy's candidacy for Governor of Ohio. Craig and Vivek share a similar vision for the state, as well as many of the same conservative principles. Like Vivek, Craig believes that Ohio's and America's best days still lie ahead. | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Craig Riedel | | == | | == | == == | | | | Paid for by Friends of Craig Riedel | 1246 Hilton Head Ct. | Defiance, OH 43512 US | | | | | | |

subject: New Execution Date, No. 1 City for Renters, and Pet Found After 8 Years
body:
A new execution date of Oct. 16 was set for death row inmate Robert Roberson, 58, during a court hearing in Anderson County on Wednesday.

# Thursday, July 17, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1835, an assembly of colonists gathered at William Millican’s gin house in Jackson County to discuss their grievances against the Mexican government of Antonio López de Santa Anna. The [Lavaca-Navidad Meeting](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQAF9jOpBtDIbCRRq6S5sS7bELrGLsE2zg7vfR5QvpppqR5us23oAjp-UTNgrynPOY6DoiidD-RnrS9COcE4JQymZiec15tNo2pfal8SMCx9foCgx3jb0pKBjfWN9oo-tiDdB1uu-buXVt1yL2syOiHmvt-8k1FgoOb5n2xhujjdOV0dY1XVc7O9cWO6OcJmTJeyUrCT3hmOMrn7RXU96KGFaRx6HqD2UHZYfruio5VsgpcqIq74uywwoJ7zl_KztQkp3pUHaIcMIEZYKTEbDciITTUuwBHxfHyEfrldPLBhz_SvK_P2ewvwEAAP__cG16iw) was a prelude to a convention the following year that drafted the Texas Declaration of Independence. If your last cookout was [more expensive](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-urCAQxp8GOwyDeHELitvY7W1vaVAGJQfFwOzqvv0J5xVON8nk-_P7_j-npw0xHOs_u6Oh26fpwKtEJMJcT7xxeVFIh7OER4Il0MenSQrZc6E56MnZED-TapyZhXtAgwZ0L3UvQHTNZrzAXuNDqwGE0ggzdE4r6xXOTqt-aIKpZkKDBhCgRAtCqn4YOiV9J90ATAl0gVJuaUPC2xYfP-mNuV3S3kSzEZ2FdX-ZHJkcr-tqfborRf0zOfqUHHc5HF9MjmcOC_Ly2nfMfM0hVnheyJ4RecbdhqPwjEvKjm9h3fiM6HmscYVbZ09qsnHnVYXlj2ZKrLsN8acK_W7At5HfAQAA__9TbIc0) than usual, today's _Business_ section contains a story that explains why. From one great newsletter to another, meet [_The Pour Over_](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAQB_CnwVsivmycgaFSlC1dO1oEDhsJjAXnJH77ymmkdu92ut_d6fT_ug5XE2KYx0-TQOPT52GGR42ACGUv4Ql2xZBnZxDmzGzAzeeBU94eqDowNTgT4jbIxukbdSfWgGaq5aqljIpm0p4byTqg4IU1qrP-BjfXchC2P7XuxJug92NUMcUYZZIeGeWy7XshuRfc9YxICi5gLkecAOFpqo9bvkM52pyaqCfEpRLxQfiF8AtOsOS1vDyX8afzXtgnxGXFNNS8FgtEnP9it0sCF9ZExPk3h7dYkxYTxpmIc0WD0BTtlkeIMdROEUnHZEJ8_YT_S_Ku-XcAAAD__wVhivI), the go-to news source for over 1 million Christians who want to stay informed without anxiety.

## Frio River Flooding Isolates Concan
Gov. Greg Abbott is requesting the addition of Williamson, Coke, and Concho counties to FEMA’s Public Assistance program, which would qualify those areas for federal funding to [repair infrastructure damaged](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2y4yAMx09jd3gQxg-_gmKbdNl2Sw8GYTNDUBYUJ7n9jrNHeJ000vw_fn-uy9WlnMr2293Q8ivSUvDZMjJjPUd8oX9wohIcYyHwid-RFiXVJKQRYJbgUn4vug92leEberRgJmUmCXLsdwuziWCC8auR30FqrwCVBjlBmEflv_pkTzFpwABI0HIAqfQ0z6NWcVRhhk5LDImpDrwj48u1mN90YB083fpsd-Z768Zfnbp06rLRMXyeho2OTl3OOp263Knx_yvWQlW4dSVmUfHvAxs3ETFgdVmE1FxjrMK1lhq74lFEqoL3iihcCOmE4bLw9CicsIlIOdMzlU18bEXMROFc-2rD_ZlyTu3LdFpuN5fyJzP_jPRh1b8AAAD__zFultc) by recent flooding. People stranded in Concan by flooding on the Frio River received food and supplies [by helicopter](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAURL8Gd0RwDcEpKLahe9tuaRG4vKAlYMFNHP_9yvsLrxtppDkz8-dr_fK55Pr92z_R0ie1teI-ChJhPyV-MLwotxo9YW0yZDpSW0GA5sJwadboczlWNUV7F_EmJ7TSaDBaSDFPDxtRi_uSNFzvRs9eog63W0JI6qbCvIQp2zNMGGmkFFKJixSg9LLMCtIMcZFMCYyZWr_QAwk_fqRytDf2S2jPqdgH0TbY_IuBY-D2fb_8HZ5Ok4E71zBwpQVfGLgTxcAJw8DJKwO3YdsK8lx5aDX4ygd1XyNGfj_46-1LRB7aq9LBU2kt7p6wD94xYH4jf2DJoW2EnY_XtpWMJ23qNm57LiWPq2FKfD99Lv_b0s8-flv4FwAA___mo5Fy) Tuesday night, and Marble Falls issued a [boil water notice](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb_GdEZjg2MoXLyGLq_dEg14SKw1doSHAH-_yv7Cdle60jnS-bqPdwwxpMd_XMnxueQx0VEiMdP2mXTSvHPIySNTymoOfC151KCNBCuVHT2GeI1t5d0EvlcVOWWNtgYUNNXT2b6nWd8MdOTtbbbQG2h7g5PpsZ8Qq-A-MLDKKgWqhVqBbk3XNa1eGu07JVogHzhvNT-J6cSyxCu_aavnvFbRPZlfRTT_hB6EHo7jqL9PTJ9T6GHat0Qs57wnvoQeVtymSHLBGIsMpexU5JRDlAcybTJlDjMJPVSb868jxBjKzYoWHiuG-Cvkv2V6O_0TAAD__7A6fNk) in response to potential contamination of its water supply. Meanwhile, forecasters are [tracking a disturbance](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OgzAQhJ8GOpDXP5gULq6hy7VXIgevw0oORvYmJG9_4l7huhmNNJ_0_Vznq6dE2_3bP9DxO-Z5w6MmZMZyRnzj8mTKW_CMW4aF-BPzLIU0nbAd2Dl4Sp9Zt8HdRLhAiw6skdYIEKpdnRm9uakBA5gBPaK4hKj0YEDFAcaoWnLnmbBgAQRo0YOQ2oyj0jIqGUZotMBAnEvPKzK-fY3pk19Y-iU_2uRW5r026quRUyOn4zj6ZS15O9ezo-cVSyMnX5iWhI2cuOSdFp-6QJWf5ea3BbuAe8FaKW_d_ZliJ4W1Ug-639e9LS7sB6VEdbCNFveHp_SH5_9Jezn5GwAA__-Ek4E0) in the Gulf that could bring heavy rainfall to Houston and Southeast Texas this weekend. CenterPoint Energy said it expects any impact on its service operations to be minimal. A review of FEMA data shows that while the National Weather Service provided flash flood alerts on July 4 to Kerr County residents who had opted in to receive them, local officials [did not activate](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8Gd0RAIDgFxTbu3rZbWoQZktEj8ASTOP77lfcXtrvSla7uOX--1q9Iher9d3xi4E9ua8VtFGTGfkT8YHoxtQqRsTadiPfcVqOMk8pL7VeIVPbVThBuCq56wqC9M94prc7TI1zSLaYbzHpWziZnr3Dx9gqzw5t3V50nCseY8tprrbRVJ62MdfN8tiafDcxaWIVA3PqJH8j4iSOXvb2xn1J7TiU8mH-GOP8SZhFm2bbt9P2J9SiFWai-cTDd48EwhFm-sXeZ2qvyLlvOlCiWIYFA1saSxnihxCf2O9a0y1iws3xVpiKNhLgPGTNjl4ARyi5zaQ2EWaYe4GejUmhcvLDq_oxU_v3j_7P6DuZvAAAA__8Ivo7O) an emergency alert system that would have notified everyone with a mobile device of the impending danger.
## Roberson Gets New Execution Date
A [new execution date](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMFqxCAURb_G7Az6YsbMwsV0EWhhuu0yGH1JpEYHdSaTvy-ZQn-gq_fgwuGe-3Udrtp5F-ZPvaIqzykOAbfssRRMx4tPNPfiYrC6YIjcuLJPcQAGLWWScjlY7fw-iMqqkdkzr1Bx2YJsGWdNtajWAjfaMIkCWn7WnbH2dGrsWXZGcyEqpw4Yk1xyzrhgNWcg2q5rBEwN2I4TwdC6ElNdFiz41Hnye3xgqk1cK6-WUm6ZNBcCPYF-27Z6zeHICPQY6D0T6E1yKxLoZwyYtCfQv0A0xRFT-T05BjpjyTTgRv-86SFOXaB50d8Y6KjHnRqdD5pO9HLh7x_3N1YlZW-b897lkySCzat2_lWw_G_Wh4KfAAAA__87g4z6) of Oct. 16 was set for death row inmate Robert Roberson, 58, during a court hearing in Anderson County on Wednesday. Roberson, convicted of killing his two-year-old daughter Nikki in 2002, was scheduled to die last October, but state lawmakers [delayed the execution](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGv4yAQhH8N7rBgjYNTUFzjLtdeaWFY2ygEItjE8b8_-T3p_YFX7Y5GGs03_27TzYYY0vrXPtDQZ8lTwr1GJMJyvvhB96KQk7eEKUsX6FjyBAJ6LjSXevI2xGNSjTez8FfZoJG6B90LKbpmMw7mK4BViBeJ7tqBxcviFtBqcNJ2XRPMGSa01FIKqUQrBah-GDoFSwd-kEwJ9IFyaWlDwo-tSzzyG0vr8qOJZiN6Vtb9YTAyGPd9b-9I99NkMJ40DEbKT14pl4CniuGNfI555T94fENbQlr5K3ksuz34kgsvecZC36fmxOtm75j4bOeDO1uRwdgU4597iDHUi2ZKrA8b4lcz-t2ebwP_AwAA___AM4yt) by issuing a subpoena for his testimony at a committee hearing. Roberson’s attorneys asked the Texas Court of Criminal Appeals in February for a new trial, claiming new evidence casts doubt on the controversial “shaken baby syndrome” diagnosis that led to his conviction. State District Judge Austin Reeve Jackson said the [court’s inaction](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO5CAMhp-GdEQ2IQspUlyTbq-9MiJgZpAYGBHvZPL2p-xJ9wJb_ZYLy9_3__lcP13Kqdx-uwfN_I51LXTsmZipXSO9yX9xqiU4plLRJz5jXRWoUYKRaNbgUj5X3YV5gzBhRzOaUZkREIbuPodtoqj9BNECeGej0T7oCe2HCttmXZfm6xgYNIiAGnoEpUdrB63ioIJFoYFC4tp6vhPT2-0xn_VFrff10eX5zvzcxfBLqEWo5TiO3m87Tj2_hFpc4-QzCbVcXEItuXqXr0wvkluuN3kn11K5ya8SqB3ulM_KVDi5nE-5E8v_DuQlQcba5PcbMpXHtWh1o8b_Yq9FqGUElCOagaICaYG01OCUtDqixA2MN8GPEGLX5vA8Us5p_zBCw-3hUv7G4p-V8ZrV3wAAAP__AQaebw) obligated him to schedule a new execution date. The Anderson County District Attorney’s Office has agreed to transfer prosecution of the case to Attorney General Ken Paxton, who [blocked Roberson](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAQRb8Gd1jDGBtSULzGXV67pYVhiNESExk2jv9-5Wi1P7DVjO5IR3Pux3W62pjievtv72TqK-Rppb0kqpW2c6UXua8a8-ptpTULF-sR8oSAPQfFhZq8jemYZOPNDP4iGjJC9ah6ENA1ixl66kgG651VSvY-gPSB5AAEs9YX10RzwkAJJQQICa0AlL3WncTQodeCSSAfa97aulClly0hHflJW-vyvUlmqfVRWPeP4chw3Pe9XWfnw36eGY6nD8MxZWcTw_EN4D_hlmfaKn-Pktcz5r_G_FTmZbGftPLZzgd3thDDsdN60DgwHJvN-MceU4plUEzC7W5jer9V_1bm0-B3AAAA__9VPolw) from appearing before lawmakers last fall.
## McKinney Is No. 1 City for Renters
McKinney is the nation’s best city for renters, according to a [new ranking](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOpSAQRb8GdxgoUHDhYjbuerazNAhFPzIoBqub599P7F-Y3UlVcnLv_fOxfriU0_H52-040zuW9cB2ZSTC-iC-0X9RKkdwhEeRPtEdywoCBi4Ml2YNLuV71V2YNxEm2eEszQBmEFKo7jVvm3bGjwGUMMr7QUTtjI3TOCCoSdouzY9MGGmkFFKLXgrQg7VKQ1QQrGRaYEhUak8vJHy7K-a7fGPtfdm7PL-IzoupXwwWBktrrW_RuefJYHGVks_IYHl6MViuE31ymVc8S6XnspWyU2kHD7ExWHb_Nx0H3nzDi_iZnUdOhVc8iF_0Fe4f9C4-UrCGj9GPajSaG4yWaz9ZPhkRufJyspPbbBChq3M4W8o5XaNhWnzuLuWf_PR_q3_P8C8AAP__ob6U9w) of 150 U.S. cities by apartment listing website RentCafe. The report analyzed 20 key metrics, such as apartment quality, economic strength, traffic, air quality, and access to natural amenities. McKinney was ranked [No. 4 on affordability](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQhp8GNqPzYWMYPHRhS9eOyMFHcqrBEb6G8PZV-grd_uHX90nf12W6BE683T7DSl5eS542OkoiEdrfk140_wjnLQahLeuZ5VzyhIBWgVPaTTFwOidTR3-FOOiavHYWnQUNbX331i7kQmtd2yEBDr0OEYMxZol2GLq-Zv-GgdNOa9AGGg1obN-3BpcWY68rAxRZ8t7InYReoSzpzE_amzmvdfJ3kUep2o8KxwrH4zialOeQHnteONH7VOG4U0iKigShCsd1_uZto1NdqYjaaRN15ZuaWZiK0jAYC0NX7z4-Dk6JS-cqA7c1cPqTyv9SPT3-BgAA___l6nzK) and No. 9 on quality of life. Its average apartment size of 948 square feet is the second-highest on the list. The report also praised McKinney for its consistent job growth, numerous parks, and excellent schools. clean_body: A new execution date of Oct. 16 was set for death row inmate Robert Roberson, 58, during a court hearing in Anderson County on Wednesday. | | | | | | Thursday, July 17, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1835, an assembly of colonists gathered at William Millican’s gin house in Jackson County to discuss their grievances against the Mexican government of Antonio López de Santa Anna. The was a prelude to a convention the following year that drafted the Texas Declaration of Independence. If your last cookout was than usual, today's Business section contains a story that explains why. Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Frio River Flooding Isolates Concan Gov. Greg Abbott is requesting the addition of Williamson, Coke, and Concho counties to FEMA’s Public Assistance program, which would qualify those areas for federal funding to by recent flooding. People stranded in Concan by flooding on the Frio River received food and supplies Tuesday night, and Marble Falls issued a in response to potential contamination of its water supply. Meanwhile, forecasters are in the Gulf that could bring heavy rainfall to Houston and Southeast Texas this weekend. CenterPoint Energy said it expects any impact on its service operations to be minimal. A review of FEMA data shows that while the National Weather Service provided flash flood alerts on July 4 to Kerr County residents who had opted in to receive them, local officials an emergency alert system that would have notified everyone with a mobile device of the impending danger. Roberson Gets New Execution Date A of Oct. 16 was set for death row inmate Robert Roberson, 58, during a court hearing in Anderson County on Wednesday. Roberson, convicted of killing his two-year-old daughter Nikki in 2002, was scheduled to die last October, but state lawmakers by issuing a subpoena for his testimony at a committee hearing. Roberson’s attorneys asked the Texas Court of Criminal Appeals in February for a new trial, claiming new evidence casts doubt on the controversial “shaken baby syndrome” diagnosis that led to his conviction. State District Judge Austin Reeve Jackson said the obligated him to schedule a new execution date. The Anderson County District Attorney’s Office has agreed to transfer prosecution of the case to Attorney General Ken Paxton, who from appearing before lawmakers last fall. McKinney Is No. 1 City for Renters McKinney is the nation’s best city for renters, according to a of 150 U.S. cities by apartment listing website RentCafe. The report analyzed 20 key metrics, such as apartment quality, economic strength, traffic, air quality, and access to natural amenities. McKinney was ranked and No. 9 on quality of life. Its average apartment size of 948 square feet is the second-highest on the list. The report also praised McKinney for its consistent job growth, numerous parks, and excellent schools. According , the city is "an ideal choice for renters seeking a small-town atmosphere without sacrificing the perks of a larger urban center," providing "the perfect balance between affordability and suburban comfort." Other highly ranked cities in the state include Austin (No. 4), Round Rock (No. 8), Plano (No. 11), Conroe (No. 24), San Marcos (No. 27), Denton (No. 33), Fort Worth (No. 38), and San Antonio (No. 44). () ➤ San Antonio ISD: The school board unanimously approved the sale of a property where a $160 million minor league ballpark is expected to be built. () ➤ Austin: City Manager T.C. Broadnax presented a $6.3 billion proposed budget to the city council on Tuesday. "By focusing on people, places, and partnerships, we can ensure that our budget reflects the needs and aspirations of Austinites ,” he said. () ➤ Brownsville: The port’s ship channel was reopened Tuesday after a shrimp boat capsized over the weekend. One of the fishermen aboard the boat is still missing. () ➤ Spring: The FBI arrested Andrew David Sikes, 71, for allegedly threatening to kill U.S. Sen. John Cornyn in a voicemail he left at Cornyn's office. According to charging documents, Sikes "just got worked up" and didn’t intend to carry out his threats. () ➤ Kyle: City Hall was evacuated Tuesday while police responded to a "credible enough" bomb threat that is still being investigated. A city council meeting was rescheduled for last night. () ➤ Angleton: A 76-foot-tall statue of Stephen F. Austin, which was damaged by Hurricane Beryl last year, will likely cost more than the $750,000 allocated by the state to repair, according to Brazoria County Parks Director Bryan Frazier. () Enjoy reading The Texas Flyover?mailto:?cc=editor@thetexasflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20news%20source&body=Hey!%0A%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Texas%20Flyover.%20I%20love%20it!%20I%20think%20you'll%20love%20it%20too.%0A%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20my%20new%20favorite%20source%20for%20Texas%20news.%20They%20cover%20everything%20happening%20around%20the%20state%E2%80%94usually%20politics%2C%20sports%2C%20finance%2C%20science%20%26%20tech%2C%20etc.%0A%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0A%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fthetexasflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3DDL%0A%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will! to share with your friends and family. ✈️ | ➤ The Dallas Mavericks have been mentioned as a potential landing spot for Lakers superstar LeBron James, but the team is reportedly reluctant to gut its current roster to match his $52.6 million salary. () ➤ The Texas Longhorns beat out the Georgia Bulldogs to secure a commitment from linebacker Tyler Atkinson, the No. 1 recruit in the state of Georgia. () ➤ Austin FC announced the addition of five members to the club’s ownership group, each of whom purchased a minority stake. Majority owner Anthony Precourt still retains primary control of the club. () ➤ Twelve high school football teams from the Panhandle made Dave Campbell’s preseason Top 25 list, with Amarillo High ranking as the top Class 5A Division I school in the region. () ➤ Yesterday's Results: | Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Tired, achy feet? Slip into for all-day comfort and soothing relief! These compression socks improve circulation, reduce swelling, and help energize your legs—perfect for travel, work, or relaxing at home. Experience the difference HappyFeet makes. | ➤ James Avery, a family-owned jewelry company based in Kerrville, sold out of its ‘Deep in the Heart of Texas’ charm within hours of announcing 100% of the proceeds from sales would benefit those affected by the July 4 flash floods. () ➤ Years of drought have thinned the state’s cattle numbers, leading to record-high beef prices for ranchers. "We've got to have more numbers ," said Colt Adams, co-owner of the El Campo Livestock Exchange. () ➤ Tesla has expanded the service area of its Robotaxi pilot program in Austin and plans to introduce the service in California "in a month or so," according to a statement from Tesla CEO Elon Musk. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Thinking about starting a business in Texas? makes forming an LLC easy, helping protect personal assets and boost business credibility. Join over 4 million entrepreneurs who trust LegalZoom. | Flying together with our sponsor Readers say it's like the Chick-fil-A of news: simple, uplifting, and good for the soul. : Stay updated on what matters Skip the partisan drama Refocus on eternity It’s free, fast, and way more nourishing than doomscrolling. | ➤ Jack Stradinger, 27, ran 100 miles in less than 24 hours along the Katy Trail in Dallas earlier this week to raise money for those affected by the July 4 flash floods in Kerr County, where his grandfather lives. () ➤ Chip and Joanna Gaines, the stars of HGTV’s discontinued Fixer Upper reality show based in Waco, are facing backlash from conservative fans for featuring a same-sex couple in a reality show on their new Magnolia Network. () ➤ A Corpus Christi family reunited with its dog, Blue, eight years after she got loose during Hurricane Harvey. She was found in Waco and identified by her microchip. In this time of maximum danger to our country, all who love America most dearly must stand up and speak out for the principles that, at our best, define the nation.”_ **By participating in our survey, you’re shaping the NDRC’s work of protecting fair maps, combating extreme partisan gerrymandering, and advancing our efforts in our 2025 and 2026 priority states.** [**You’re the force behind our pro-democracy work, Peter. clean_body: Will you take our quick survey? | Hey Peter, Today, we’re reaching out because we want to hear directly from you. we want to hear more about the issues you care about, why you’re in this fight for fair maps, and what you want to hear more about from our team. From partisan gerrymandering on the state level to Republican attempts to undermine a fair census count at the federal level, a lot is going on in the world of redistricting. As former Attorney General Holder puts it: “We must confront the fact that our great country is going through a generational regression. In this time of maximum danger to our country, all who love America most dearly must stand up and speak out for the principles that, at our best, define the nation.” By participating in our survey, you’re shaping the NDRC’s work of protecting fair maps, combating extreme partisan gerrymandering, and advancing our efforts in our 2025 and 2026 priority states. | Thanks, NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete.
