Fellow activist,
This week, the U.S. Supreme Court made a major decision that could impact the future of millions of people across the nation: It ruled that the Trump administration can proceed with firing approximately 1,000 employees at the Department of Education, which, according to _The New York Times_ ,**effectively eliminates the agency. **

The department is responsible for critical functions, including disbursing grants and loans to college students, sending money to K-12 schools to support low-income students and students with disabilities, tracking student achievement, and enforcing civil rights laws. While only Congress can eliminate a cabinet-level agency, Trump is working to gut the Department of Education so it can no longer effectively function.

In Justice Sonia Sotomayor's dissent, she wrote that the court decision “**would have severe consequences for the country’s students** by unleashing ‘untold harm, delaying or denying educational opportunities and leaving students to suffer from discrimination, sexual assault and other civil rights violations without the federal resources Congress intended.’”

**This is just another example of why courts matter. **

Judges and justices on the bench make decisions every day that affect our lives, our children's future, and the outcomes of our communities. From education to reproductive rights, immigration, climate, and beyond, the state and federal judiciary hold critical decisions in their hands, and we must work to ensure our justice system remains an impartial, just, and fair system that prioritizes people over politics.

**Due to federalism, both the federal government and each state government have their own court systems.** State courts are the final arbiters of state laws and state constitutions, their interpretation of federal law or the U.S. Constitution may be appealed to the U.S. Supreme Court. In recent years, among other decisions the PA Supreme Court ruled on cases that protected voting rights and access to the ballot, fair and equitable school funding, reproductive freedom, and environmental justice.

**This matters deeply to us, as Pennsylvania has critical judicial elections just around the corner.** Republicans are running a massive anti-retention campaign against Democratic-elected justices on our state Supreme Court. We need to ensure that voters understand what’s at stake and are prepared to cast their votes at the ballot box to elect leaders who will stand up for our rights and freedoms.

[**We must protect the independence of our state judiciary and time is running out to fully fund our critical voter education and mobilization campaigns ahead of the general election this year. Please help support our work to ensure voters understand the power of the courts by donating $25 or more today.**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7cnf2nT45L4TDLL79xclFmlYUKVz-2FZIWg-2FtTcyX6kz-2FubRbqYbAFr6fPtsXt6CN8Y7KVo8DjxRiV5Wrf27xQ3jSR2iAdWya1f-2FzH1QQlrYdEPiovRXwa8XPdGHqPyftvg-3DtR8I_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYKHS5RBvjN-2F4gU98MJ1oW-2FmRP2UZacXIqOfb5iQtX8ShV7-2F59kIscjDyM-2FlhiKnBLXMH-2FwQXq-2BdSvBAr1H2xU-2BNTqPHfWjdtDYv-2BungMjj3oiutoh7psJNCjYAmCKX4-2B2DiOo-2FQaKr7E-2B8416izVM9lsHrUQ6-2F8yg1oAMYyJF2mx4puTYgO5NikCN8eguGpKo)

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, This week, the U.S. Supreme Court made a major decision that could impact the future of millions of people across the nation: It ruled that the Trump administration can proceed with firing approximately 1,000 employees at the Department of Education, which, according to The New York Times ,effectively eliminates the agency. The department is responsible for critical functions, including disbursing grants and loans to college students, sending money to K-12 schools to support low-income students and students with disabilities, tracking student achievement, and enforcing civil rights laws. While only Congress can eliminate a cabinet-level agency, Trump is working to gut the Department of Education so it can no longer effectively function. In Justice Sonia Sotomayor's dissent, she wrote that the court decision “would have severe consequences for the country’s students by unleashing ‘untold harm, delaying or denying educational opportunities and leaving students to suffer from discrimination, sexual assault and other civil rights violations without the federal resources Congress intended.’” This is just another example of why courts matter. Judges and justices on the bench make decisions every day that affect our lives, our children's future, and the outcomes of our communities. From education to reproductive rights, immigration, climate, and beyond, the state and federal judiciary hold critical decisions in their hands, and we must work to ensure our justice system remains an impartial, just, and fair system that prioritizes people over politics. Due to federalism, both the federal government and each state government have their own court systems. State courts are the final arbiters of state laws and state constitutions, their interpretation of federal law or the U.S. Constitution may be appealed to the U.S. Supreme Court. In recent years, among other decisions the PA Supreme Court ruled on cases that protected voting rights and access to the ballot, fair and equitable school funding, reproductive freedom, and environmental justice. This matters deeply to us, as Pennsylvania has critical judicial elections just around the corner. Republicans are running a massive anti-retention campaign against Democratic-elected justices on our state Supreme Court. We need to ensure that voters understand what’s at stake and are prepared to cast their votes at the ballot box to elect leaders who will stand up for our rights and freedoms. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In solidarity, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

name: Please take action (via StateDemocrats.com)
subject: We need all hands on deck right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
The Supreme Court just ruled that the Trump administration can move forward with their plan to DISMANTLE the Department of Education!
#

**BREAKING: U.S. Supreme Court rules that the Trump administration can move forward with their plan to _DISMANTLE the Department of Education!_** _We need all hands on deck right now, Peter._ The Supreme Court just granted Donald Trump + his administration EVEN MORE power by clearing the way for them to completely gut the Department of Education. **[Please join our urgent call to Congress before midnight tonight: End the GOP attacks on educators, students, and public schools! Protect public education from the dangerous MAGA agenda!](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250717?t=1&akid=9131%2E614464%2EL8K_Lc)** **[CLICK HERE TO ADD YOUR NAME BEFORE MIDNIGHT](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250717?t=2&akid=9131%2E614464%2EL8K_Lc)** **This is a full-blown crisis for public education in America. Now, Donald Trump + his administration have the power to:** _❌ Axe necessary funding for public schools nationwide_
_❌ Fire thousands of federal workers_
_❌ Continue their dangerous attacks on teachers + students_
_❌ Almost entirely gut the Department of Education_ We can’t let this stand, Peter. **That’s why we’re calling on engaged citizens like YOU to demand that Congress take action to END these attacks on public education — immediately, before it’s too late!** _We need to collect 1,500 signatures before midnight._ **[Will you be one of them, Peter? Add your name by clicking the button below:](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250717?t=3&akid=9131%2E614464%2EL8K_Lc)** **[CLICK HERE TO ADD YOUR NAME BEFORE MIDNIGHT](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250717?t=4&akid=9131%2E614464%2EL8K_Lc)**
---

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111639641/557901218/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE733_20250717_8amUpdate_PL_v1s4&sourceid=1056608&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTE2ZWJiYS0xODYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQnr7xCYo9n00wdRdz4S4DjhQ3DhkjgJGp3bou-R5Sc=) Today is the _final day_ of our Mission Majority Fund — and I just got off the phone with our CFO, Callie Fines, who gave me an update: we're only **$14,880** short of hitting our $100,000 goal.

This fund really matters. I've seen firsthand how goals like this one power early organizing, fuel rapid response, and help Democratic pro-choice women build strong campaigns from the ground up. Early money helps the next wave of leaders — women who will fight for our rights, our freedoms, and our democracy — build winning campaigns from day one.

clean_body: We're so close, Peter — will you help us close the gap? | = Good morning, Peter! I just made my first cup of coffee and wanted to send you a quick note. = Today is the final day of our Mission Majority Fund — and I just got off the phone with our CFO, Callie Fines, who gave me an update: we're only $14,880 short of hitting our $100,000 goal. This fund really matters. I've seen firsthand how goals like this one power early organizing, fuel rapid response, and help Democratic pro-choice women build strong campaigns from the ground up. Early money helps the next wave of leaders — women who will fight for our rights, our freedoms, and our democracy — build winning campaigns from day one. We have the candidates. We have the strategy. Now we just need you, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let's finish this fund strong — together. And then, let's take back power. Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Time to STEP IT UP, Peter!!!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-threespecials?refcode=071725_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-threespecials?refcode=071725_1]
They’re flooding swing districts with dark money to buy the House. We can’t let them lock it up before voters even notice. We need ALL good Democrats to rush a donation NOW to help Democrats counter this GOP cash >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-weekly?refcode=071725_1]
Peter, we just heard this news and had to come to you right away:
THE NRCC OUTRAISED DEMOCRATS LAST QUARTER, AND THEY'RE ON TRACK TO DO THE SAME THIS QUARTER
The GOP raised $36.7 million last quarter, folks.
They are NOT playing around.
Republicans aren’t just hoping to hold the House. They’re planning to straight-up purchase it.
The NRCC is quietly flooding battleground districts with dark money, billionaire cash, and far-right talking points — all in an effort to lock in GOP control of Congress before most voters have even tuned in.
We must match their war chest dollar for dollar - and thanks to the strength of our grassroots movement, we can.
Because when everyday Democrats chip in $5, $20, or $50 at a time, we create something stronger than any billionaire super PAC: people-powered political muscle that can flip seats, win races, and fight back against MAGA extremism.
We need YOU in this fight with us. Will you chip in any amount you can BEFORE the crucial end of quarter fundraising deadline to help Democrats counter this GOP cash? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-weekly?refcode=071725_1]

As you all likely know by now, I've been slowly working on a book about my experience in Florida since 2021 when I first met my agent.
Now, we finally have a title: _**In the Company of Death**_
If you're a founding subscriber of this newsletter, you will get an autographed copy of the book upon its eventual release, in addition to lifetime access to this newsletter.
As a monthly or annual subscriber, you'll also get early access to new and exclusive materials, like the below excerpt.
You can upgrade to a paid or founding subscriber using the button below:
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-7UP4p3FBUHvYZyU7rpMgvecETiG5c6TW0BilGEMrA0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168560743)
Not only will my book cover the chaos of the early pandemic days, but also the cost of doing good, public science in defiance of powerful enemies, the trauma of becoming a whistleblower, and life after becoming a "hero."
**Note:** _If you 're having trouble upgrading to Founder Level, use the email address you want to give access to this newsletter to and [make a payment with your credit card here.](https://substack.com/redirect/485aacf8-82a9-4009-86f6-dd2f985e507d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
Continue below to read an excerpt from Chapter 1: The Trouble with Truth.
* * *
When the first whispers of a strange, shadowy illness began to stir in late January of 2020, I was already on edge. The world seemed caught in a fragile lull before the storm, as if the air itself held its breath. The virus was no longer just a distant rumor out of Wuhan, China -- it was a silent, invisible threat, moving faster than anyone dared admit. In my small office within the Florida Department of Health, I saw the data flicker on my screen, numbers and patterns that spelled a warning no one was ready to hear. I moved swiftly, as if speed alone could outrun the coming disaster.
I went to my superiors, my voice steady but urgent. "We need to start telling the public what's going on." Yet the room responded with hesitation. "We need to be careful," they said. "We don't want to cause panic." Their eyes reflected something I had learned to recognize -- a mixture of disbelief and political caution, the paralysis of systems built to avoid upheaval rather than confront crisis. The machinery of government, vast and deliberate, stalled when faced with urgency. Days slipped by as I pushed for testing protocols, for data transparency, for clarity in communication. But the doors stayed closed.
The virus, unbound by bureaucratic constraints, spread like wildfire. It rippled through nursing homes, swept across hospitals, crept into every corner of our state. Behind my desk, the numbers climbed, each one a life, a family, a story. I begged for permission to share data -- to provide researchers with the tools to track the outbreak, to arm journalists with facts to hold the public safe. Yet the approvals never came. I was told to wait, to hold the data close, to trust the process. I could feel time slipping, precious hours bleeding away.
In those moments, I understood that this was not just a fight against a virus, but a battle against fear itself -- fear of truth, fear of consequences, fear of losing control. The data, so often portrayed as cold and clinical, was in fact a living testament to human suffering. And yet it was being shaped, molded, censored in the service of politics. My conscience gnawed at me, each withheld report a silent betrayal of the people we served...

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Our Epstein Lawsuits…We’re Not Giving Up!
body:
I want to report to you on some very good news that we have received recently! Given the Justice Department’s about-face decision to abandon its Epstein investigations and not release relevant records to the public, Judicial Watch has already stepped into the gap...in fact, we filed a new Epstein-related records lawsuit against the Justice Department just last Friday!

|
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Given the Justice Department's about-face decision to abandon its Epstein investigations and _not_ release relevant records to the public, **Judicial Watch** has already stepped into the gap...in fact, we filed a new Epstein-related records lawsuit against the Justice Department just last Friday!
The tangled history of how Jeffrey Epstein was able to evade prosecution for years after allegations of his activities and his connections to prominent Americans surfaced, _reeks of corruption and cover-ups_ ....
...and the American people deserve to know exactly what the FBI turned up during its extensive investigations of Epstein, and his network of "friends and clients" who participated in his crimes.
When the government fails to honor transparency and honesty, you can be sure that Judicial Watch will _not_ fail...because with dogged persistence and success, that is what we have been doing for the past 31 years!
I trust that you support our commitment to doing what the Justice Department is failing to do...pursuing our Epstein lawsuits and sharing what we learn with the American people, no matter who is named and/or implicated in Epstein's crimes!
And I ask you to support our increased commitment... _which may well include even more new lawsuits_ ...to getting to all the facts about these crimes [**with a special contribution today**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75317&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5).
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75317&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

At this critical moment in the fight for transparency and accountability in government, I hope you will join with us today as an active supporter of Judicial Watch!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Let’s celebrate the victory of principles; not the losses of the left
body:
Values Unite, Issues Divide

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=24b79d7470)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “Don’t do the silly dances in the end zone. Look like you have been there before!” – Lou Holtz
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| **Are you tired of winning?**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
# Chris Coyle - WinLabs Consulting
IT is my honor to introduce my talented and trusted friend, Chris Coyle—a Connecticut native and current RTC chair of Pomfret, CT, who has been recognized for his influential work in developing effective messaging and strategies that drive Republican campaign success. Now serving as a new member of the CTGOP State Central Committee, Chris leverages his expertise in persuasive communication, strategic narrative creation, and coaching to help GOP candidates resonate with voters. His experience in proposal writing and presenter coaching equips Republican candidates with the skills to stand out and achieve significant victories, making him a valued strategist and leader within Connecticut’s Republican Party.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# _Opinion_ | Let’s celebrate the victory of principles;
# not the losses of the left
---
|
**My friend and our guest author this week:**
**Chris Coyle, Pomfret, CT - RTC Chair and Political Activists**
We all get it. It feels good to win. It even feels betterwhen the hypocrisy and cynicism of many of the opponents of the Trumpadministration and those who generally support its policies is stripped barefor all to see in the bright light of reality.
From “mostly peaceful demonstrations” and **“Let’s go Brandon”** catchlines that exposed the spin-turned propaganda to the more recentpush back on the Democrat Judges using political talking points instead oflegal reasoning, we are beholding a reawakening of values and principles. Recently,the short and simple rebuke of a dissenting Supreme Court Justice who scoldedthe majority Justices, seemed to rip the band aid off the gauze of silentfrustration; pent up for years as we were lectured by the liberal elite andprotected/entitled class.
**Why it Matters:** Whenwe celebrate “Winning” and those who are against us as “losing” are we creatingthe dynamics for sustaining our movement to reunite our country with thestrength of a committed and growing majority for years to come?
**Consider this** ;
**Long-TermProcess not Short-Term Outcomes** : Ever notice after a big win,the elite coaches smile, high five and pump their arms, but always with ameasure of reserve? From UCONN Women’s basketball coach Geno Auriemma and thePatriot’s former coach Bill Belichick to the famous Alabama Football coach NickSaban, and many other honed leaders, they are all focused on how well everyonedid their job. Their team may have just won that game, but for these leadersthe question is the quality of the win, not just the outcome of that game. Theyfixate on how they can sustain the highest level of performance to keep onwinning. In today’s culture where every action and statement is magnifiedten-fold through digital networks, when we spike the ball in our opponents’face, are we creating an image that will attract more new followers? Don’t wewant folks to understand the power and potential of our positions, not ourpersonalities which may appear fixated on beating someone we disagree with?Remember, Making America Great Again is all about reaffirming our commitment toour founding values and Constitutional principles. The pursuit of greatness isa journey, and one that got a jump start last November 2024. But it is along-term process so we must think; what is the best message for the outcome weall want, the sustainable, long-term growth of our movement. The answer isgrowing our ranks by explaining not celebrating, so the wins today can be thefoundation for the wins tomorrow. Think long-term.
§ **Buildingnot boasting:** My friend and fellow collaborator on ourpodcast show, the Liberty Collaborative, [https://www.youtube.com/@LibertyCollaborative](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=c4bd4db80e&e=8763c56857), MichaelHancock [https://hancman.substack.com/](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=5dd64910dd&e=8763c56857) spokerecently about Republican’s focus on being builders. As Frederick DouglassRepublicans, we focus on what we stand for more than we focus on what we areagainst. The reason is fundamentally simple: we advocate for our foundationalvalues and principles. Those who created the most successful, free, andprosperous society ever built. It explains why our success in enforcingimmigration laws or demanding some measure of fairness in reciprocalinternational trade builds a stronger foundation for everyone, regardless ofpolitical orientation. Liberty is the gift that keeps on giving, if we willcontinue to free it from its shackles. Boasting and mocking opponents willfurther alienate them and others, while making the win about ourselves ratherthan the principles and values we champion. Does boasting feel good in theshort term, after so much ridicule and demeaning treatment? You bet. However,it is not conducive to the long-term movement we must continue to build.
**Winningwith honor:** One of the key elements of Lincoln’s historicsuccess in reuniting the country was General Grant’s approach to the surrenderof General Lee, which ended the Civil War. While Lee dressed up in his bestConfederate military dress uniform adorned with all the accoutrements of hishigh rank, General Grant wore slightly dirty clothes of the common Unionsoldier. Grant claimed he never thought about it, but historians point out thestrategic artistry of the event. Don’t demean, respect. And, the terms of Lee’ssurrender were unlike anything ever known in history, where the victorious armyusually imprisoned and tried its vanquished enemy. While there was strongopposition to this treatment of those supporting the Confederacy, historyproved the fundamental power of forgiveness and rebuilding. We are still theunited, United States because of that careful, thoughtful thinking.
Another powerful lesson comes fromFrederick Douglass’s treatment of his former slave master, Thomas Auld.Although Douglass was a passionate and outspoken critic of slavery and slaveowners specifically, when he had the opportunity to connect with Auld, he didso with magnanimity and grace. He wanted to use Auld’s capitulation as to theevils of slavery as an example for the public to see. Douglass’s demeanor andmoral strength reinforced the power of his principles. Similarly, we can letthe twisted logic of the failed promoters of divisive and destructive policiesgo up in flames on their own, offering a clear contrast to the unifying powerof our enduring values and principles.
**The Takeaways:** Sure, it feels good to celebrate the wins. If you want toearn clicks or build a following shouting at our opponents, it is certainly atarget-rich environment. But, don’t confuse that with what it takes to build asustainable majority for years to come. The way we win and how we explain whywe are winning has critical implications for the future of our movement.
Winning on shared values and Constitutional principles is awin for everyone. Since it is unlikely Trump can or will run again, let’sleverage the bigger story of what we are all about and why Making America GreatAgain is a long-term victory for everyone today and for years to come.

Dominic For CT 4 Mariners Way Branford, CT 06405-4481 USA

**Peter** ,

It's happening.

I just co-sponsored a bill with **Rep. Thomas Massie** to force the **FULL RELEASE** of the Epstein files--[**and we’re taking it straight to the House floor.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/ELhzbbbJEzRvivo-T243VAfKkg_sJpPg88SDBEff_eTLiHl_F6rBJlZR1RaqEkdDKvn7pM-ZdkRlPwN-ku6bwhPcKVqTUheIJ1ymLnG6Bggle9gDIDgrxHPRLKpEv9nPZ9Joy_IF4oFeJRSLICmfIrvd2HKy9UZAc3jdGi3dNdmeBfO_ce3Zf11Iy4UbOFTJY-FQ01QUcjYpn8Q13UHngwDH-iV6vPJhU0P68pVW-Syg4wkSmdyqhA-vWbXy7d-GDeXJCWNEiAXzDwBOhbZELDgrPvdOZILoi_jbHl5AaQWZIksqR34RA_OyEx8ONu5I91jnBBav-zoD1aJxmGQpQ0LVqbALSs7iR-bvvXarYI2qH1vlfJpMe8SbrM-DuDLRP-Y-BWKVwWT0QV2-rTQyR7jgF3Jl2HckfSsSCZD4zhP1sZjMjg2SLnFTab30si5mQcPPHloiKJ7kC4oeH4T68ThtMYF4Sn9DgMIbP-cX6YjsKGiuI6rT7eX1dXKsvxfjelgb0OJO32NdD32d0aQ1Y9cqhZndjrPjgrrKTBOAm4XdtLYt40dE_VPxSviq3H-dInJuXM8J6SEXFYBe5DETYBT6sBulu9M_GPtMUszZGdXORftBFFMtn3DOmwnuOm76WJLWCVoDmmc2nB0EaDhW8uFrwhxyd0QMzdjifZHJIEL-QKb9jbCgDx1jGjkGgiY9IG80W_sFUAwHQgwZ6z150aARhQYPJpRfggJTCtpHS1R0lH5n9XJcf6HgJ-vWLlZmPZQ1CmRLo8HQtJSgrMuM/DDltMpV6g_5R7lMEDqZY0UkeugGBrhph/11)

Because the American people deserve to know:
👉 _**Who was involved?**_
👉 _**How far did the corruption go?**_
👉 _**And why has justice STILL not been served?

**_
We've waited long enough.

Joe Biden's DOJ **IGNORED** it.

The media **WON 'T** investigate.

And the Swamp is hoping we forget.

But we won't.

That's why we're introducing a discharge petition to **FORCE** a vote in the House of Representatives to release the **FULL** , **UNREDACTED** Epstein files.
👉 **No cover-ups**
👉 **No black bars**
👉 **No more lies

**
We've seen the playbook. The elites get away with everything. And **WE THE PEOPLE** are left in the dark.

But not this time.

I'm **PROUD** to have co-sponsored this bill with Congressman Thomas Massie, and now we need **YOUR** help to turn up the pressure.

We're building a grassroots army to demand action.

clean_body: The American people deserve answers—now, not later Peter , It's happening. I just co-sponsored a bill with Rep. Thomas Massie to force the FULL RELEASE of the Epstein files-- Because the American people deserve to know: 👉 Who was involved? 👉 How far did the corruption go? 👉 And why has justice STILL not been served? We've waited long enough. Joe Biden's DOJ IGNORED it. The media WON 'T investigate. And the Swamp is hoping we forget. But we won't. That's why we're introducing a discharge petition to FORCE a vote in the House of Representatives to release the FULL , UNREDACTED Epstein files. 👉 No cover-ups 👉 No black bars 👉 No more lies We've seen the playbook. The elites get away with everything. And WE THE PEOPLE are left in the dark. But not this time. I'm PROUD to have co-sponsored this bill with Congressman Thomas Massie, and now we need YOUR help to turn up the pressure. We're building a grassroots army to demand action. We need 10,000 America First PATRIOTS to speak out in YOUR AREA. Add your name before midnight to DEMAND the truth be revealed. Patriot, this is about more than just a list of names. It's about transparency. It's about accountability. It's about the future of our country. No more secrets. No more special treatment. Are you with us? For Liberty, Eric Burlison Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress 2135 E. Independence Ave. #1007 Springfield, MO 65807 "Eric Burlison for Congress"

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Reengaging and reimagining / Reenganchando y reimaginando
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
Building community and a brighter future for Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Brighter%20Dallas%20community%20dinner%20July%202025.JPG]
Our thanks and gratitude goes out to all who came out to the Brighter Dallas community dinner information session last week on how Dallas County can best utilize funds from President Biden's Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) [https://www.americanprogress.org/article/top-11-benefits-of-the-inflation-reduction-act/] .
There was good food, fun, and fellowship as TOP members, Brighter Dallas coalition partners Downwinders at Risk [https://www.downwindersatrisk.org/] , Workers Defense Project [https://workersdefense.org/en/] , Sunrise Movement Dallas [https://hubs.sunrisemovement.org/dallas] , Southern Sector Rising [https://southernsectorrising.org/] , and local residents brainstormed ways how these millions of dollars from the federal government can help lower energy bills, fix homes, and create good-paying jobs.
If we don’t speak up on this issue, this money could go to wealthy areas and big developers — not us. That's why TOP and Brighter Dallas are organizing to make sure Black, Latino, and working class families in Dallas get the support we deserve.
For more information about our IRA campaign efforts in Dallas and how you can plug in, contact Iman at ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
Calling out Trump and Abbott's push to further gerrymander Congressional districts
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20redistricting%20maps.jpg]
This coming Monday, July 21, marks the start of Greg Abbott's called special legislative session, and fresh off his failed response to devastating flash floods in our state, he added U.S. House redistricting to his already right-wing special session agenda. [https://www.texastribune.org/2025/07/11/texas-redistricting-racial-gerrymandering-coalition-districts-trump/]
This statewide political ploy comes only weeks after TOP spoke out against Tarrant County's Republican-controlled Commissioners Court abrupt push to redistrict [https://www.theshorthorn.com/news/tarrant-countys-redistricting-the-result-the-response-and-whats-next/article_75b9a309-8ef3-4bfb-bb51-9d514aa67377.html] to weaken the voting power of Black and Latino residents.
This mid-decade redraw of Congressional districts from Abbott, with no new census data and no public mandate, is a calculated act of racial gerrymandering -- and his marching orders are coming straight from the White House [https://www.politico.com/news/2025/07/15/trump-five-seat-pickup-redraw-texas-congressional-map-00454301] , as Trump seeks to give the GOP a blatantly unfair advantage to hold the House in next year's midterms.
We're fighting back alongside our allies Fair Maps Texas [https://www.fairmapstexas.org/] to get the word out and step up for the fair representation ALL Texans deserve.
REGISTER for to take part in their Community Update and Town Hall on Zoom TODAY at 6:30 p.m. Central, to learn how you can fight back! [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/3C6CLdxnTAK7IgEvUqukgA#/registration]
Proudly sponsoring a community-driven film festival
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/KNON%20film%20festival%202025.jpg]
TOP Education Fund is proud to support our friends at KNON 89.3 FM this Sunday afternoon, July 20, as the community radio station hosts its 5th Annual FREE Film Festival at the Texas Theatre in Dallas. Bring your family and friends! The festival kicks off at 12:30 p.m. and features four community-driven independent productions.
Share the Facebook event and flyer with the films. [https://www.facebook.com/events/1063703332386417/]
Get your movie tickets here. [https://www.prekindle.com/find-tickets/id/-2853111880177251338;jsessionid=7749E59DDB3F75D8A7F2929AD4DAAD42?0&fbclid=IwY2xjawLl5uhleHRuA2FlbQIxMABicmlkETFNUXBlUGM0ZERMNTAwYnpYAR6QFkwmA-YCwTMDyus-tpW78RKcQICwFkk6FO0LMTCuPPLkL_2hRm0dRZKbsg_aem_TWMSnoGjdUzjT-oFX8ELIA&queueittoken=e_prekindle~q_005ad151-392d-4d9a-b895-4f8c9a662c13~ts_1752762445~ce_true~rt_queue~h_7086b976aa218a040eda8b39f4f386bf89a5ea3b4c7c80d1044c1ef43f04f4e1]
For more information, contact David at dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] .
TOP Tip: Make sure severe weather alerts on your smartphone are ON
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Small%20-%20Smartphone%20stock.jpeg]
Climate change is REAL, and Texas weather can change on a dime. That's why it's as important as ever that you keep weather alerts active on your smartphone. Make sure you receive those alerts on your iPhone or Android here. [https://www.kens5.com/article/tech/phone-emergency-alerts-turn-on-weather-texas/273-e936c689-8964-4354-85a0-a0d2cab0daab]
Español
Construyendo comunidad y un futuro más brillante para Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Brighter%20Dallas%20community%20dinner%20July%202025.JPG]
Nuestro agradecimiento y gratitud a todos los que asistieron a la cena comunitaria de Brighter Dallas la semana pasada, donde se habló sobre cómo el Condado de Dallas puede optimizar el uso de los fondos de la Ley de Reducción de la Inflación (IRA) del presidente Biden. [https://www.americanprogress.org/article/top-11-benefits-of-the-inflation-reduction-act/]
Hubo buena comida, diversión y compañerismo mientras los miembros de TOP, los socios de la coalición de Brighter Dallas Downwinders at Risk [https://www.downwindersatrisk.org/] , Workers Defense Project [https://workersdefense.org/en/] , Sunrise Movement Dallas [https://hubs.sunrisemovement.org/dallas] , Southern Sector Rising [https://southernsectorrising.org/] y los residentes locales intercambiaron ideas sobre cómo estos millones de dólares del gobierno federal pueden ayudar a reducir las facturas de energía, reparar viviendas y crear empleos con mejores salarios.
Si no nos pronunciamos sobre este tema, este dinero podría ir a parar a zonas adineradas y grandes promotoras inmobiliarias, y no a nosotros. Por eso, TOP y Brighter Dallas se están organizando para garantizar que las familias Negras, y Latinas de clase trabajadora de Dallas reciban el apoyo que merecen.
Para obtener más información sobre nuestra campaña de la IRA en Dallas y cómo participar, contacte a Iman en ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
Denunciando el intento de Trump y Abbott de manipular aún más los Distritos Electorales del Congreso
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20redistricting%20maps.jpg]
El próximo lunes 21 de julio comienza la sesión legislativa especial convocada por Greg Abbott. Tras su fallida respuesta a las devastadoras inundaciones repentinas en nuestro estado, añadió la redistribución de distritos de la Cámara de Representantes de EE. UU. a su ya derechista agenda de sesiones especiales. [https://www.texastribune.org/2025/07/11/texas-redistricting-racial-gerrymandering-coalition-districts-trump/]
Esta maniobra política estatal se produce solo unas semanas después de que TOP se manifestara en contra de la abrupta iniciativa de la Corte de Comisionados del Condado de Tarrant, controlada por los republicanos, para redistribuir los distritos [https://www.theshorthorn.com/news/tarrant-countys-redistricting-the-result-the-response-and-whats-next/article_75b9a309-8ef3-4bfb-bb51-9d514aa67377.html] y debilitar el poder de voto de los residentes Negros y Latinos.
Esta redistribución de distritos congresionales de mediados de década, propuesta por Abbott, sin nuevos datos del censo ni mandato público, es un acto calculado de manipulación racial, y sus órdenes de marcha provienen directamente de la Casa Blanca [https://www.politico.com/news/2025/07/15/trump-five-seat-pickup-redraw-texas-congressional-map-00454301] , mientras Trump busca dar al Partido Republicano una ventaja descaradamente injusta para mantener la Cámara en las elecciones intermedias del próximo año.
Estamos luchando junto a nuestros aliados de Fair Maps Texas [https://www.fairmapstexas.org/] para difundir la información y defender la representación justa que TODOS los tejanos merecen.
REGÍSTRESE para participar en su Actualización Comunitaria y Ayuntamiento en Zoom HOY a las 6:30 p.m. Central, para aprender cómo puede contraatacar. [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/3C6CLdxnTAK7IgEvUqukgA#/registration]
Orgullosamente patrocinador de un festival de cine impulsado por la comunidad
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/KNON%20film%20festival%202025.jpg]
El Fondo Educativo TOP se enorgullece de apoyar a nuestros amigos de KNON 89.3 FM este domingo 20 de julio por la tarde, cuando la estación de radio comunitaria presente su 5o Festival Anual de Cine GRATUITO en el Teatro Texas de Dallas . ¡Traigan a sus familiares y amigos! El festival comienza a las 12:30 p. m. y presenta cuatro producciones independientes impulsadas por la comunidad.
Compartan el evento de Facebook y el folleto con las películas. [https://www.facebook.com/events/1063703332386417/]
Consigan sus boletos de cine aquí. [https://www.prekindle.com/find-tickets/id/-2853111880177251338;jsessionid=7749E59DDB3F75D8A7F2929AD4DAAD42?0&fbclid=IwY2xjawLl5uhleHRuA2FlbQIxMABicmlkETFNUXBlUGM0ZERMNTAwYnpYAR6QFkwmA-YCwTMDyus-tpW78RKcQICwFkk6FO0LMTCuPPLkL_2hRm0dRZKbsg_aem_TWMSnoGjdUzjT-oFX8ELIA&queueittoken=e_prekindle~q_005ad151-392d-4d9a-b895-4f8c9a662c13~ts_1752762445~ce_true~rt_queue~h_7086b976aa218a040eda8b39f4f386bf89a5ea3b4c7c80d1044c1ef43f04f4e1]
Para más información, contacten a David en dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] .
Consejos de TOP: Asegúrese de que las alertas meteorológicas severas en su teléfono inteligente estén activadas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Small%20-%20Smartphone%20stock.jpeg]
El cambio climático es real, y el clima en Texas puede cambiar en un instante. Por eso es más importante que nunca mantener activas las alertas meteorológicas en tu smartphone. Asegúrate de recibirlas en tu iPhone o Android aquí. [https://www.kens5.com/article/tech/phone-emergency-alerts-turn-on-weather-texas/273-e936c689-8964-4354-85a0-a0d2cab0daab]
Copyright (C) 2025 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved.

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=QxD83HYAlxYGVdXChMta08Lfhj%2FfoB6GWTtRhMm1OskITW0maAaaDzt70caKfvagadvlJS8EqT5psg3RHY8okXIg1M2r9O5wVTNAoMmSitQWhIIKAOpdxh4OXxKo0ktGYixl7WCoMlUGNsk2C3pmPF80H18entEUp%2B9brcyLtgOtqnBjjUqTSkXuOrU%2BECPlqs0i6l%2Fr3uMxB9DjYNtD2zSEfps9atrGBZLyui93at0N1CgQEcSBf4BYWBofEVy0YywrSLUQ%2FMSNZpdspoJpAK72sCi4k9H%2B%2Bwz14HMgxWh1ckBT1Zw3NWDofZtP99REii%2BzbwaDMFr3eB%2FUCm3Zr3hwyJLm8gqe3vq9RmsPBXNYZ2uqRbLZuLrpmyujztw40nphsaDhfRjZ0E9gMomZH5hQqRLqx7etQ978AfaoLYM%3D .

Esta redistribución de distritos congresionales de mediados de década, propuesta por Abbott, sin nuevos datos del censo ni mandato público, es un acto calculado de manipulación racial, y sus órdenes de marcha provienen directamente de la Casa Blanca [] , mientras Trump busca dar al Partido Republicano una ventaja descaradamente injusta para mantener la Cámara en las elecciones intermedias del próximo año. Estamos luchando junto a nuestros aliados de Fair Maps Texas [] para difundir la información y defender la representación justa que TODOS los tejanos merecen. REGÍSTRESE para participar en su Actualización Comunitaria y Ayuntamiento en Zoom HOY a las 6:30 p.m. Central, para aprender cómo puede contraatacar. [] Orgullosamente patrocinador de un festival de cine impulsado por la comunidad [] El Fondo Educativo TOP se enorgullece de apoyar a nuestros amigos de KNON 89.3 FM este domingo 20 de julio por la tarde, cuando la estación de radio comunitaria presente su 5o Festival Anual de Cine GRATUITO en el Teatro Texas de Dallas . ¡Traigan a sus familiares y amigos! El festival comienza a las 12:30 p. m. y presenta cuatro producciones independientes impulsadas por la comunidad. Compartan el evento de Facebook y el folleto con las películas. [] Consigan sus boletos de cine aquí. [] Para más información, contacten a David en dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] . Consejos de TOP: Asegúrese de que las alertas meteorológicas severas en su teléfono inteligente estén activadas [] El cambio climático es real, y el clima en Texas puede cambiar en un instante. Por eso es más importante que nunca mantener activas las alertas meteorológicas en tu smartphone. Asegúrate de recibirlas en tu iPhone o Android aquí. [] Copyright (C) 2025 Texas Organizing Project. name: Sarah Kline
subject: Peter, take a stand for public lands!
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/gmTs4fpcPESmTZkJ8gw6EA2?contactdata=mAtM3xB4yTIOdmfIqsIDN9U6bIbyRjIvO8Dgj9EdP1Qe+kwyTq4h2OCjXBasaYAKxNOUAJs+tCFndsc0uxEXW/z0ivazkiJiI+hlNBi3PDz7AFik/w8TQtGnB1agMBgp [https://secure.everyaction.com/gmTs4fpcPESmTZkJ8gw6EA2?contactdata=mAtM3xB4yTIOdmfIqsIDN9U6bIbyRjIvO8Dgj9EdP1Qe+kwyTq4h2OCjXBasaYAKxNOUAJs+tCFndsc0uxEXW/z0ivazkiJiI+hlNBi3PDz7AFik/w8TQtGnB1agMBgp]
Hi Peter,
Although we’ve had recent wins for our public lands, such as the removal of the proposal to put 250 million acres of public lands up for sale from the Reconciliation bill, we’re still seeing unprecedented assaults on our public lands by the Trump Administration. The fight is not over yet, so we need to continue putting on the pressure to show our legislators how much we care about our public lands. Will you take a second to sign our petition and take a stand for public lands? [https://secure.everyaction.com/gmTs4fpcPESmTZkJ8gw6EA2]
Sign our petition [https://secure.everyaction.com/gmTs4fpcPESmTZkJ8gw6EA2?contactdata=mAtM3xB4yTIOdmfIqsIDN9U6bIbyRjIvO8Dgj9EdP1Qe+kwyTq4h2OCjXBasaYAKxNOUAJs+tCFndsc0uxEXW/z0ivazkiJiI+hlNBi3PDz7AFik/w8TQtGnB1agMBgp]
In the past few months we’ve seen lay-offs of essential staff who care for our public lands, funding stripped away, public lands opened up for extraction, and even the proposal to sell them off to Trump’s billionaire donors and big corporations. These public lands are special, and they belong to us.
As an OLCV member, you know just how important these lands are. That’s why so many of you shared your public lands story [https://secure.everyaction.com/DY1lYLtZ7Uaw8M0gzn9eKg2] with us. This is Patricia Armstrong’s story:
“At 78 I have had a lifetime of visiting National Forests. They have shaped my love of nature, and the deep realization that it is our national duty to protect them. They are ours. I grieve over the loss of any of these special places. They can not be replicated. Once they are gone they are gone.”
Sign our petition [https://secure.everyaction.com/gmTs4fpcPESmTZkJ8gw6EA2?contactdata=mAtM3xB4yTIOdmfIqsIDN9U6bIbyRjIvO8Dgj9EdP1Qe+kwyTq4h2OCjXBasaYAKxNOUAJs+tCFndsc0uxEXW/z0ivazkiJiI+hlNBi3PDz7AFik/w8TQtGnB1agMBgp]
It’s up to us to show our lawmakers how much we value our public lands. We’ve succeeded before, so we know we can do it again. Take a stand for our public lands now and put the pressure on by signing our petition! [https://secure.everyaction.com/gmTs4fpcPESmTZkJ8gw6EA2]
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

President Donald Trump **[invited a heartbroken angel mom to the podium](https://substack.com/redirect/b41a26af-646e-4884-8219-0deded66812c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during his signing of the "Stop Fentanyl Act," Wednesday. What she said next after taking the mic will give you chills.
"I'm turning my pain into passion," the angel mom told Trump.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b41a26af-646e-4884-8219-0deded66812c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b41a26af-646e-4884-8219-0deded66812c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"10 years ago, when your daughter, Victoria, she was 18, passed away from a drug overdose, we formed the Victoria's voice foundation,... We're so honored, our family loves you," the angel mom told President Trump, struggling to fight back tears through her short speech.
The mother told Trump and the press at the briefing that her heartbreaking experience has turned her "into a fighter" and announced that her organization named after her deceased daughter will be merging with Founding Fathers to form "The Angel Army" to continue to bring awareness to the drug crisis across America.
**["Everyone knows someone who has been touched by the incredible crisis](https://substack.com/redirect/b41a26af-646e-4884-8219-0deded66812c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that we've all been watching,... they come here, the cartels, and rip us so badly, because we're sort of a rich country, that's where the money is," Trump told the press, speaking from the heart about the fentanyl crisis.
Watch the incredible MAGA moment here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b41a26af-646e-4884-8219-0deded66812c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Joe Rogan reveals what changed his mind about interviewing Trump
Joe Rogan says **[he was initially hesitant to interview Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/2d369825-51c6-4070-8892-b48b12f6b1ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** but changed his mind due to aggressive Democrat lawfare against him, including the bookkeeping case where a misdemeanor was charged as 34 felonies despite being past the statute of limitations.
* **The assassination attempt in Pennsylvania and media bias against Trump were major factors** that persuaded Rogan to conduct the interview, with Rogan feeling there were no "real conversations" treating Trump "like a human being" and that everything was being taken out of context.
* **Rogan believed he needed to provide a fair platform** for Trump to express his plans and positions to the American people, arguing that the "best people should have this opportunity" to communicate their vision so voters can make informed decisions in line with American democratic principles.

Have you seen Joe Rogan's unorthodox interview with Trump just before the election? **[This cemented Trump's victory, check it out:](https://substack.com/redirect/4c21d30c-0d0e-4dac-86dc-9aa7da0930f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4c21d30c-0d0e-4dac-86dc-9aa7da0930f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Mamdani exposes himself as privileged brat, says mommy & daddy would support him if he ran out of money
Socialist mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani faced online backlash after a video clip surfaced where he explained taking time off work knowing "if I ran out of my savings my family would be able to support me."
### Must Watch:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9751189a-6ef6-4cfb-b54d-ac24e248930f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* "I worked until January, and then I took time away from my job and one of the major reasons I could do that was because I knew that if I ran out of my savings my family would be able to support me," **[Mamdani said in the clip.](https://substack.com/redirect/7f08d646-92ae-4f63-8b6a-a578e78cacd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

* **Socialist Hypocrisy Accusations:** Conservative critics on social media pointed to the irony of a socialist candidate relying on family wealth while promoting policies that would raise taxes on the wealthy, with one columnist noting "This guy is very comfortable with other people's money." Fox News contributor Katie Pavlich referenced Margaret Thatcher's famous quote about socialism running out of "other people's money."
* **"Silver Spoon" Criticism:** Mamdani has previously faced criticism from opponent Mayor Eric Adams for his wealthy upbringing, with critics calling him "privileged" and suggesting his comfort with family financial support reflects how he'd handle taxpayer funds. Former CIA officer Bryan Dean Wright posted "Classic Socialism: Once I blow through my money, I'll take yours."
* **Political Context:** Despite the controversy, Mamdani won New York City's Democratic mayoral primary last month and has found success with working-class voters by campaigning on housing affordability and taxpayer-subsidized programs. He will face former Governor Andrew Cuomo and Mayor Eric Adams in the November general election.

* * *
# FIRST DOGE package passes: NPR, PBS, USAID lose major funds
**[Senate Republicans passed a $9 billion spending rollback](https://substack.com/redirect/39ce4b30-0ff4-4aa7-b7cb-dd232c7074b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **Thursday, targeting foreign aid and public broadcasting in a rare rescissions package that hasn't cleared the chamber in over 20 years.
* **The House must approve it by Friday** to meet a 45-day deadline.
* **The measure claws back about $8 billion** from USAID and $1 billion from the Corporation for Public Broadcasting, which funds NPR and PBS. The bill passed without Democratic support, with Sens. Lisa Murkowski (R-Alaska) and Susan Collins (R-Maine) joining Democrats in opposition.
* **Sen. J.D. Vance (R-Ohio) cast tie-breaking votes** to move the package forward, while GOP leaders amended the bill to preserve funding for AIDS relief, maternal health, and rural news stations to secure support within their ranks.
* **Democrats criticized the process as partisan** and warned of looming budget clashes, with Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer accusing Republicans of skirting bipartisan norms ahead of potential shutdown battles in September."

Mamdani exposes himself as privileged brat, says mommy & daddy would support him if he ran out of money Socialist mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani faced online backlash after a video clip surfaced where he explained taking time off work knowing "if I ran out of my savings my family would be able to support me." Must Watch: "I worked until January, and then I took time away from my job and one of the major reasons I could do that was because I knew that if I ran out of my savings my family would be able to support me," Socialist Hypocrisy Accusations: Conservative critics on social media pointed to the irony of a socialist candidate relying on family wealth while promoting policies that would raise taxes on the wealthy, with one columnist noting "This guy is very comfortable with other people's money." Fox News contributor Katie Pavlich referenced Margaret Thatcher's famous quote about socialism running out of "other people's money." Political Context: Despite the controversy, Mamdani won New York City's Democratic mayoral primary last month and has found success with working-class voters by campaigning on housing affordability and taxpayer-subsidized programs. FIRST DOGE package passes: NPR, PBS, USAID lose major funds Thursday, targeting foreign aid and public broadcasting in a rare rescissions package that hasn't cleared the chamber in over 20 years. The House must approve it by Friday to meet a 45-day deadline. The measure claws back about $8 billion from USAID and $1 billion from the Corporation for Public Broadcasting, which funds NPR and PBS. The bill passed without Democratic support, with Sens. Lisa Murkowski (R-Alaska) and Susan Collins (R-Maine) joining Democrats in opposition. Sen. J.D. Vance (R-Ohio) cast tie-breaking votes to move the package forward, while GOP leaders amended the bill to preserve funding for AIDS relief, maternal health, and rural news stations to secure support within their ranks. I needed to share this update with you directly, Derek:**A wealthy Republican businessman just filed paperwork to run against me. **
With the GOP in control of the White House, the Senate, and the House, it's absolutely critical for Democrats to hold on to every seat possible – _including mine in PA-06_ – to more effectively push back against the reckless and dangerous actions of this administration.

**We can't wait until next year to take action, Derek. Building a strong grassroots movement must start now so we're prepared as we head into another election year in 2026. That's why I'm personally asking:**

Since day one, my priority has always been to use my voice and vote to help our community. This is just some of my recent work in Congress:
* I just started the BIOTech Caucus, building on the release of the National Security Commission on Emerging Biotechnology’s recent report to Congress, to raise awareness of the strength of other countries (like China) and to promote solutions that foster domestic innovation and improve our national security. More on that in an upcoming newsletter.

* As co-chair of the Climate Solutions Caucus, I fought against elimination of the EV and other clean energy tax credits in the Republican budget bill and am working on the upcoming Farm Bill to support local farmers while also promoting conservation.

* I continue to push paid family leave policies at the federal level, most recently introducing the More Paid Leave for More Americans Act to take advantage of the patchwork of successful state-level programs across the country.

* I wrote the Public Service Loan Forgiveness Payment Completion Fairness Act to make it easier for people in public service careers to have their student loans forgiven.

**Every day, I'm working hard to build relationships with colleagues to deliver on issues that matter most to you and your family, from making health care more affordable and accessible to enabling economic growth._But I can't continue this work without your critical grassroots support, Derek. _**
**[Will you chip in right away so we can keep this seat in 2026, flip the House blue, and defend our communities against Trump and the GOP's extremist agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111643023/557911387/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1154-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzQ1NzhjYS0xZTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8jZ9K8kaFRgTs9wvd4YwrtVw6oZgUjKeHsaV3UvOu_0=)**

name: Steve Simon
subject: What happens next is up to us
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111643523/557912973/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjhiNWEyMWItMWY2My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BwnYPMkh7Upbp5R15UWH2bmUpExAZ9wOXVDWD1T032k=) | Now, more than ever, I can’t stop thinking about what democracy means and how fragile it is. **Recently, we saw a federal appeals court undermine one of our most powerful civil rights laws: the Voting Rights Act.** They ruled that only the federal government, not private citizens, can sue to stop voter discrimination. **But here’s the truth: Some of the most important voting rights cases in history came from ordinary people** —community leaders, grassroots organizers, neighbors standing up for each other. **If this ruling stands, that could be lost.** The Native American tribes challenging this decision are preparing to take it to the Supreme Court. If they do, we need to be ready. **[This isn’t just about the law, it’s about our values, our history, and our future. body:
| | | | |

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T189b6fc9-d6b3-4b96-a22e-81260d137020/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, Donald Trump – our first CONVICTED FELON to serve as president – got away with even more crimes committed while trying to overturn Joe Biden’s 100% valid election. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3609471-898e-481e-986b-ab46dc65944f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We NEED to know if you think that Trump deserves to be impeached for his criminal behavior. Can you respond below and let us know? Should Donald Trump be impeached? [[YES, absolutely!]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ea9349c-c755-416e-b756-88ddee4012db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [[NO]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0844b712-f8f8-4c8a-bc82-d0abec0af272/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) During his first term, Donald Trump was almost removed from office TWICE – but the GOP managed to block both attempts. If Democrats can take back control of the House and Senate, we can get the power to remove Trump from office once and for all. But we want to know if you think that Democrats should make impeachment a priority. Can you answer this one question poll and let us know your thoughts? Should Donald Trump be impeached? [[YES, absolutely!]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T305838d1-3f30-44af-8023-c841264edeb6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [[NO]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b76417e-7b7a-44d9-9ba4-e29df8e0ae16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your response! – Blue Amp Action

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21fbb901-6c78-4ef2-8f76-892355b8e1fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team Freedom VA
subject: It’s Been One Month Since the Primary!
body:
With so much going on, it’s almost hard to believe that it’s been one month since Virginia’s primary election!
| | |
---
| |
---
| Friends-
With so much going on, it's almost hard to believe that it's been one month since Virginia's primary election! We'd like to remind everyone of our endorsed candidates as we inch closer to the November general election:
Statewide:
* Governor: Fmr. Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger
* Lieutenant Governor: Senator Ghazala Hashmi
* Attorney General: Fmr. Delegate Jay Jones

Find our full list of endorsed House of Delegates candidates below:
---
| | [See Our Full List of Endorsed Candidates](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pydrp0UEKQXPTGLi4s2VKDx5-_iDv5PTvLcx47XAyUz066Np5tIoK6mNDEn7tGueRRIhk3wruEJ7PVpRW6zXIEPMCIRPuxpT99U5yfdjPYOAh93qABQGz5S7eZpVLku5B37YVbMtM6ejCMSf4U_qp3zwtY3Bge5XEC8tU4hSrIjeeVLgeYydRg==&c=jqpkX2WcfDQUAOlIHq9e2PejyzCZSeXU9d45xtAwVdnuULPpu-Ufpw==&ch=XM4tBa2HTR9wMfbQco1O2vODEn_vRMJhjkKOJ8z0tabvQn9sjsCVww==)
---
| There's so much to do before November's election: make sure you're [registered to vote](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pydrp0UEKQXPTGLi4s2VKDx5-_iDv5PTvLcx47XAyUz066Np5tIoK6mNDEn7tGueF-NCpB2vdi70MDwVm0C1VrtZJye1XvqL6yEblOGkzrLF6vWpDd4S1OY9OFFZi-ML6pXb0zaAwJGcPGVGmmkjvURjH21bdJIbzlPZ6CMY-CALkSiLjqByx_qRqX9kHPnX7rgyvW-_D4oso3XTvl1AUw==&c=jqpkX2WcfDQUAOlIHq9e2PejyzCZSeXU9d45xtAwVdnuULPpu-Ufpw==&ch=XM4tBa2HTR9wMfbQco1O2vODEn_vRMJhjkKOJ8z0tabvQn9sjsCVww==), [research candidates](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pydrp0UEKQXPTGLi4s2VKDx5-_iDv5PTvLcx47XAyUz066Np5tIoK6mNDEn7tGueRYCxNUpg-A2iwx0IPfQdb7SK8HltLIcIxAaPwb2qMCZv5v0UToIuymgPVUC62PMgqdE9qaD_9KaXSWRCXmSZDjSEnYs2wEBavWCjBTVUYn8n7SBam-t9oXVyU6w56m5_5eLCBzGM0hA54J-5kmx5e2spll6h8J4S&c=jqpkX2WcfDQUAOlIHq9e2PejyzCZSeXU9d45xtAwVdnuULPpu-Ufpw==&ch=XM4tBa2HTR9wMfbQco1O2vODEn_vRMJhjkKOJ8z0tabvQn9sjsCVww==), and spread the word by supporting candidates on social media. name: Adam Schiff
subject: My new legislation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8780%2E5257348%2ExcI5Jb)
Derek, I just introduced the _Bringing Executive Accountability, Clarity, and Oversight Now (BEACON) Act_ to add an inspector general to the Executive Office of the President. Because there must be accountability and oversight over the executive branch — especially with this White House. Derek, inspectors general conduct important independent oversight throughout different agencies in the executive branch. But the same is not true when it comes to the President and the White House — where there is no inspector general... yet. I'm working to change that. **My new bill would create an IG overseeing the Executive Office of the President and crack down on corruption in the Oval Office and beyond.** [**If you support my efforts to add accountability to the White House, add your name in support of the _BEACON Act_ today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202507-beacon-act.kAykeR&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250717_AM1_V1_S1&%3Bemail=&t=4&akid=8780%2E5257348%2ExcI5Jb) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202507-beacon-act.kAykeR&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250717_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8780%2E5257348%2ExcI5Jb)

Adam

body:

**🔵 Sherrill 47%**
**🔴 Ciattarelli 42%**
_Undecided/Other 11%_
—KA Consulting Survey of Registered New Jersey Voters
The same poll also found that when people hear the lies that Ciattarelli is spreading about Mikie’s record, undecided voters break _heavily_ in Ciattarelli’s direction — in fact, he pulls _ahead_ of Mikie in the contest.

name: Bryan
subject: 🚨Breaking Elections News
body:
Today, the Wisconsin Elections Commission a 'scathing report' outlining otential violations of state law by the former Madison City Clerk.

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=fff985c438&e=e907534017)
| | | | | _Breaking Wisconsin Election News_
---
| | | | | Today, the Wisconsin Elections Commission will vote on a scathing report outlining the failures and _****_ potential [_**violations of state law**_](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=22bf026d07&e=e907534017) by the former Madison City Clerk.
According to the report, the former City Clerk not only failed to count nearly [**200 ballots**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=cd14c2b0f3&e=e907534017) in the 2024 election but also took a [**month-long vacation**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=e53ff57fac&e=e907534017) after allegedly being informed there were uncounted ballots.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5460a4b9b4&e=e907534017)
| The draft report outlines [**repeated failures**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=883359a42b&e=e907534017) by the Clerk to keep election staging areas secure—including one instance where an unauthorized individual was found sleeping in a former brewery used for election preparation.
Additionally, the WEC report alleges [**probable cause**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=214cb5d2e5&e=e907534017) that the Clerk violated state law, including laws governing the **handling** **and processing of absentee ballots.**
If true, these failures are absolutely unacceptable.
---
| [STAND FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=40552378d8&e=e907534017)
---
| In Congress, I am working to secure our elections. Whether it is preventing non-citizen voting, ensuring secure campaign finance operations, or **investigating ballot counting delays.** I will always fight for security, trust, and faith in our elections.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=52b9e86887&e=e907534017)
| _I believe that it should be easy to vote and hard to cheat._
While I am out fighting for free and fair elections, the Left is out undermining my work, including fighting against my work to ensure that only U.S. citizens vote in our elections!
With the 2026 election coming up fast and control of the U.S. House on the line, the Left is already mobilizing their national dark money donor network.
They’ll spend millions attacking my conservative record. Last cycle they spent more than **$4.4 million** against us, and with Trump in the White House, we know they’ll do so again.
But I am running for reelection, and with your help, we will win.
---
| [JOIN OUR TEAM](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=10a6c2f8da&e=e907534017)
---
| [_**Will you stand with me and fight back by donating $15, $25, or $50 today?**_](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=0fca95431b&e=e907534017)
Together we can fight back and bring integrity back to politics.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [DONATE $15](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=89ad8b6095&e=e907534017)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=9b8bf6b601&e=e907534017)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=56a88092e4&e=e907534017)
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
|
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/steilforwisconsin/712protectthehouse-14051116?e=e907534017)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * PO Box 103 * Oak Creek, WI 53154-8618 * USA

According to the report, the former City Clerk not only failed to count nearly in the 2024 election but also took a after allegedly being informed there were uncounted ballots. | The draft report outlines by the Clerk to keep election staging areas secure—including one instance where an unauthorized individual was found sleeping in a former brewery used for election preparation. Additionally, the WEC report alleges that the Clerk violated state law, including laws governing the handling and processing of absentee ballots. If true, these failures are absolutely unacceptable. | | In Congress, I am working to secure our elections. Whether it is preventing non-citizen voting, ensuring secure campaign finance operations, or investigating ballot counting delays. I will always fight for security, trust, and faith in our elections. | I believe that it should be easy to vote and hard to cheat. While I am out fighting for free and fair elections, the Left is out undermining my work, including fighting against my work to ensure that only U.S. citizens vote in our elections! With the 2026 election coming up fast and control of the U.S. House on the line, the Left is already mobilizing their national dark money donor network. They’ll spend millions attacking my conservative record. Last cycle they spent more than $4.4 million against us, and with Trump in the White House, we know they’ll do so again. But I am running for reelection, and with your help, we will win. | | Together we can fight back and bring integrity back to politics. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | On Wisconsin, Bryan Steil | | | | | Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. | | **FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS:** **DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID** _**Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?**_
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21644/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/4b93dd56a47665ad601bbc1b5b16473f2938bab7)
---
**Former CIA Director stunned listeners with a stern warning...** An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._ In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21644/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/4b93dd56a47665ad601bbc1b5b16473f2938bab7). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **FOX & FRIENDS FEATURES BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21644/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/4b93dd56a47665ad601bbc1b5b16473f2938bab7)
---
Fox & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators.**_ Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21644/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/4b93dd56a47665ad601bbc1b5b16473f2938bab7) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21644/6374453/95f25026327426bc03950c4fcfa3477aaba0359c/4b93dd56a47665ad601bbc1b5b16473f2938bab7)[**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21644/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/4b93dd56a47665ad601bbc1b5b16473f2938bab7)
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21644/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/4b93dd56a47665ad601bbc1b5b16473f2938bab7)
---
**YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2500X** The Patriot Power Generator 2500X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. With this NEW Patriot Power Generator 2500X... You get MORE power... You get FASTER recharging... And it can even power your FRIDGE! It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2500X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The [**Patriot Power Generator 2500X**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21644/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/4b93dd56a47665ad601bbc1b5b16473f2938bab7) is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,500 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight. Plug in the solar panel. Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun! Amazingly, it takes just 90 minutes to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. **ORDER TODAY AND GET 15 FREE GIFTS WORTH $1,391.70!**

**Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use.
