| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvamZiZW50aXZlZ25hL3AvZHJvcHBpbmctdGhlLWVwc3RlaW4tY2FzZS1tYXktYmU_.qbOI5czOycBkVINsCu9J4AZnlsFfcyADMUc4TDYYlt4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/dropping-the-epstein-case-may-be?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

July 17, 2025
In a political pirouette for the ages, the Trump administration has concluded the Epstein affair was a nothing-burger with the [President stating](https://substack.com/redirect/c16e50a4-5251-415f-945d-9af8b983c09d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
"I don't understand why the Jeffrey Epstein case would be of interest to anybody. It's pretty boring stuff. It's sordid, but it's boring, and I don't understand why it keeps going."
Really? Powerful multimillionaire and billionaire men flying to a Caribbean Island and committing statutory rape on girls as young as fifteen? And never having a single one forced to legally account for this behavior?
[He further added:](https://substack.com/redirect/c16e50a4-5251-415f-945d-9af8b983c09d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "I would say these files were made up by [former FBI Director James] Comey and Obama, made up by Biden and we went through years of that with the Russia, Russia, Russia hoax."

Never mind the prosecution of Epstein occurred during Trump's first term, when Obama, Comey and Biden were nowhere to be found.

MAGA firebrands Attorney General Pam Bondi, FBI Director Kash Patel and FBI Deputy Director Dan Bongino have been reduced to simpering wimps.

When Pam Bondi [was asked](https://substack.com/redirect/a77b23fe-0c88-43bb-9bf3-6b805978753f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the client list [men who alleged were serviced by Epstein's girls] on Fox News, she stated "It's sitting on my desk right now to review." Did the dog eat the list?

What's going on here?

If this is a nothing-burger, why is Ghislaine Maxwell, Epstein's paramour - who recruited the girls to service powerful men on Epstein's Virgin Island retreat - serving a twenty-year sentence for sex trafficking?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c2454dd9-c298-479d-a151-2148fb254b93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell

Why are the judges overseeing this case refusing to list the men involved and not questioning why they weren't prosecuted too? Was their crime less heinous than Maxwell's? Is this justice?

Why did JPMorgan agree to pay the more than one hundred abused women a total of $290 million dollars? Epstein was their client but there was no evidence that JPMorgan financed sex trafficking. Investment banks are not in the habit of handing out this kind of cash. Was this a clever way for powerful men to pay off these women without their names being disclosed?
The party line is Epstein committed suicide. But Epstein did so by hanging himself from a bed sheet attached to a bed post only five feet tall. This is very difficult to do. Furthermore, the two cameras watching him were magically turned off and the two prison guards assigned to guard him were "on break."
Reasonable people can be skeptical. But think about this. To murder Epstein and not leave a trace would have required multiple threats and bribes.
Could those charged with exposing these powerful men have received emails saying, "We know where you live and where your kids live. Look at what happened to Epstein."

Would any judge, prosecutor or cabinet secretary in his or her right mind release the client list after seeing what happened to Epstein? These public servants are not wealthy enough to hire bodyguards to protect themselves and their families.
Liberals are quick to point out that Trump may have been involved with Epstein's girls too and his loyal staff is just protecting him. In fact, Elon Musk stated this may be the case.

But in an attempt to keep Trump out of the White House, our ruling class invaded his house with armed men with orders to "use deadly force if necessary" because of a silly disagreement over classified documents. They convicted him of thirty-four felonies for using clever bookkeeping to cover up his alleged tryst with a porn star. They convicted him of sexual abuse for an incident that supposedly occurred over thirty years ago without a scintilla of objective evidence. They rendered a judgement against him for almost a billion dollars for inflating his assets even though the banks that used those assets for collateral to lend him money didn't lose a nickel. They arrested him and subjected him to a humiliating mug shot. They even tried to keep him off the ballot until the Supreme Court in a 9-0 ruling (Yes. Ketanji Brown Jackson too) said this was legal nonsense.

If there was video or strong objective evidence that Trump was involved with Epstein's girls, wouldn't exposing this have been the best way to bring him down?

The overwhelming odds is Trump was not involved. But he did survive two assassination attempts, one in which if he had not turned his head in the last second, he would have been dead.

Perhaps the President - seeing his life flash before his eyes - concluded that discretion is the better part of valor, especially since he has children and grandchildren. And there was little to be gained but a lot to lose by exposing these powerful men.

But one thing is almost certain: The truth will never come out. The MAGA base may be irritated, but they'll get over it. Trump is delivering on all his other promises. And the powerful men who abused these women will sleep like babies.

| | | | | **ICYMI: Karrin Taylor Robson Joins RealClearPolitics Podcast** _KTR discussed her plan to Make Arizona Strong Again_
---
| **PHOENIX, AZ** — Karrin Taylor Robson, conservative business executive and Trump-endorsed candidate for Governor of Arizona, recently joined Tom Bevan on the RealClearPolitics Podcast to discuss her campaign for Governor and her plan to Make Arizona Strong Again.
In a wide-ranging interview, Karrin highlighted the contrast between her proven, private-sector leadership and Governor Katie Hobbs’ record of incompetence, corruption, and ineffectiveness. She discussed her priorities as Governor — from keeping the border secure and restoring public safety to fixing the housing crisis and strengthening education — and explained why President Trump gave her his complete and total endorsement to lead Arizona.
Listen to the full episode here: [https://youtu.be/3IYFeobRCTM](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=482da052b4&e=ebfb0fda52)

Peter, This week, Derrick Van Orden made a truly shameful move. After backing a MAGA budget that would gut Medicaid and threaten access to hospital care across Wisconsin, **Van Orden is now scrambling to claim credit for the very programs he tried to defund.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111654446/557947806/-2083379535?refcode=em-7.17.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTA3YmNjMi0zMDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLlnyfu4NgkyAOHLed6fw0hZVKfHjHp_-Z7rTE-zRko=) Here’s what happened:
* **First:** Van Orden cheered Trump’s budget cuts that would’ve cost Wisconsin hospitals over $1 billion in funding.
*
* **Now:** he’s lying to voters, hoping to re-write his record onto the right side of history.

We’re not going to let him gaslight us, and we’re sure as hell not going to let him off the hook for this shameful disinformation. This race is winnable. But we need the resources to counter his lies and win over every voter in WI-03. If you believe WI-03 deserves someone who will actually fight for our hospitals and the people they serve, not MAGA photo ops and political theater, now’s the time to step up. clean_body: | Peter, This week, Derrick Van Orden made a truly shameful move. After backing a MAGA budget that would gut Medicaid and threaten access to hospital care across Wisconsin, Van Orden is now scrambling to claim credit for the very programs he tried to defund. = Here’s what happened: First: Van Orden cheered Trump’s budget cuts that would’ve cost Wisconsin hospitals over $1 billion in funding. Now: he’s lying to voters, hoping to re-write his record onto the right side of history. We’re not going to let him gaslight us, and we’re sure as hell not going to let him off the hook for this shameful disinformation. This race is winnable. But we need the resources to counter his lies and win over every voter in WI-03. If you believe WI-03 deserves someone who will actually fight for our hospitals and the people they serve, not MAGA photo ops and political theater, now’s the time to step up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for standing with us. We're fighting for essential access.
Hi Peter—I wanted to make sure you saw this critical update from Nancy.

[**We're suing the Trump administration on behalf of Maine Family Planning, the state's largest network of reproductive health clinics.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111655069/557949919/1268344831?sourceid=1150806&utm_campaign=26emaus-0702aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk2ZDcxZC0zMjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNwf_Yxrx-6LUBZ0rZa7WYnhjeGZol-QpaVv1N4tACk=&emci=2296d71d-3263-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2796d71d-3263-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

Trump's so-called "big beautiful bill" will make it harder for everyone, everywhere, to get health care, _and we're fighting back._ Patients rely on these clinics for low-cost birth control, cancer screenings, and other critical reproductive health services.

[**Your support makes this case possible.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111655070/557949920/1268344831?sourceid=1150806&utm_campaign=26emaus-0702aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk2ZDcxZC0zMjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNwf_Yxrx-6LUBZ0rZa7WYnhjeGZol-QpaVv1N4tACk=&emci=2296d71d-3263-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2796d71d-3263-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

Tyler Kalogeros-Treschuk

Trump said he'd leave abortion to the states—but now his government is trying to force clinics to close even in states where abortion and other reproductive care are legally protected. Today, the Center for Reproductive Rights filed a lawsuit to block the cruel and dangerous new federal law that strips Medicaid funding from reproductive health providers.

[**We brought this case on behalf of Maine Family Planning, the state's largest network of reproductive health clinics.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111655075/557949925/1268344831?sourceid=1150806&utm_campaign=26emaus-0702aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk2ZDcxZC0zMjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNwf_Yxrx-6LUBZ0rZa7WYnhjeGZol-QpaVv1N4tACk=&emci=2296d71d-3263-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2796d71d-3263-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) The Trump administration is targeting essential, legal care and threatening to shut down clinics that thousands of Mainers rely on. [**Your donations will have an immediate impact on our litigation.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111655076/557949927/1268344831?sourceid=1150806&utm_campaign=26emaus-0702aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk2ZDcxZC0zMjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNwf_Yxrx-6LUBZ0rZa7WYnhjeGZol-QpaVv1N4tACk=&emci=2296d71d-3263-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2796d71d-3263-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111655077/557949935/1268344831?sourceid=1150806&utm_campaign=26emaus-0702aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk2ZDcxZC0zMjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNwf_Yxrx-6LUBZ0rZa7WYnhjeGZol-QpaVv1N4tACk=&emci=2296d71d-3263-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2796d71d-3263-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
Our lawsuit argues that this law is unconstitutional and we're asking the court to block it so MFP clinics can keep providing essential care. [**Half of MFP's patients rely on Medicaid, and many live in rural areas with no other health care options. MFP has already stopped accepting new Medicaid patients for primary care and may be forced to close up to half its clinics—cutting off care for all patients, regardless of insurance.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111655078/557949941/1268344831?sourceid=1150806&utm_campaign=26emaus-0702aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk2ZDcxZC0zMjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNwf_Yxrx-6LUBZ0rZa7WYnhjeGZol-QpaVv1N4tACk=&emci=2296d71d-3263-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2796d71d-3263-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
> _"Congress and the Trump Administration have taken away patients' freedom to choose their own trusted health care provider and have cut off access to care for thousands of Mainers. It's wrong and counter to our values as Americans and Mainers. Every person should live with dignity and autonomy,"_ said George Hill, president and CEO of Maine Family Planning.

clean_body: We're fighting for essential access. Hi Peter—I wanted to make sure you saw this critical update from Nancy. Trump's so-called "big beautiful bill" will make it harder for everyone, everywhere, to get health care, and we're fighting back. Patients rely on these clinics for low-cost birth control, cancer screenings, and other critical reproductive health services. Thank you for fighting with us, Tyler Kalogeros-Treschuk Senior Director, Individual Giving * From: Nancy Northup <info@reprorights.org> Sent: Wednesday, July 16, 2025 11:27 AM To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Subject: We're suing Trump | | ---|--- | Peter, | "FUND THE FIGHT" Trump said he'd leave abortion to the states—but now his government is trying to force clinics to close even in states where abortion and other reproductive care are legally protected. Today, the Center for Reproductive Rights filed a lawsuit to block the cruel and dangerous new federal law that strips Medicaid funding from reproductive health providers. The Trump administration is targeting essential, legal care and threatening to shut down clinics that thousands of Mainers rely on. Our lawsuit argues that this law is unconstitutional and we're asking the court to block it so MFP clinics can keep providing essential care. "Congress and the Trump Administration have taken away patients' freedom to choose their own trusted health care provider and have cut off access to care for thousands of Mainers. It's wrong and counter to our values as Americans and Mainers. Every person should live with dignity and autonomy," said George Hill, president and CEO of Maine Family Planning. "DONATE NOW" This is just the beginning. If the federal government can defund legal reproductive health care in Maine, no state is safe. In solidarity, Nancy Northup President & CEO "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. © Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

But fear not, President Trump’s border czar, Tom Homan, is planning to come to Portland to shine a spotlight on our state’s broken sanctuary policies and demand accountability. _The media is smearing him. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 7/17/2025
body:
Denver sues to keep federal funds while limiting ICE cooperation
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado’s wolf population is on the rise with [three new packs confirmed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—but ranchers are being kept in the dark as Colorado Parks and Wildlife withholds key details until a commission meeting later this week. Meanwhile in Denver, the city is [suing to keep federal grant money](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) despite refusing cooperation with ICE. And also in Denver, a Christian coffee shop owner is [under fire for his ministry](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—even as he helps homeless residents turn their lives around.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** President Trump is racking up wins as the Senate passes his [$9 billion spending cut package](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), secured with key GOP backing. Meanwhile, the Trump administration is reviewing [over a million documents were signed using Biden’s autopen](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) without full executive review. In a twist, the CEO of Crowds on Demand rejected a [$20 million offer to organize anti-Trump protests](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), citing concerns about violence and credibility.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Cory Gaines says unelected bureaucrats—not lawmakers—are increasingly shaping Colorado policy [behind closed doors and on the public’s dime](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Dr. Brian Joondeph warns Gen Z’s disillusionment is [making socialism seductive](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while Greg Walcher calls out federal mismanagement—not just climate change—for the [Colorado River crisis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, July 17, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Senate backs Trump’s ‘DOGE cuts’ as conservatives target foreign aid, woke grants](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [WASHINGTON EXAMINER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Congress is poised to claw back billions in foreign aid after the Senate narrowly passed $9 billion in DOGE-inspired cuts on Thursday.
In a 51-48 vote, the Senate approved the White House request, known as a rescission bill, all but clearing the way for it to become law. Just two Republicans – Sens. Susan Collins (R-ME) and Lisa Murkowski (R-AK) – joined Democrats in voting “no.”
The request now heads back to the House, which narrowly passed a similar version in June. Thursday’s vote, which came after a marathon voting session that stretched late into the night, is a major victory for President Donald Trump and a 180–degree turn from an unsuccessful rescission request Trump made in his first term.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Denver sues to keep federal funds while limiting ICE cooperation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER7](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Denver is suing the Trump administration in a desperate attempt to hang on to federal funding while refusing to cooperate with federal immigration enforcement—putting politics over public safety.
* The Trump administration’s push to withhold funds from sanctuary cities is part of a broader strategy to restore law and order by holding jurisdictions accountable when they shield illegal immigrants from ICE.
* Denver’s sanctuary stance is under fire as critics argue the city prioritizes illegal immigrants over law-abiding citizens—defying federal authority while still demanding taxpayer dollars.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Gaines: Bureaucrats are making the rules—and you’re paying for it](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado’s growing web of rules and regulations is largely driven by unelected bureaucrats who operate with minimal public oversight—despite technically being under legislative authority.
* Since 2019, the number of adopted and emergency rules has surged, with the Colorado Register revealing hundreds of changes each year—making meaningful citizen input nearly impossible.
* While Democrats have held power in Colorado for years, Gaines argues the legislature’s failure to rein in administrative overreach is due to laziness, not ideology—leaving Coloradans powerless in the face of government creep.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Ganahl: What’s inside the ‘Big Beautiful Bill’—and why it’s a game-changer for families and freedom](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY HEIDI GANAHL****| COMMENTARY | JULY 15** _They’re calling it the “Big Beautiful Bill”—and whether you love it or hate it, it’s the boldest shakeup to our tax and spending system since Trump’s 2017 tax cuts. Officially titled the Tax Relief for American Families and Workers Act, this legislation does a lot: extends the Trump tax cuts, rewrites how safety net programs work, beefs up border and defense spending, and trims down the green energy handouts._
**[Behind closed doors: Leaked memos reveal how Durango 9-R Schools avoided a DEI lawsuit—until now](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | JULY 15** _Durango School District 9-R changed its hiring policy this spring without a public announcement—but the move didn’t go unnoticed. According to a new federal civil rights complaint filed by Mountain States Legal Foundation (MSLF) and authored by its general counsel, William Trachman, the district had for years pushed a race-conscious hiring agenda, encouraged by internal equity committees and shielded by carefully worded legal guidance._ __
**[The COvid Chronicles June 16-23, 2020: Social justice got a platform—police got massive reform](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | JULY 14** _In this ninth chapter of The COvid Chronicles, summer arrived—but sanity didn’t. Looking back at our COVID-19 history is painful. But as Spanish-American philosopher put it, “Those who cannot remember the past are condemned to repeat it."_
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🦬 DID YOU KNOW?** **A cow and bison crossbreed is known as a beefalo.** First developed in the 1970s by California rancher D.C. “Bud” Basolo, this hybrid is now raised in over 35 states, according to the American Beefalo Association. It’s leaner and higher in protein than traditional beef—making it a healthier option, too.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Schools have not necessarily much to do with education... they are mainly institutions of control where certain basic habits must be inculcated in the young. Education is quite different and has little place in school." – Winston Churchill

Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🦬 DID YOU KNOW? A cow and bison crossbreed is known as a beefalo. First developed in the 1970s by California rancher D.C. “Bud” Basolo, this hybrid is now raised in over 35 states, according to the American Beefalo Association. It’s leaner and higher in protein than traditional beef—making it a healthier option, too. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "Schools have not necessarily much to do with education... they are mainly institutions of control where certain basic habits must be inculcated in the young. Education is quite different and has little place in school." – Winston Churchill | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com []()

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- July 17
body:
|

---
Dear friends and neighbors, I am excited to announce our Uterine Fibroid Intervention and Gynecological Health Treatment (U-FIGHT) Act, the companion bill to legislation [Congresswomen](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15450.10335306.5534535.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fwatch%3fv%3d4JW9fAToe30&redir_log=219321497474286) Shontel Brown (Ohio - 11) and Yvette D. Clarke (N.Y. - 09) introduced in the House. The reality is that fibroids affect up to 80% of women at some point in their lives. In addition to the physical pain this condition inflicts on women, it can also lead to complications like infertility. This is not a partisan issue, and frankly, it's not an issue that affects just women. Uterine fibroids affect the whole family, and I believe Congress has an obligation to act. What we know is that only .03% of all research funding is dedicated to fibroid research. That number is stunning given the vast reach and how many Americans it touches. The U-FIGHT Act will:
* Expand access to early screening, detection, and intervention methods for individuals diagnosed with uterine fibroids.
* Direct the Secretary of Health and Human Services to support research on early detection and intervention strategies for uterine fibroids and to develop evidence-based tools for implementation in clinical settings.
* Authorize grant funding for states to establish screening programs, patient navigation services, and public awareness campaigns focused on fibroid detection.
* Prioritize programs in underserved communities and authorize funding for research on disparities in pain management, as well as conditions like Asherman's syndrome and intrauterine adhesions that may arise from fibroid-related surgeries.

I'm also proud to have joined forces with Academy Award-winning actress, producer, and author [Lupita Nyong'o](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15450.10335306.5534535.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1945840274791391316&redir_log=270910820123333) to ensure this long overdue U-FIGHT legislation gets momentum. She's personally battled this illness. "In 2014 at the age of 31, I received my uterine fibroid diagnosis and was offered only two options: invasive surgery to remove them or live with the pain. I envision a different future: one with early education for teenagers, better prevention and screening protocols, robust research, and less invasive treatments for uterine fibroids. But transformation begins with understanding, and understanding requires research. I'm grateful to the bill sponsors for leading the way to that future and am committed to supporting this package of legislation," said Lupita Nyong'o. This legislation is part of a larger legislative package aimed at advancing uterine health initiatives. The truth is, women do it all - constantly under pressure, working tirelessly in our jobs - sometimes working multiple jobs, and all too often our own health goes on the back burner. It's time we ensure the appropriate attention and resources are put behind women's health care, and the U-FIGHT Act is a critical step. **Recissions Bill Vote-a-rama** This week, you might have seen that Republicans have forced another disastrous bill through the Senate. Republicans are determined to ensure working class Americans pay for billionaire tax breaks. Overnight, they doubled down on that sentiment, jamming through a recissions bill to claw back $9 billion in appropriated federal funding. This action will hurt our nation's civil servants, will jeopardize health and safety, and will hurt our farmers. This move also goes to strip funding for public broadcasting that provides critical education and information to all Americans. These are certainly unprecedented times, but I do not believe the callous actions of this Administration are sustainable. I urge you to stay in the fight and continue to speak out against all of these decisions that seek to destroy our democracy and jeopardize the health and well-being of our families. Your voice is the most powerful voice in this nation. Continue to speak out. **Fighting Through Legislation** I continue to work hard to fight for Marylanders. From improving access to health care to ensuring public officials at the highest levels are acting ethically, I wanted to share some of the legislation I cosponsored recently. Strong Communities Act of 2025 This bipartisan bill seeks to strengthen relationships between law enforcement and the communities they serve by incentivizing officers to serve in the communities where they live. Choice Neighborhoods Initiative Act This bill permanently authorizes and expands the Choice Neighborhoods program, which awards grants to redevelop severely distressed affordable housing and revitalize communities. Arctic Refuge Protection Act of 2025 This bill permanently protects the Coastal Plain of the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge--one of the largest, undisturbed ecosystems in the world--from oil and gas development. Stephanie Tubbs Jones Uterine Fibroids Research and Education Act This bipartisan bill would authorize $150 million over five years to expand federal research, strengthen data collection, enhance provider training, and increase public education efforts surrounding uterine fibroids. Uterine Cancer Study Act This bill would direct Health and Human Services, in coordination with the National Institutes of Health and Food and Drug Administration, to conduct a comprehensive study on the potential link between chemical hair straighteners and uterine cancer, including a review of existing research and consideration of impacts on at-risk populations. Ban Congressional Stock Trading Act This bill would prohibit lawmakers from actively trading stocks during their tenure and require lawmakers and their immediate family members to put certain investments into a blind trust. Agricultural Risk Review Act of 2025 This bipartisan bill would formalize the Secretary of Agriculture's role in the Committee on Foreign Investment in the United States and creates procedures for reviewing foreign acquisitions of agricultural land. Honoring Our Fallen Heroes Act of 2025 This bipartisan bill would extend Public Safety Officers' Benefits to first responders who suffer service-related cancers. Nancy Gardner Sewell Medicare Multi-Cancer Early Detection Screening Coverage Act This bipartisan bill would establish a pathway for Medicare to cover FDA-approved multi-cancer early detection tests, complementing existing screenings. Strengthening Protections for Domestic Violence and Stalking Survivors Act This bill seeks to prevent stalkers and abusive dating partners from purchasing or owning firearms. Miracle on Ice Congressional Gold Medal Act This bipartisan bill would award Congressional Gold Medals to the members of the 1980 USA Men's Hockey Team that won the Olympic Gold Medal. Presidential Library Anti-Corruption Act of 2025 This bill would close loopholes that allow presidential libraries to be used as tools for misconduct. Improving Access to Prenatal Care for Military Families Act This bill would authorize the establishment of a pilot program to expand TRICARE Qualifying Life Events (QLE) to include the pregnancy of a covered beneficiary. Background Check Completion Act of 2025 This bill would close the "Charleston loophole" by eliminating the three-business-day exception that allows the sale of a firearm if a background check is not completed within three days. Refund Equality Act of 2025 This bipartisan bill would allow same-sex couples who were legally married before 2013 to retroactively amend their federal tax returns and receive the benefits of filing jointly. Equal Dignity for Married Taxpayers Act of 2025 This bipartisan bill would remove gender-specific references to marriage in the tax code. Black Women's Equal Pay Day Resolution This resolution affirms the significance of equal pay for equal work and calls attention to the enduring wage disparities faced by Black women. **Stay Informed** I know these are difficult times. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or find resources for those who have been laid off at [alsobrooks.senate.gov](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15450.10335306.5534535.7190525&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2falsobrooks.senate.gov&redir_log=983830187668200). You can also follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks
United States Senator

body:
| | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTG6G2yDwxKXYqRhycKs1nhFZTQxl5sHG6BD3tmaNpPWWzhrLCC_IQ6mwsW0ty6iLgcsXSuh4iYj-AZx4-hdq1aCBaQAdwSRHg-O-D8JRV3XFfwa50Ce3gFq20DR9J-_kqKCLq_8t2UHePWdJWSCN2WbBXwpkpyOYcVNieo0IfUep_diwtOtORtekb_tF-YXR2dWKxCrS8OJ2jmHGUJlNIA9RbqYrWy-8vVYye9S3KsB0K91ouPLGBSGH0wHTUE5ahHh9Ebt0ThXN8GfK8ssUdMPQxQHxifLKLts4nw9j1iW0fHM0gJQgLEI2s5AQjzbrWqOOPt6iKUQZEAnLTBsd8Fbk44So4WXlStT2iXTjs27w/4i9/oCEnFwsVTmaGBVodq4u3Ig/h0/h001.kwhmdQNvU0KRzp2nTbJZjcuIOmsWZpmHusWztnn0fEY)
---
I missed you, friend.
Of course I was always with you and fighting for our communities in Carson City, but I haven’t been able to talk to you directly via email like this.
Now that I can, there’s some things I need to get off my chest, but before I do — **[_will you please pitch in whatever you can to NV Dems for the fight ahead?_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTG6G2yDwxKXYqRhycKs1nhFZTQxl5sHG6BD3tmaNpPWWzhrLCC_IQ6mwsW0ty6iLgc3gOKSM14Tc4b_43ekDAY6gY5dk8sGviKOzWv_vPpNrlmr6a3ktXeIvG34iufZhszw625jcTq3gJmMKnX0zAjr2VsWk-220_eA0jtUYChZjFyYbYiiMDjlE_Q-zLBbE_5yFEXfpbzYld4blbViV8rdHxvhzPX_xf-_lqzY9ZvYEtuRZBM6ZkPJv-9I1Yeb6qHsjez1Oj6ZwozaKgmWJ_4ONWOnzsrvUVQ_mP0NNuxWgrXv_KHS3Eg-rQ9Td8sucN7kKL3oG9UGs6th70kN3PImSgxxn_MCnMj8rr10UXlqw/4i9/oCEnFwsVTmaGBVodq4u3Ig/h1/h001.cZ0xETqUSPrsPz7H8zIjC5TjMGrwq4HLMXKmVcO5-pc) **
[Give Now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTG6G2yDwxKXYqRhycKs1nhFZTQxl5sHG6BD3tmaNpPWWzhrLCC_IQ6mwsW0ty6iLgkbNL80Vo9zEIydHL8hJeBpemjzRrzXbnxcnGgawu8F1aOjrDET8QonEFhvIE32BCUrr-KqPXEm5-mPE9tzO7dalLPdeXCRFm7Cedzz2lspKc-ECVuS92TGaH2ZWt8R9Qdd-1aOuwcDtReHWkHf_9hil9ZHw3tH44YSS7BrOJcZDPXi_54bdnVTHglNgHfrqXYorKxXeLW6qIGGNFXYKRdlmyazftqZT5a5_hBc9Z2DlJr0_2WmBwcI9OOTm6D_Vknfl78sFx52GwL8c-xu-Wy-7d2PMUWAY-1XhG5_OYQF0/4i9/oCEnFwsVTmaGBVodq4u3Ig/h2/h001.XpyaNjNfda5ApdRujbK6FJcS7477qGbm_043hQchMys)
---
This isn’t 2023, when I was first elected to serve as chair. My term started with a deficit that the party needed to climb out of and the need to rebuild the team. I am so proud of what we’ve been able to build together, with your support, and now **[_I have to ask for your help again._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTG6G2yDwxKXYqRhycKs1nhFZTQxl5sHG6BD3tmaNpPWWzhrLCC_IQ6mwsW0ty6iLgRhn1gSIIsFeXiDGEbsgBk-W4CkWQvQztFfFNXMwYYVhJSR5xvpylb2HhULJMOJC4fywu0W3cWryZDstPZwHNxxlvZ1uj-rEOzyVSARHdJ9ihkBX4ttLnecSnA3ExSfMx6Otipx6_kA5-Jq_rAUvBIOhJOG40Mflmoj0PpHYTntjKsLCV6Li1RLzg3ou4oGRMhwWBE1UoGM1HwLbB2piQR47lZMz3S-Xn00XULt2EafjVmOlDLqSxotYhw_hcnE5bv1U308qbQHLMpuztkSzKzHcxu-NYyqPiddVxGz8z-dQ/4i9/oCEnFwsVTmaGBVodq4u3Ig/h3/h001.rnVK6r7Hy7hkBYxMSdrgWCzRp29fwnSWS706XmNgTwQ)**
In 2024, despite a nationwide red wave that led to a loss at the presidential level, we were **_the only battleground state that was still able to hold onto our federal delegation and majorities in the state legislature_**. People ask me all the time: how did this happen? How did we make gains down ballot?
[**_It’s not a secret. We invest in year-round organizing and it’s why Nevada always punches above our weight._**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTG6G2yDwxKXYqRhycKs1nhFZTQxl5sHG6BD3tmaNpPWWzhrLCC_IQ6mwsW0ty6iLgMrLXfUo3Rhe2JothU18bscNKE5G-UV8yVGZ1pm62u7Tp6fUwmIaPekj5QdcKRwxE4EcCfeKWpTd5zlkz5aDWAoC_CxD0uqyEHOBQ6w8ZfdEtpehHIJiUqFHH625TOp9Vy0lJq3P39TLBa_12spbxnE35bzBvOrv1PFXxftsdBx5ihdnNgCBoOiqeaYljXjAZsNt-R3mqtuTuggr0yQswxPkG08DAS7T_Joh3SGS7uOIO6BZCyC72r2ffx3-74dWJ5lSNhWBGfjXtg0iWhVOWGqEMpYc0Zh0fcNfisVm62yo/4i9/oCEnFwsVTmaGBVodq4u3Ig/h4/h001.oQEnyUwUIyVi2rDZePgw4wogvEIeuRB0lcixmKa8VHQ)
I always tell the team — we have to be in the community regularly, consistently, not just during an election year begging for votes. I am so proud of the expanded rural and indigenous programming we were able to run last cycle in addition to our regular weekend of service activations getting bigger and bigger!
**Here’s the harsh truth though, .** Our grassroots fundraising has slowed down to a halt since Election Day 2024. I cannot stand the idea of having to scale back our presence across the state but __NV Dems is about to run out of funds by the end of the month.__
I truly believe that Nevada is the best investment for Democrats who want to defend our rights and freedoms. **[_That’s why I am asking you personally, please chip in $3 or any amount towards NV Dems today and power the infrastructure that keeps us battle ready._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTG6G2yDwxKXYqRhycKs1nhFZTQxl5sHG6BD3tmaNpPWWzhrLCC_IQ6mwsW0ty6iLgXLA-OpcVRtNtU6HgsLC1kowNn13hr_GXALW7oEhj5TINH5BYEsbrRJcg9O_V1zR1UgUV8Lz7WkUcVjPwuYQdyYehDJIP778HWnm73jlvWq5eZdvu9dsNhjeegVJJBMUAzxeUILkgh9oQOYrenR76wbmDlyuKuYXxonTU7Nhgw-7AvV0JrM5e4XexqnLjhrXahCkERdAttFIK-1BEg9XdSNo751YKmRNl-yMV7Hm45IpQYIWYjgwzSo2vH8kbi7vun2t9jBx7JjhnXqn4Ee7mxOjRa7k4BojrKPY29OdWLpk/4i9/oCEnFwsVTmaGBVodq4u3Ig/h5/h001.ChCusTI2pSO9ljyk-TfBbVWnrak1Vqhf32drAg3gUaE) **
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | | | | I missed you, friend. Of course I was always with you and fighting for our communities in Carson City, but I haven’t been able to talk to you directly via email like this. Now that I can, there’s some things I need to get off my chest, but before I do — This isn’t 2023, when I was first elected to serve as chair. My term started with a deficit that the party needed to climb out of and the need to rebuild the team. I am so proud of what we’ve been able to build together, with your support, and now In 2024, despite a nationwide red wave that led to a loss at the presidential level, we were the only battleground state that was still able to hold onto our federal delegation and majorities in the state legislature. People ask me all the time: how did this happen? How did we make gains down ballot? I always tell the team — we have to be in the community regularly, consistently, not just during an election year begging for votes. I am so proud of the expanded rural and indigenous programming we were able to run last cycle in addition to our regular weekend of service activations getting bigger and bigger! Here’s the harsh truth though, . Our grassroots fundraising has slowed down to a halt since Election Day 2024. I cannot stand the idea of having to scale back our presence across the state but NV Dems is about to run out of funds by the end of the month. I truly believe that Nevada is the best investment for Democrats who want to defend our rights and freedoms. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|---|--- | | Thanks team, DMM The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: FW: End of the UN Arms Treaty in sight
body:
* * *
Please read the message below from our sponsor, the National Association for Gun Rights.

* * *
|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Dear Fellow Patriot,

The United Nations’ “Small Arms Treaty” has been the Gun Control Lobby’s crown jewel since Barack Obama sent it to the U.S. Senate and insisted we ratify it a decade ago. Year after year, we refused.

_But each and every day, the UN is getting closer to implementing the terms of this dangerous Treaty’s provisions here in the United States even without ratification_.

**And it’s all being done in secret by the UN’s allies in the Washington, D.C. “Swamp.”**

The good news is, with the big changes in Washington due to the 2024 election, you and I have a chance to stop the Gun Control Lobby cold.

But it’s an opportunity that won’t last forever.

That’s why – as Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the message below – **[it’s absolutely critical you and I act now](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=15zlcy5ac60ls8mhx0breoxaqx9ivaix873lmheq7qy15g2w6xvguxtpt48a7u6g19ayxdnztrrgj77pi47ropzyh5372b8msf3m9dn21ujrpnz583e5i3udtfha37ae6tcvrwf9q2bzndv1stric7wtl7wqhvl9gqq7esf6gho6q0iiub2xp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szk1jq&__onlt=h)**!

**Sincerely,

The Hon. Rand Paul
United States Senator (R-KY)**

* * *

Dear Fellow Patriot,

**There is a sword hanging over the head of every American gun owner**.

I’m referring to the UN “Small Arms Treaty” -- the first stage of the UN’s global gun control agenda.

_I’ve stared these global gun banners in the face and told them what they could do with their precious “Small Arms Treaty,” though I knew the UN would NOT like me crashing their “Gun Ban Club” in Geneva_.

**_I told UN bureaucrats you and I will NEVER surrender to their anti-gun schemes!_**

When I told these anti-gun international bureaucrats they were walking in the footsteps of every 20th century murderous dictator who disarmed their citizens to shuffle them off to death camps, I guess my words hit a little “close to home.”

All they could do in response was squirm in their seats and laugh nervously...

But while you or I or even President Trump can tell these gun grabbers what we think of their treaty, only the U.S. Senate can remove the treaty document from the Senate agenda.

**[That’s why I’m counting on you to sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” petition to your U.S. Senators IMMEDIATELY](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=15zlcy5ac60ls8mhx0breoxaqx9ivaix873lmheq7qy15g2w6xvguxtpt48a7u6g19ayxdnztrrgj77pi47ropzyh5372b8msf3m9dn21ujrpnz583e5i3udtfha37ae6tcvrwf9q2bzndv1stric7wtl7wqhvl9gqq7esf6gho6q0iiub2xp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szk1jq&__onlt=h)**.

As you’ll see, this petition insists your Senators act to oppose and reject the UN “Small Arms Treaty” and send it back to the President where it can be formally and finally trashed.

But until they do, the UN “Small Arms Treaty” will remain pending in the Senate, and ratification by a future Senate is all that’s needed for this gun grab to become reality.

_And that’s REGARDLESS of who occupies the White House or their position on the Treaty_!

With this Treaty, the UN’s goal is to DESTROY the legal buying, owning, manufacturing, and selling of pistols, rifles, and shotguns by FORCING: **> > _ALL countries involved in the export of firearms -- including the United States -- to establish a “National Control System_.”** This is nothing more than GUN REGISTRATION, plain and simple -- the first step toward outright GUN CONFISCATION; **> > _ALL firearms manufacturers who seek to export firearms to ask for permission and report on how they believe the guns they sell will be used_.** The UN ultimately wants final say on whether or not any firearms transfer should be allowed. Period. After all, they are fixated on keeping guns out of the hands of the “wrong” people; and **> > _ALL Treaty countries to allow firearms manufacturers to be sued for crimes committed with their products_.** Imagine how outrageous it would be if Ford was sued because an F-150 owner ran a red light and caused a crash! That’s what gun grabbers want to do with firearms because they know this could END gun manufacturing. This is exactly what Mexico is attempting to do in their lawsuit against Smith & Wesson.
**_The UN’s ultimate plan for all civilian-owned guns:_Incinerate them_._**

It’s hard to see how the Second Amendment could survive in the United States were the one-world socialists at the UN to get their way.

Of course, that’s their goal.

_To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand “utopian” designs_.

Meanwhile, enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed, they’re pouring money into the UN “Small Arms Treaty” hand-over-fist.

So, it’s no wonder why they’re hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it!

**[I’m counting on you to help beat the UN by signing your “END THE UN GUN BAN” petition to urge your U.S. Senators to end all support for the UN Gun Ban and send it back to the White House right away](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=15zlcy5ac60ls8mhx0breoxaqx9ivaix873lmheq7qy15g2w6xvguxtpt48a7u6g19ayxdnztrrgj77pi47ropzyh5372b8msf3m9dn21ujrpnz583e5i3udtfha37ae6tcvrwf9q2bzndv1stric7wtl7wqhvl9gqq7esf6gho6q0iiub2xp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szk1jq&__onlt=h)**.

If we don’t dispose of the treaty quickly, the gun grabbers will leap to ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate the moment they have the votes, no matter who the President is or what their stance is on the treaty.

_That’s why we have to mount a massive campaign to send this Treaty back to the President NOW so he can kill the Treaty as promised, before it’s too late_.

The great news is, just doing so puts you and me in a win/win situation.

Either we get the 60 votes we need to finally KILL this Treaty...

... Or anti-gun U.S. Senators will be on record in support of arguably the **WORST anti-gun initiative** to come before either chamber of Congress in decades.

Believe me.

_U.S. Senators who vote to allow international bureaucrats to trample on our gun rights will pay the price at the ballot box_.

Just like they did in 2014 after their all-out push for gun control in the wake of the Newtown tragedy, and in 2016 after Hillary Clinton’s full embrace of every anti-gun policy imaginable, and in **2024 when four anti-gun democrats went down in flames, and four more barely hung on by the skin of their teeth**.

_But if we don’t fight now, it could be the gun grabbers who get the last laugh -- even if it takes them years to regain control of the U.S. Senate_!

After all, gun grabbers have been battling for this scheme since President Bill Clinton’s administration.

_They’re going to do whatever it takes to make their global gun control crown jewel a reality_.

They’re clearly in this for the long haul.

Are you?

**[Click here to sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” Petition and insist the U.S. Senate vote to return the treaty to President Trump so he can send it to the trash where it belongs](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=15zlcy5ac60ls8mhx0breoxaqx9ivaix873lmheq7qy15g2w6xvguxtpt48a7u6g19ayxdnztrrgj77pi47ropzyh5372b8msf3m9dn21ujrpnz583e5i3udtfha37ae6tcvrwf9q2bzndv1stric7wtl7wqhvl9gqq7esf6gho6q0iiub2xp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szk1jq&__onlt=h)**.

Sadly, the UN “Small Arms Treaty” is now only the beginning of the problem.

_Under Joe Biden’s direction, one-world bureaucrats are even now pushing key parts of these gun controls deep into every part of government_.

On top of the Biden ATF’s anti-gun executive actions, a headline from The Hill showed how **“Democrats’ latest backdoor plan to limit gun ownership”** involves new State Department “sanctions” designed to drive the price of ammo up by BANNING imports.

_That’s the same State Department which NAGR caught red-handed restarting the funnel of your tax dollars into funding the UN “Small Arms Treaty_.”

Worse, since day one of the COVID-19 outbreak, our court system has said yes to almost any politician cooking up any unconstitutional idea so long as it’s under the guise of “public health.”

None of us want any more of that.

Still, now the Center for Disease Control (CDC) is pushing a new Euro-centric gun control framework that says _“Using a public health approach is essential to addressing firearm violence and keeping people safe and healthy.”_

_That’s why insisting that your U.S. Senators vote to DISPOSE of the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” is not enough_.

We must insist that the U.S. Senate help President Trump root out anti-gun policies pushed by Joe Biden’s government and ensure that NOT ONE TAXPAYER CENT is spent on implementing any part of this Treaty or what it stands for.

But I’m counting on your help to send that message -- before it’s all swept under the rug by the bureaucrats running for cover.

**[First, please sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” Petition to both of your U.S. Senators at once](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=15zlcy5ac60ls8mhx0breoxaqx9ivaix873lmheq7qy15g2w6xvguxtpt48a7u6g19ayxdnztrrgj77pi47ropzyh5372b8msf3m9dn21ujrpnz583e5i3udtfha37ae6tcvrwf9q2bzndv1stric7wtl7wqhvl9gqq7esf6gho6q0iiub2xp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szk1jq&__onlt=h)**.

Once you have signed your petition, I am counting on your support to help the National Association for Gun Rights: 1) _Contact and mobilize_ up to 10 million pro-Second Amendment Americans using mail, email and phone banks to turn up maximum pressure on the U.S. Senate; 2) _Launch a full-scale online effort_ , including internet ads, op-eds, text messages, and video updates, working highly-trafficked blogs and using social media to generate even more heat to ensure the so-called “Small Arms Treaty” can be returned to the White House where President Trump can finish it off; and 3) _Craft hard-hitting radio_ , newspaper and TV ads, which we’ll be ready to unleash at a moment’s notice if we can raise the resources to fund them. Of course, a program of this scale won’t be cheap.

But as I explained, doing nothing would only play right into the gun grabbers’ hands.

**[So along with your signed petition, could you please consider a generous contribution of $100 TODAY](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=5gjbatamrt0tsj12q5fe69eceh7q0aflsclisgrtilc1tf7ypfjjmj30wu0oz8isvhr06fs1ihiuwfbv9hd7ds5mnuuk8cs8ec6upmxoqbsallttbddwrpw9ky3mp65ip8yij0xzgl44n2ai09bi629kfvva7dqjpjgdmjlkzmh7c8ktkxx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szk1jq&__onlt=h)**?

I know that’s a lot to ask for, believe me.

But the fight to reclaim our stolen freedoms is here, Fellow Patriot. It’s on. There’s no time to wait.

So please act -- and agree to give generously.

**[But if $100 is just too much -- even given the urgency of the situation -- please agree to $30, or at least $15 TODAY](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=5gjbatamrt0tsj12q5fe69eceh7q0aflsclisgrtilc1tf7ypfjjmj30wu0oz8isvhr06fs1ihiuwfbv9hd7ds5mnuuk8cs8ec6upmxoqbsallttbddwrpw9ky3mp65ip8yij0xzgl44n2ai09bi629kfvva7dqjpjgdmjlkzmh7c8ktkxx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szk1jq&__onlt=h)**.

_If you and I don’t fight back, they’ll be back again to keep stealing our freedoms one bite at a time_.

Whatever you can do, please act IMMEDIATELY. There’s no time to waste.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights **

P.S. As long as the UN “Small Arms Treaty” is pending in the Senate, ratification is all that’s needed for this gun grab to become reality. And that’s REGARDLESS of who occupies the White House or their position on the Treaty!

**[So will you please sign your “END THE UN GUN BAN” Petition IMMEDIATELY and agree to your most generous contribution of $100, $30 or at least $15 TODAY](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=15zlcy5ac60ls8mhx0breoxaqx9ivaix873lmheq7qy15g2w6xvguxtpt48a7u6g19ayxdnztrrgj77pi47ropzyh5372b8msf3m9dn21ujrpnz583e5i3udtfha37ae6tcvrwf9q2bzndv1stric7wtl7wqhvl9gqq7esf6gho6q0iiub2xp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szk1jq&__onlt=h)**?

clean_body: Please read the message below from our sponsor, the National Association for Gun Rights. | | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, The United Nations’ “Small Arms Treaty” has been the Gun Control Lobby’s crown jewel since Barack Obama sent it to the U.S. Senate and insisted we ratify it a decade ago. Year after year, we refused. But each and every day, the UN is getting closer to implementing the terms of this dangerous Treaty’s provisions here in the United States even without ratification. And it’s all being done in secret by the UN’s allies in the Washington, D.C. “Swamp.” The good news is, with the big changes in Washington due to the 2024 election, you and I have a chance to stop the Gun Control Lobby cold. But it’s an opportunity that won’t last forever. That’s why – as Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the message below – ! Sincerely, The Hon. Rand Paul United States Senator (R-KY) Dear Fellow Patriot, There is a sword hanging over the head of every American gun owner. I’m referring to the UN “Small Arms Treaty” -- the first stage of the UN’s global gun control agenda. I’ve stared these global gun banners in the face and told them what they could do with their precious “Small Arms Treaty,” though I knew the UN would NOT like me crashing their “Gun Ban Club” in Geneva. I told UN bureaucrats you and I will NEVER surrender to their anti-gun schemes! When I told these anti-gun international bureaucrats they were walking in the footsteps of every 20th century murderous dictator who disarmed their citizens to shuffle them off to death camps, I guess my words hit a little “close to home.” All they could do in response was squirm in their seats and laugh nervously... But while you or I or even President Trump can tell these gun grabbers what we think of their treaty, only the U.S. Senate can remove the treaty document from the Senate agenda. . As you’ll see, this petition insists your Senators act to oppose and reject the UN “Small Arms Treaty” and send it back to the President where it can be formally and finally trashed. But until they do, the UN “Small Arms Treaty” will remain pending in the Senate, and ratification by a future Senate is all that’s needed for this gun grab to become reality. And that’s REGARDLESS of who occupies the White House or their position on the Treaty! With this Treaty, the UN’s goal is to DESTROY the legal buying, owning, manufacturing, and selling of pistols, rifles, and shotguns by FORCING: > > ALL countries involved in the export of firearms -- including the United States -- to establish a “National Control System.” This is nothing more than GUN REGISTRATION, plain and simple -- the first step toward outright GUN CONFISCATION; > > ALL firearms manufacturers who seek to export firearms to ask for permission and report on how they believe the guns they sell will be used. The UN ultimately wants final say on whether or not any firearms transfer should be allowed. Period. After all, they are fixated on keeping guns out of the hands of the “wrong” people; and > > ALL Treaty countries to allow firearms manufacturers to be sued for crimes committed with their products. Imagine how outrageous it would be if Ford was sued because an F-150 owner ran a red light and caused a crash! That’s what gun grabbers want to do with firearms because they know this could END gun manufacturing. This is exactly what Mexico is attempting to do in their lawsuit against Smith & Wesson. The UN’s ultimate plan for all civilian-owned guns:Incinerate them. It’s hard to see how the Second Amendment could survive in the United States were the one-world socialists at the UN to get their way. Of course, that’s their goal. To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand “utopian” designs. Meanwhile, enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed, they’re pouring money into the UN “Small Arms Treaty” hand-over-fist. So, it’s no wonder why they’re hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it! . If we don’t dispose of the treaty quickly, the gun grabbers will leap to ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate the moment they have the votes, no matter who the President is or what their stance is on the treaty. That’s why we have to mount a massive campaign to send this Treaty back to the President NOW so he can kill the Treaty as promised, before it’s too late. The great news is, just doing so puts you and me in a win/win situation. Either we get the 60 votes we need to finally KILL this Treaty... ... Or anti-gun U.S. Senators will be on record in support of arguably the WORST anti-gun initiative to come before either chamber of Congress in decades. Believe me. U.S. Senators who vote to allow international bureaucrats to trample on our gun rights will pay the price at the ballot box. Just like they did in 2014 after their all-out push for gun control in the wake of the Newtown tragedy, and in 2016 after Hillary Clinton’s full embrace of every anti-gun policy imaginable, and in 2024 when four anti-gun democrats went down in flames, and four more barely hung on by the skin of their teeth. But if we don’t fight now, it could be the gun grabbers who get the last laugh -- even if it takes them years to regain control of the U.S. Senate! name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Let’s keep the momentum going
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250717-1433-foote&t=1001&akid=1433%2E342411%2Ekrouqn ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Here are 3 things you need to know about the Squad Victory Fund:

1. We don’t take a dime from corporate PACs or ask billionaires for big
checks. We rely on grassroots support, not special interests.

2. We’re taking on Trump, his extremist allies, and the corporate
interests trying to buy our democracy. We’re committed to defeating right
wing extremism.

3. We’re a people-powered movement dedicated to electing bold, progressive
champions who will fight for our democracy. This is how the Squad came to
be, and we’re continuing to build our momentum.

But here’s the truth: Running grassroots campaigns and holding the line
against right-wing attacks takes serious resources.

Corporate PACs can write six-figure checks overnight. We rely on
small-dollar donations from grassroots supporters like you to help train
organizers, support progressive candidates, and keep the Squad strong.

We’re able to accomplish our goals by coming together as a movement for
progressive change — that is how we will succeed. Now we need your help to
keep that momentum going.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250717-movement.nDUQNa&refcode=em20250717-1433&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1433%2E342411%2Ekrouqn ]Your $5, $10, or $25 powers every piece of this fight— from organizing
on-the-ground to holding the GOP accountable for their extremist agenda.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250717-movement.nDUQNa&refcode=em20250717-1433&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1433%2E342411%2Ekrouqn ]Contribute ››

This movement only grows if people like you keep fighting alongside us.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1433%2E342411%2Ekrouqn

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: John Fetterman
subject: what Republicans just did to PBS + NPR
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hi, it's John.

I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but Republicans just voted to gut $1 BILLION from public broadcasting.

They wiped out federal funding for PBS, NPR, and local stations across the country that rural communities rely on for urgent news alerts.

👉 Republicans do not give a damn about how this will leave small towns in the dark. No local news, no weather alerts, no emergency lifeline in a crisis.

They said to hell with educational programming, too. Mr. Rogers, a Pittsburgh icon, taught us kindness and empathy. My wife, Gisele, learned English watching PBS, where Big Bird and Elmo have educated generations of American kids.

As a father, this is personal.

Trump gave Republicans an order, and they marched in lockstep. They want silence where there used to be truth, and they don’t care who gets hurt.

It’s not budget trimming. It’s *vengeance* against journalists and anyone who won’t kiss Trump’s ring.

We need to raise $20,000 by MIDNIGHT to show Trump’s band of bootlickers we’re furious – and they’ll pay for every shameless concession to Trump at the ballot box.

So please, chip in now if you’re fed up with Trump’s reckless war on truth, and ready to hit back HARD. https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50878?t=1001&akid=10206%2E434096%2EzjfS01

Thanks yinz,

John ❤️

clean_body: Hi, it's John. I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but Republicans just voted to gut $1 BILLION from public broadcasting. They wiped out federal funding for PBS, NPR, and local stations across the country that rural communities rely on for urgent news alerts. 👉 Republicans do not give a damn about how this will leave small towns in the dark. No local news, no weather alerts, no emergency lifeline in a crisis. They said to hell with educational programming, too. Mr. Rogers, a Pittsburgh icon, taught us kindness and empathy. My wife, Gisele, learned English watching PBS, where Big Bird and Elmo have educated generations of American kids. As a father, this is personal. Trump gave Republicans an order, and they marched in lockstep. They want silence where there used to be truth, and they don’t care who gets hurt. It’s not budget trimming. It’s vengeance against journalists and anyone who won’t kiss Trump’s ring. We need to raise $20,000 by MIDNIGHT to show Trump’s band of bootlickers we’re furious – and they’ll pay for every shameless concession to Trump at the ballot box. So please, chip in now if you’re fed up with Trump’s reckless war on truth, and ready to hit back HARD. Thanks yinz, John ❤️

subject: Should we make ballots more accessible to citizens?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=n405PVf6qFLbWH3ZJxX9JQ1eezMLGn5V09LA1VN2w3S4PozYVlG+kl2mklV3xN0kzF4x7Bz7UKqqAvvSuQTNna3I/zfHwq+6KLWgDwVr6cs=]
NPR: A federal law requires translated voting ballots but not in Arabic or Haitian Creole [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NPR_BallotLanguages.png]
Section 203 of the 1965 Voting Rights Act has required certain states and local governments to provide voting ballots, registration forms and other election materials in more than just English. But not all languages are covered by Section 203's protections.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should ballots be available in more languages to make sure all citizens can vote?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=20.00&contactdata=n405PVf6qFLbWH3ZJxX9JQ1eezMLGn5V09LA1VN2w3S4PozYVlG+kl2mklV3xN0kzF4x7Bz7UKqqAvvSuQTNna3I/zfHwq+6KLWgDwVr6cs=] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=20.00&contactdata=n405PVf6qFLbWH3ZJxX9JQ1eezMLGn5V09LA1VN2w3S4PozYVlG+kl2mklV3xN0kzF4x7Bz7UKqqAvvSuQTNna3I/zfHwq+6KLWgDwVr6cs=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=n405PVf6qFLbWH3ZJxX9JQ1eezMLGn5V09LA1VN2w3S4PozYVlG+kl2mklV3xN0kzF4x7Bz7UKqqAvvSuQTNna3I/zfHwq+6KLWgDwVr6cs=]

clean_body: A curious piece of paperwork popped up in our research| | | Friend, Our research team just uncovered a VERY curious piece of paperwork... 🚨 A Democrat from High Point has quietly filed to run against Addison in 2026.🚨** After Addison’s 39-point landslide win in 2024, Democrats went radio silent. No press release. No website. No fanfare. And now? Just a quiet filing, hoping to pull a fast one on us and catch us unprepared. Well, we’re letting the cat out of the bag—and we’re gearing up for a fight. President Trump and the America-First movement need STRONG conservative allies in Congress—and that includes Addison. Help us send a loud and clear message: NC-06 is not for sale. subject: Despite the Republican Rip-Off, our investments are coming home

body:
I am pleased to share that over $42 million in funding for several Northwest Washington transportation projects has been released.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111658166/557961937/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzk0YzcwNi0zYTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S33s_7A5hePO58hUrQ3dKnXOaGN3U08gdTT8AS3ywao=&emci=7acdf109-7762-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f794c706-3a63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9494239)
---

| | I am pleased to share that over **$42 million in funding for several Northwest Washington transportation projects has been released** by the Department of Transportation so local governments can move forward with their work as expected, including:
* **$1,238,680 for the Nooksack Indian Tribe** to remove a culvert in Jones Creek under a BNSF Railway line in Acme;
* **$9,644,865 for Whatcom Transportation Authority** to purchase 11 low or no-emission buses to replace three diesel buses and eight hybrid buses;
* **$2,000,000 for the City of Burlington** to identify which of the city's 16 at-grade rail crossings is most suitable for grade separation to improve safety and reduce traffic congestion; and
* **$18,090,000 for the City of Everett** to eliminate two at-grade railroad crossings that pose significant risks to public safety through the construction of an overpass and a new integrated roundabout near the Smith Island railroad terminal in Everett.

Decisions about local transportation projects should be made by local communities. When the Trump Administration began illegally withholding already appropriated funds, it injected more unnecessary chaos into infrastructure projects already underway. Getting these funds released and back to communities will restart ongoing projects and bring relief to communities who are waiting for work to begin. I will continue to push Secretary Duffy to release the funding for other Northwest Washington projects that received awards, like the **$19,500,000 grant for Skagit Transit** to renovate its Maintenance, Operations, and Administration Facility and the **$2,000,000 grant for to the City of Lynden** to complete planning for its project to relocate Pepin Creek. clean_body: I am pleased to share that over $42 million in funding for several Northwest Washington transportation projects has been released. | | | | I am pleased to share that over $42 million in funding for several Northwest Washington transportation projects has been released by the Department of Transportation so local governments can move forward with their work as expected, including: $1,238,680 for the Nooksack Indian Tribe to remove a culvert in Jones Creek under a BNSF Railway line in Acme; $9,644,865 for Whatcom Transportation Authority to purchase 11 low or no-emission buses to replace three diesel buses and eight hybrid buses; $2,000,000 for the City of Burlington to identify which of the city's 16 at-grade rail crossings is most suitable for grade separation to improve safety and reduce traffic congestion; and $18,090,000 for the City of Everett to eliminate two at-grade railroad crossings that pose significant risks to public safety through the construction of an overpass and a new integrated roundabout near the Smith Island railroad terminal in Everett. Decisions about local transportation projects should be made by local communities. When the Trump Administration began illegally withholding already appropriated funds, it injected more unnecessary chaos into infrastructure projects already underway. Getting these funds released and back to communities will restart ongoing projects and bring relief to communities who are waiting for work to begin. I will continue to push Secretary Duffy to release the funding for other Northwest Washington projects that received awards, like the $19,500,000 grant for Skagit Transit to renovate its Maintenance, Operations, and Administration Facility and the $2,000,000 grant for to the City of Lynden to complete planning for its project to relocate Pepin Creek. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . name: Dan Osborn
subject: I’m used to people underestimating me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q3_spl_dlo?refcode=X_071725_osbornintro_spl_dlo_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q3_spl_dlo?refcode=X_071725_osbornintro_spl_dlo_act]
Hello friend, Michael said I could reach out.
I’m Dan Osborn, the blue-collar mechanic and former union president running for U.S. Senate here in Nebraska against billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts.
I’m used to people underestimating me. It’s been happening my whole life.
When Kellogg’s tried to cut our pay and benefits at the cereal plant where I worked, we walked out. The company never expected we’d strike for 11 weeks through the bitter cold. But we did. And we won a fair contract and saved 500 good-paying union jobs.
After I was fired for leading the strike, I decided to run for Senate against Republican Deb Fischer. None of the pundits and so-called experts thought I had any chance. But we got 47% of the vote. Ours was one of the closest Senate races in the entire country last year.
And now, I’m running for Senate again, this time against Republican Pete Ricketts – a literal billionaire. I’ve been told by more than a few people that I’m nuts. How could I possibly take on someone with unlimited funds and expect to win? But the first poll already shows we’re tied: 46% to 45%.
I’m running again for the U.S. Senate to flip this seat for working class people, because I am sick and tired of the billionaires and corporations screwing over families like mine and getting away with it. They may think they can buy every Senate seat and write the laws to make themselves even richer. But ours is a movement, and we are just getting started.
I’m not a billionaire. I can’t write my campaign a million-dollar check any time I want to. Instead, I’m funding my campaign entirely with donations from grassroots donors like you.
We can defeat billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts and flip Nebraska’s Senate. But the only way I’ll be able to fight back against the attacks and win is if grassroots donors like you chip in right now to my campaign:
Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign for U.S. Senate against Republican Pete Ricketts here in Nebraska and Michael Bennet's campaign for Governor ? I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so no amount is too small. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q3_spl_dlo?refcode=X_071725_osbornintro_spl_dlo_act]
There is so much at stake right now in our country. I am ready to go to Washington and give these billionaires hell. But I am counting on your donation now to help me win.
We can flip this Senate seat – but we can only do it together.
Thank you,
Dan Osborn

It’s been happening my whole life. When Kellogg’s tried to cut our pay and benefits at the cereal plant where I worked, we walked out. The company never expected we’d strike for 11 weeks through the bitter cold. But we did. And we won a fair contract and saved 500 good-paying union jobs. After I was fired for leading the strike, I decided to run for Senate against Republican Deb Fischer. None of the pundits and so-called experts thought I had any chance. But we got 47% of the vote. Ours was one of the closest Senate races in the entire country last year. And now, I’m running for Senate again, this time against Republican Pete Ricketts – a literal billionaire. I’ve been told by more than a few people that I’m nuts. How could I possibly take on someone with unlimited funds and expect to win? But the first poll already shows we’re tied: 46% to 45%. I’m running again for the U.S. Senate to flip this seat for working class people, because I am sick and tired of the billionaires and corporations screwing over families like mine and getting away with it. They may think they can buy every Senate seat and write the laws to make themselves even richer. But ours is a movement, and we are just getting started. I’m not a billionaire. I can’t write my campaign a million-dollar check any time I want to. Instead, I’m funding my campaign entirely with donations from grassroots donors like you. We can defeat billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts and flip Nebraska’s Senate. But the only way I’ll be able to fight back against the attacks and win is if grassroots donors like you chip in right now to my campaign: Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign for U.S. Senate against Republican Pete Ricketts here in Nebraska and Michael Bennet's campaign for Governor ? I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so no amount is too small. [] There is so much at stake right now in our country. I am ready to go to Washington and give these billionaires hell. But I am counting on your donation now to help me win. We can flip this Senate seat – but we can only do it together. Thank you, Dan Osborn DONATE [] DONATE MONTHLY [] [] [] [] Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore. CLICK HERE TO RECEIVE FEWER EMAILS FROM OUR CAMPAIGN [] By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.
