Today, the campaign of Jason Miyares launched its first television ad of the general election. The ad, titled Soft Jay Jones Will Not Keep Us Safe will air in the Richmond, Roanoke, and Hampton Roads TV markets contrasting Attorney General Miyares’ record of accomplishment to the brutal failures of Jay Jones’ radical record.
Jay Jones has centered his campaign on 'justice reform'—and if that looks anything like his record as a Delegate, Virginians have every reason to be concerned.
Soft Jay Jones has stood with criminals at every step. Sponsoring a bill that would cut violent felons’ prison sentences in half, voting to end mandatory minimum sentences for repeat domestic abusers and drug dealers selling on school grounds, and even supporting an end to cash bail – returning violent criminals to our streets almost as quickly as they were arrested.
The list does not stop there, Jay Jones’ policies of failure stand to dismantle every inch of progress that has been made over the last 4 years. Simply put, Virginia cannot afford a return to the criminal-first agenda that loomed over the Commonwealth 4 years ago.
Jason Miyares on the other hand has a proven record of accomplishment. He has stood up to large corporations – securing over $1.5 billion for Virginia's Opioid Abatement Authority which is now being used to fight addiction. Miyares launched Operation Ceasefire – a crime interdiction program leading to a 30% drop in murders and an 11% drop in violent crime across the Commonwealth. And has fought the woke agenda that threatens every corner of our lives – removing men from girls’ sports and locker rooms and standing with law enforcement.
Virginia, the stakes could not be higher and the contrast could not be any clearer. Soft Jay Jones is too weak for Virginia.

name: Chuck Rocha
subject: CAMPEONES PAC Hosts Press Conference on Urgent Need to Win Back Latino Voters
body:
Democratic lawmakers and strategists gather to confront declining Latino voter support | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **CAMPEONES PAC Hosts Press Conference on Urgent Need to Win Back Latino Voters** **Washington, D.C.** – CAMPEONES PAC held a press conference on **Wednesday, July 16** , at the **National Press Club** to launch its historic mission: reversing the Democratic Party’s decline in support among Latino voters and rebuilding trust through early, culturally competent outreach. Led by former Congressman **Tony Cárdenas** and political strategist **Chuck Rocha, **the event outlined bold, data-backed strategies to win back Latino voters and mobilize support ahead of the 2026 elections.
---
|
---
---
| The event drew significant attention from Democratic leadership. Members of Congress in attendance included Chairman of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, **Adriano Espaillat** , Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus **Ted Lieu** , Rep. **Norma Torres** , Rep. **Salud Carbajal** , Rep. **Chuy García** , and Rep. **Raul Ruiz** , signaling widespread concern within the party over Republican inroads with Latino voters in recent cycles. "Campeones PAC is exactly the right initiative at the right time. Congressman Cárdenas and Chuck Rocha bring the experience of winning tough elections and a deep understanding of the needs and culture of Hispanic voters. I am fully confident that, with the right investments, Campeones PAC will deliver victories by mobilizing the Hispanic vote." - said Congressman **Raul Ruiz **
---
|
---
---
| The program also featured insights from CAMPEONES PAC advisors, including **Kristian Ramos** and **Maria Cardona** , who emphasized the need for long-term investment to rebuild credibility and effectively engage Latino communities. “Yesterday was the historic launch of CAMPEONES PAC, the first-of-its-kind political action committee solely focused on persuading Latino voters to return to the Democratic Party,” said **Chuck Rocha** , CAMPEONES PAC Senior Advisor.
---
|
---
---
|
---
| CAMPEONES PAC is currently meeting with key funders to secure the necessary resources to scale its outreach efforts and reverse the negative trend in Democratic support among Latino voters. For media inquiries or to schedule interviews with CAMPEONES PAC leadership, please contact **Vanessa Saenz** at Saenz@solidaritystrategies.com. With gratitude,
**Chuck Rocha **
---
| | | _Copyright © 2025 Solidarity Strategies, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Solidarity StrategiesP.O. Box 15260Washington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=badd48715a)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=badd48715a&e=b8f90417f9&c=381c463f8f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=badd48715a&t=b&e=b8f90417f9&c=381c463f8f).

name: Team Bohannan
subject: Mariannette Miller-Meeks is not loyal to Iowans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111659246/557965462/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2U4NmU0NC0zYzYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XpxGwuDJImcLFFDPd7Cn0yU4qPyUu827pLjUyXvLeq4=)
Peter,

There was a time when elected leaders took pride in representing the people who sent them to Washington. They listened to their communities. They stood up for what was right.

But that’s not what we’re seeing from Iowa’s leaders today. Somewhere along the way, they stopped listening and started protecting themselves — their power, their party ties, their donors — instead of protecting the people they were elected to serve.

_And no one represents that betrayal better than Mariannette Miller-Meeks._

She hasn't voted with Iowa in mind for years. She’s been laser-focused on the corporate interests whispering in her ear and Republican leadership breathing down her neck. No matter what her constituents are saying, everything she does is about staying in line and avoiding the wrath of her own party.

We deserve so much better than that. Christina is running because she hasn’t forgotten who elected officials should answer to. It's not the wealthy donors or party bosses; it’s you. _And it's only with your help that we can send Christina to Washington in 2026._

**[We were just 799 votes away from flipping this seat last cycle. Help us finish the job and bring real accountability back to Iowa's First District by making a donation to Christina's campaign>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111659247/557965463/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250716_FRPL_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250716_FRPL_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=73e86e44-3c63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2U4NmU0NC0zYzYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XpxGwuDJImcLFFDPd7Cn0yU4qPyUu827pLjUyXvLeq4=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, There was a time when elected leaders took pride in representing the people who sent them to Washington. They listened to their communities. They stood up for what was right. But that’s not what we’re seeing from Iowa’s leaders today. Somewhere along the way, they stopped listening and started protecting themselves — their power, their party ties, their donors — instead of protecting the people they were elected to serve. And no one represents that betrayal better than Mariannette Miller-Meeks. She hasn't voted with Iowa in mind for years. She’s been laser-focused on the corporate interests whispering in her ear and Republican leadership breathing down her neck. No matter what her constituents are saying, everything she does is about staying in line and avoiding the wrath of her own party. We deserve so much better than that. Christina is running because she hasn’t forgotten who elected officials should answer to. It's not the wealthy donors or party bosses; it’s you. And it's only with your help that we can send Christina to Washington in 2026. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: name: =?utf-8?B?RWxtb+KAmXMgIzEgRmFu?=
subject: Defunding the Truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend, this is ridiculous.
If you're wondering what MAGA extremists have their eyes on next, here's your answer:
They want to defund public broadcasting.
That’s right. Trump and his allies are now calling for PBS and NPR to be stripped of funding, all while lavishing billions on tax breaks for the ultra-rich.
It’s petty. It’s political. And it’s dangerous.
Worst part is I think we got a warning about MAGA once before....
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/7A6144757954714F4B31487162457151384E4A32744B777476516F713657614845362B37384831696975325555476959444A49387A7A3137775A4A6A58695730/editor_images/GIF%20by%20Sesame%20Street.gif]
Public media is how rural and underserved communities get vital information, from hurricane updates to school board decisions and key educational programs.
Instead of investing in education, infrastructure, and relief for working families, MAGA wants to kill off the very few tools that help keep people informed and empowered.
Why? Because truth is a threat to them.
Meanwhile, our state still faces:
– Soaring housing costs
– Sky-high property insurance
– Crumbling roads and schools
– Families working 2-3 jobs just to stay afloat
That’s what I’m focused on.
I’m not here to silence critics, I’m here to serve the public. I’m not here to chase headlines, I’m here to fix what’s broken.
But I can’t do it without you. Every person who chips in helps build the kind of campaign Florida actually deserves: not another media stunt, but a movement for change.
Lives are at stake here, and all it takes is $15 to keep our public informed and educated. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]

This fight is too real to lose. Will you help me step up to the plate?

[] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Express Donate: $10 [] Express Donate: $25 [] Express Donate: $50 [] Express Donate: $100 [] Or, donate another amount [] This fight is too real to lose. Will you help me step up to the plate? name: Hallie Shoffner
subject: I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
I want you to be among the first to know...
| Hi friend,

The Voter Protection Project said I could reach out with some exciting news.

**I’m Hallie Shoffner – a sixth-generation Arkansas farmer – and I want you to be among the first to know I’m running for U.S. Senate.** | [BE A FOUNDING DONOR »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92256?t=6&akid=20663%2E878179%2EHO8joq)
---
I'm stepping up because too many hardworking people in Arkansas and across the country are being shoved to the back of the line. The farmer. The truck mechanic. The single mom pulling a double shift just to make ends meet. And for the last ten years, our current senator, Tom Cotton, has made their lives harder.

-He voted _against_ the Farm Bill – _twice,_
-Handed tax breaks to billionaires while blue-collar families got squeezed,
-And is more interested in chasing headlines than helping the people who actually make this state run.

Earlier this year, I had to make the hardest decision of my life: I shut down my family's farm, not because we didn't work hard, but because Washington's broken policies made it impossible to keep going.

**_So if I can't farm, I'm going to fight. For families. For fairness. For Arkansas._**

This campaign is about making Arkansas work for the people who call it home. Folks who wake up early, do their jobs, raise their kids, and ask for nothing more than a fair shot. I'm running to ensure that family farmers aren't left behind, that programs like Medicaid and Social Security remain strong, and that we lower the cost of living so families can move forward, not fall behind.

Now here's the truth: **To compete in this race, we need to prove Arkansas is in play, and that starts today.**

[We've set a 24-hour fundraising goal to show the strength of this campaign from the jump. Will you split a donation between our campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help us gain the momentum we need to take on Tom Cotton? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92256?t=7&akid=20663%2E878179%2EHO8joq)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Hallie Shoffner and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92257?t=8&akid=20663%2E878179%2EHO8joq)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92258?t=9&akid=20663%2E878179%2EHO8joq)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92259?t=10&akid=20663%2E878179%2EHO8joq)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92260?t=11&akid=20663%2E878179%2EHO8joq)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92256?t=12&akid=20663%2E878179%2EHO8joq)
I'm not a politician. I'm a farmer. And I'm running this campaign the same way I ran my farm – with grit, with honesty, and with everything I've got.

Let's get to work.
Hallie
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20663%2E878179%2EHO8joq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20663%2E878179%2EHO8joq).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20663%2E878179%2EHO8joq) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=20663%2E878179%2EHO8joq). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20663%2E878179%2EHO8joq)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20663%2E878179%2EHO8joq)

body:
The men and women of Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) risk their lives to protect this country... | | | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/uvf3qKyF38W0tgFXzlLTFP2lRBu9rLnMxrZKjvUx4oGvdlvaM8GlBn7D0W78oyxT5ekR80i27YNCFXkgQzv5Ltqrld6VYM-49bzkorgM0TY8xBB_Ylo37UI2XQcEnZqKN-4WMjmZRkKTwyxT2gI5UXYCitpr57A2hryeSqVDueWbWjNnxPRU5CmofvvuWhaEshyBwKeIu-miKubpb4s2Ncnon_m6hQG0TWbmL3b2H75-AINjyD-dGSqbtkZt64wjwG67ZUgV4BGhGyexNbQskk5i-KCM1CVEV1GBDHFYwx1Q55nIlbhXWZWPggb7IbG-aXf5J78d-Ds1xecoStC9cNodL6sYQ5Z0C_rbpVjiPmPR_UnxzOEG1qSOxh37OBT5HhK1kQT2awspajxkXsEDmIOk58waa_PCrpb7hmNt1QiTZ5tdMl_GCIJxcPTED3k5TgiRwFg2qDq1Yewe6AWMBO2Ym2cUdBU995ooVGbtFU6hF9R3EvyZZyUCoJ0nV3dPfhhB-gKphYICZXmbb_757NROq85QHjZ8QtYGo45-nH6LB77GuwzwIjf_ImwQWckJsOtW9JJF1uTYS-KFRa79_oIF3AtlFmSXf0zhZzinSKPEip_M5nZl8FdB3-pz1bIxyyOPc8jJ0P1CuKt7D8_9_YkvqKfk59_5PSH9ky9yXFuCKdE6vmbmwuqic0h3Ub2KRux5ByO7gg/NdYXHJq8KSTE6TEFwN_OiV0Flcb2shWg/11)
---
Peter,

The men and women of Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) risk their lives to protect this country -- **stopping** criminals, **deporting** illegal aliens, and **enforcing** our immigration laws.

But instead of support, they're being smeared by radical activists, open-border politicians, and the liberal media. **T****hey 're being called racist. Oppressive. Even heartless.**

**We won 't stand for that.** Heritage Action is launching our **National ICE Survey** to show that the American people stand with our defenders -- not the lawbreakers.

body:
| | |
__[**Fight book bans and defend LGBTQ+ equality. Donate to our work taking back school boards from right-wing extremists.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnNxmYVU0KaNelsGDLQBgZYnw_TLU4ud3LTKaTO7PuapHWBtSwDuHOU_1PJDmfavtIPmt3_sGICai6fmZ6c3GW-bJti5CjHyO4TwyG3wMqJE6ron-NbgUHii8cjlLbvHRT8PkTGel7-ux5BmlUJ7bkBtQWstZjhVJKpPEBVhmdsDHspA853WkODBZssHFkS0E2a8njofwM4mALMHc-qcQR6vrWGPKqZK4_uqmBG9YhT4jZZml1jy7__zbMjNCj9iDseNp7Smc2MkdAn72Z2_mRLaZ63UcQhw21wd7XTF6vQUagK5XNvPe1NZ4ZDuWdhpr_cw/4i9/C13IWftFSFSu1Tmj4ov_Mg/h0/h001.mFS3pEe5c48XkRLg1fjPUyo3gaBpvNvJpuV4Vc3wVXE)
* * *
There are over 82,000 school board seats in the United States. They choose whether to ban books or protect LGBTQ+ students. **As Donald Trump works to dismantle the Department of Education and federal aid to our schools, local school board elections are more important than ever.** At Local Democracy Project, we’re proud to partner with organizations like the School Board Integrity Project (SBIP) to elect school boards who prioritize the preservation of public education. We can’t stay in this urgent fight without your help, Peter.

[**The more we raise, the more school board races we can help our partners WIN. Take back our schools and FIGHT the right-wing assault on public education by donating today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnN3OEGsTH4qpa5WG2Q5KUZqEBbgWGSSjpTSpKFLiQ4A9W-GBbbjeY4LJZX-rmUv3XHqzGBr3tIK2fPOMzSYs_adRv2U0jB6rOzWim9PAKB-mjR27IP7361KD7GW_KjOiKsjTrhdWGnI_MxUbOGbw4HnOiYSx_v_rSv1K_Ef411qcQkTxbF9WWYsrfyOJdyrtggaD7QdQZ3CSrddMmlwxrdM_528WYK0znsU5uT-XrGoSY2rxuo4Ti5Pl5krR7z63PzZaDUZEZ4sJwnatterUBb-j1cVlygRjfeMaNUXbIwEdNxIeME_qSoLruuEdpyd94qw/4i9/C13IWftFSFSu1Tmj4ov_Mg/h1/h001.w4rxyqtv_c-YCZ5j8aeVrKdw5OndCzsGUZI2Ib-jKo0)**

clean_body: | | | There are over 82,000 school board seats in the United States. They choose whether to ban books or protect LGBTQ+ students. As Donald Trump works to dismantle the Department of Education and federal aid to our schools, local school board elections are more important than ever. At Local Democracy Project, we’re proud to partner with organizations like the School Board Integrity Project (SBIP) to elect school boards who prioritize the preservation of public education. We can’t stay in this urgent fight without your help, Peter. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Public education is vital for empowering future generations, fostering critical thinking, and ensuring an informed citizenry. We can WIN school board races and REBUILD back our democracy at the local level by supporting candidates who will preserve intellectual freedom stop book bans defend marginalized students and foster inclusive schools But we need your help to keep the momentum going.** Together, we can ensure that our educational institutions reflect our democratic values and serve all students equitably. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. name: Team Pou
subject: Say hello to our Democracy Fellows
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Hi there,

We’ve got exciting news to share from Team Pou: our new class of Democracy Fellows are here! We have four students from across the district and North Jersey on our team this summer as part of the national Democracy Summer program.

These students will spend their summer learning the ropes of civic engagement and the values that power our democracy. Across New Jersey, they’ll be helping us connect with voters, spread our message, and build a movement that lasts far beyond a single election.

This program isn’t just about training future leaders. It’s about recognizing that our democracy is strongest when the next generation is engaged and empowered. And with young people like our Fellows stepping up, the future looks bright.

We’re so proud they're a part of this campaign, and can't wait to see what they'll accomplish.

Thank you for being in this fight with us,

— Team Pou
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=afb2c932-3f63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=afb2c932-3f63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c]
Follow Nellie
https://x.com/NelliePou [https://x.com/NelliePou] https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/ [https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/] https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/ [https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/]
Checks may also be mailed to:
Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/QcG518LlG0yfilVoJO5ZLg2?unsubscribedata=WX5y3yiDkLSHUmzbQO4TLVlhQ7mgXN87WMKT04CUhTwsDl0WV9ld2RH0fsskDbGROM29gp2V4aDTaSdUruJYzzd8JVr1qRTC41r394fIKV4G9taSJcfK1LAjjuc62W0baZ8aZwOTFGfmnTbFlBHz2MyWkQvYqerwt7ZVF5CL2WD%2FqjbuLi5B9elHgkjXYe40BKz4oyPXIrLOcFV7imuUTdxEu0lLUwpxIt1dtvmHix9rzosXBRTHyvNfN19%2B%2BHXjoXWXoCjcpAOpEJWjxUYQTEN3IucaFnUIx9u0XrNBJCMTaN%2BbHeF%2BNLqBSdB01%2FIwHJhdiwsoHNMrNYT37VPgkYGj1MntBaZmUWle9MKdgdTuW6gbuWM6W3kpY%2F2C7l4vO4SLrgJvqTecEQuyUe%2B6JxRbfQNUVlEAkzjBsMEshfhTVR%2FqLHBZ4lgn2PnV2VUi] . Help me and Blue Amp Action keep fighting back against Trump by getting 1,000 rapid response donations within the next two hours!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb4f8caa-7bcb-4a60-92ec-a21c7ac59553/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| He’s always thrown attacks at me — all because I'm holding him and his administration accountable for their efforts to undermine our rights, our democracy, and the rule of law. Let me be clear: I will not be intimidated. I've said it before, and I'll say it again: I won't kowtow to bullies, no matter how much power or money they have. Because while he's hurling insults online, I'm focused on doing my job. In just the last week alone, I took action to protect free speech from this administration's ideological deportation policy. I stood up to defend public school funding for our most vulnerable children. And I stood with law firms being unlawfully targeted by the Trump administration for doing their jobs. Unlike Donald Trump, I'm not wasting time on personal attacks. I'm fighting for the people – and that means standing up for our democracy, our rights, and the rule of law. [But to keep up this work, I need your support. The far-right is mobilizing to try and discredit me, while they distract from the real issues. We cannot let them succeed. Will you chip in $10 or more right now to help me and Blue Amp Action fight back and stop Trump and his MAGA agenda?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc78d620e-fee0-4c4f-9a9a-86ce949046a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc22713e9-d41a-43ac-899b-611a45e3f904/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Stand with Mamdani via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name to tell Jeffries to back Mamdani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Later this week, Zohran Mamdani will finally sit down face-to-face with
Hakeem Jeffries – the highest-ranking Democrat in the House of
Representatives. So far, Jeffries and much of the Democratic establishment
have refused to endorse Mamdani – but THIS is our make our break moment to
ensure the Democratic Party steps up and stands with him.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32811?source=email-20250717&t=1011&akid=9034%2E5885482%2EUEMLxl ]Headline: Jeffries not yet ready to endorse Zohran Mamdani

As billionaires rush to line up behind already defeated Andrew Cuomo to
challenge Mamdani AGAIN, it’s more important than ever that Mamdani get
the outright support of Democratic leaders. So together let’s overwhelm
Jeffries with our call to endorse Mamdani NOW.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32811?source=email-20250717&t=1012&akid=9034%2E5885482%2EUEMLxl ]Will you add your name demanding Jeffries and the rest of the
Democratic establishment stand behind Mamdani and endorse him for NYC
Mayor without delay?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32811?source=email-20250717&t=1013&akid=9034%2E5885482%2EUEMLxl ]ADD YOUR NAME

This week, Mamdani headed to DC to meet with key Democrats to gain their
support and share lessons from his campaign.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32811?source=email-20250717&t=1014&akid=9034%2E5885482%2EUEMLxl ]Headline: Mamdani goes to Washington with key Democrats in Congress
still on the fence

Then, at the end of this week, he heads back to Brooklyn for a meeting
that is more than politics as usual. Because without support from
Democratic leadership, and with billionaires on BOTH sides of the aisle
lining up to take him down, real progressive change risks being sidelined
again.

Right now, powerful Democratic insiders are waiting to see if people like
*you* will speak up – or stay silent. Let’s make sure Jeffries knows
thousands more have joined our call to endorse Zohran Mamdani for Mayor
NOW. Our Revolution will deliver every signature directly to Jeffries'
office, showing him that the grassroots stands firmly behind Mamdani.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32811?source=email-20250717&t=1015&akid=9034%2E5885482%2EUEMLxl ]Sign here to tell Jeffries and the Democratic establishment that the
people want Mamdani’s progressive platform, not more billionaire-loving
candidates.

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis, Later this week, Zohran Mamdani will finally sit down face-to-face with Hakeem Jeffries – the highest-ranking Democrat in the House of Representatives. So far, Jeffries and much of the Democratic establishment have refused to endorse Mamdani – but THIS is our make our break moment to ensure the Democratic Party steps up and stands with him. [ ]Headline: Jeffries not yet ready to endorse Zohran Mamdani As billionaires rush to line up behind already defeated Andrew Cuomo to challenge Mamdani AGAIN, it’s more important than ever that Mamdani get the outright support of Democratic leaders. So together let’s overwhelm Jeffries with our call to endorse Mamdani NOW. [ ]Will you add your name demanding Jeffries and the rest of the Democratic establishment stand behind Mamdani and endorse him for NYC Mayor without delay? [ ]ADD YOUR NAME This week, Mamdani headed to DC to meet with key Democrats to gain their support and share lessons from his campaign. [ ]Headline: Mamdani goes to Washington with key Democrats in Congress still on the fence Then, at the end of this week, he heads back to Brooklyn for a meeting that is more than politics as usual. Because without support from Democratic leadership, and with billionaires on BOTH sides of the aisle lining up to take him down, real progressive change risks being sidelined again. Right now, powerful Democratic insiders are waiting to see if people like you will speak up – or stay silent. Let’s make sure Jeffries knows thousands more have joined our call to endorse Zohran Mamdani for Mayor NOW. Our Revolution will deliver every signature directly to Jeffries' office, showing him that the grassroots stands firmly behind Mamdani. [ ]Sign here to tell Jeffries and the Democratic establishment that the people want Mamdani’s progressive platform, not more billionaire-loving candidates. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME We’re building something bigger than any single candidate. But this moment – with Mamdani on the edge of history – demands all of us raise our voices to stand with progressive candidates who can bring the change we need. Peter,

**Every student has the right to learn. Every child deserves access to a quality education.**

Seth understands the urgency of the situation. He knows the importance of the Department of Education and the programs students rely on. That’s why he joined an amicus brief to stop Trump from blocking congressionally-approved funding for the Department of Education — because only Congress has the power to restructure federal departments, **_not Donald Trump._**

Seth is fighting for the more than 140,000 kids in Rhode Island public schools and each of their families. His actions are not just for them, but for all of us, for our community.

subject: Trump guts health and food assistance so“ugly billionaires” can keep beautiful wives.

body:
| | | **At the White House Faith Office, Trump confesses that his big, ugly bill was meant to help “ugly, rich guys.”** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHs7iGep3vX1mO61FC5l6ShuLHIwHpwcEWLg7hup-uSsx3z1CeKkmh9z2XE-7S4t6JkBqqnVzv6xJuB3oEJTW0Odi30btLNPAdeWEiA_H6ccb6tqRcr_P7ziG7VPzT6O9FKhxwxW9s6euLLLjCtSOPJ2C7bh5wEXffNYsrk1au5A9xSxd44vJfEpIxIdgF3I9T2GAWyF1caR92qs-HVZQO-zbfXYdudqa-3gLkJ6hBbcGRu2kXYtKDfbESiKmERvpKACH4-uK74ucm0mhSkoQuU195t8_1dq1_Sl0KN8fZihWQgNSKYlAm4SQRRYGzCEylMGCpQlyCLvOpALhAwCBczDundEoBYRQvFWqnlSkYZktzTlvWC2fiSeXZnyw4c8K_INYPYJkPI8M2B72yin4ai3bsFCl5-n1QUCDcrk2X8EHMuNM1tBaZH-9_Vu8exljWDLPBLV7IS0-4QIn-3TGP6g/4i9/mQ8LyyCNSKmL9vjZ9kJrAg/h0/h001.t_9b_0C-lzZn-sPVsCtr87ZKlCFuFxkbJzukZxfZpuE)**[**The rest of us will suffer as long as he is in office. Will you make a contribution to expand our ImpeachTrumpNow.com billboard campaign?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHs7iGep3vX1mO61FC5l6ShuLHIwHpwcEWLg7hup-uSsyByImcnGPzI9vnjaYPGNdFEqYQIsgzdY31wBJKpgvavCcu33TXMcS1rYmdOfn3yVXyu6R-SFZQjsa3DKI6YbnNegd08UFSGqw5M4jTCv6Gm-vUsoAyNudmdy4mLxEIwxh5lhnzFLOD9SKcwueWz-kM_X8AmURVsJYexR4gb-UDbeNOcATQ7_f2HBPoyAuKoYGFdyykMnC6GpXXhoMuVejKBip7D_8xs9n4WhErl2iy2NLWU5-k5woDN-l4jje6xWsu3ZNZCmH_PAKSHsH2Bp4SkwC_Bhuxr9wfUV-4hPXvB-vwnuGuwDYd3GSj-FMXqU63kuLZ9GHuHo-Ox0CwRC21LwR8QDWd_MC9wCXHBkn0EkLL6whbZV49H_Mc693ttJVyxYCFJA6aLKGpCg0dTx0mhUsk4TIVhqiprLnsgfNXiw/4i9/mQ8LyyCNSKmL9vjZ9kJrAg/h1/h001.lXMmwGFFbo04RZbftRt9KHNPttAxqpphHKkdvLjqIpc)
* * *
During a prayer luncheon at the White House Faith Office, Trump bizarrely justified his big, ugly bill which kicks millions of Americans off of medical and food assistance suggesting it was "humanitarian"—but only for “ugly, rich guys.” Trump told faith leaders that “ugly billionaires” would lose their “beautiful wives” if they didn’t get tax cuts! _Projection much?_ This cruel Republican bill will cause an estimated [51,000 preventable deaths](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SNYHID0cgDJeR88MOfSMuUcgxQnw5YosYUgTuyXQnw3w8Z71P3HHti3JoFaO6QUWV_xviwTPEjqt6Tw2eyRaqQqThfO9_wKEwtuxezA01PPWB8gNyI9GwIjazjaaQXRdz-LzWWsW2BItUuRGbJAtXElo3GQVyaYl-ex7tEcqK71luc6cLQM1BxhE0C02KDVCV1yoP-Me2WqIcdez1e9w8JF44jvcn9j3q7bumYZyutMCL_Cw6uMb3o3w0qZEXxxp30BUdXS12GH10mURjN-06TaUsSxlWOY7Sxs8FvgVZifhO2qtxHVYRQPxgvVukxhvHVUNlJnB2HjROCN1JpYbsalpFHB40W-occvXyGmPpDDGgDPGtDm1Uu50ylWUuUBCllTZSnQqejx_rXaNyC0Hzp-bnnL34GR8qiP34sSoMVVXQlsbEH_iSJhVTbg_rZVrXC7iq0BCuXSwEnIlmEHhNVJS-vmD7YwNNV570Tc7hY9e9b3SQ1_6lp6IzgOePA_1M9RCeF6Fk_bEnpfbHqOeNg/4i9/mQ8LyyCNSKmL9vjZ9kJrAg/h2/h001.3yAWbcatpRr0Ttouu-0bGTlUiAX9DzVx71AStYPX3jo) annually while making the super-rich even richer! **Our billboards are popping up all across the country. clean_body: | | | At the White House Faith Office, Trump confesses that his big, ugly bill was meant to help “ugly, rich guys.” During a prayer luncheon at the White House Faith Office, Trump bizarrely justified his big, ugly bill which kicks millions of Americans off of medical and food assistance suggesting it was "humanitarian"—but only for “ugly, rich guys.” Trump told faith leaders that “ugly billionaires” would lose their “beautiful wives” if they didn’t get tax cuts! Projection much? This cruel Republican bill will cause an estimated annually while making the super-rich even richer! Our billboards are popping up all across the country. We’ve posted in 11 states and growing... upcoming billboard in Colorado this month. We urgently need your help to expand our ImpeachTrumpNow.com billboard campaign across the country! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. According to Trump, his big, ugly bill will strengthen the economy to avoid a depression where "rich, beautiful" people might suffer financial setbacks. Trump joked that their marriages would crumble without more tax cuts. He gleefully recounted telling an "unattractive man" that his wife would leave him if the bill didn't pass. Trump is morally bankrupt. We're counting on your outrage to fuel our efforts. Let's show Trump and his cronies that America values compassion over greed.** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding
subject: What’s leading me and Movement 4 Freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.politivistaction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act]
Hey Peter,
I hope you had a chance to read the beautiful message my sister-in-power Cori sent yesterday. It brought tears to my eyes, because Cori knows this journey, our journey for true justice and equality just as much as I do. She’s lived it and her belief in me and this movement means more than I can say.
So I want to take a moment to introduce myself, directly, from my heart to yours.
I’m Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding , a pastor, a scholar, and a passionate politivist. I’ve spent my life in classrooms and communities, in church pews and on protest lines, organizing for the world our people deserve.
But I’m not doing this work alone.
Movement 4 Freedom [https://www.movement4freedom.com] is about collective liberation. It’s about transforming systems that were never built for us into something rooted in love, healing, justice, and solidarity.
When I ran for Congress back in 2018, I wasn’t just campaigning. I was organizing. Listening. Learning. Dreaming. And I’ve never stopped. That campaign sparked something in me that I’ve carried forward into Politivist Action, where we’re building people-powered campaigns, educational spaces, and direct actions that put justice at the center.
So if you’re reading this, I’m inviting you to join us. Not as a bystander, but as a co-creator. As someone who believes, like I do, that a better world is possible. Join the Movement 4 Freedom by donating to our campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act]
I’m so grateful to walk alongside Cori in our life’s work. And I’m honored to invite you to walk with us, too. We have so much to do.
In love, in justice, and in power,
Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding
Spokesperson, Movement 4 Freedom
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Cori Bush <info@politivistaction.com>
Date: Wed, Jul 16, 2025 at 10:42 AM
Subject: Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding.
Hi Peter,
Let me introduce you to someone who inspires me every single day; someone who leads with love, speaks truth with courage, and moves through the world with deep purpose.
Her name is Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding, and she’s the heart behind our new campaign Movement 4 Freedom [https://www.movement4freedom.com/] —a campaign rooted in justice, safety, and liberation for all of us.
Stephany and I met back in 2019, when we were both candidates running to shake up the status quo in Congress. From the moment we connected, I knew she was special. She wasn’t running for power or prestige; she was running for the people. Just like me.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act]
She’s a former tenured professor, a pastor, and a movement builder. She’s taught in classrooms, preached in pulpits, and marched in our streets. And through it all, she’s never stopped fighting for those who’ve been pushed aside and silenced.
Now, she’s calling us into something bigger than just one election. Movement 4 Freedom [https://www.movement4freedom.com/] [https://www.movement4freedom.com/] is a vision and a call to reimagine what justice really looks like. It’s about safety without criminalization. Healing instead of punishment. Solidarity over silence.
As spokesperson of Movement 4 Freedom, Stephany Rose is a firm believer in the power of collective action. She is determined to amplify marginalized voices, spearhead our educational campaigns, and champion direct action that fosters awareness and collaboration. She knows that true change requires collaboration, unity, and a commitment to equity.
So I’m asking you—as someone who’s walked this path with her—to stand with Stephany today. Join this movement. Share her story. Help us build the future our young people deserve. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act]
Keep an eye out for her emails, because this movement is just getting started, and you’re going to want to be a part of it.
Thank you,
Cori Bush
Founder, Politivist Action PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250717_stephanyfollowup_act] Politivist Action PAC is committed to driving social change by electing leaders who stand for peace, justice, and human rights. We build diverse, intergenerational movements to confront extremism, defend democracy, and promote racial, economic, and social justice. By rejecting corporate influence and fighting to eliminate big money in politics, we proudly support grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all.
Want to learn more? Visit our website at PolitivistAction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com] .

name: Deb Haaland
subject: re: New Mexico green chile
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
To me, New Mexico green chile tastes like home.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3285%2E400544%2EuIasCZ)
I’m emailing to ask you New Mexico’s most famous question:
_Red or green?_
When it comes to choosing your favorite color of New Mexico chile, it can be a tough call! **But I’ll be the first to share my deep love of cooking traditional recipes using New Mexico green chile.**
Back when I was in Law School at UNM, I’d prepare huge pots of green chile stew to bring to student gatherings. I made that same green chile recipe for my Congressional colleagues during the 2019 winter holiday season. I even cooked chile and tortillas for the water protectors when I traveled to Standing Rock during the protests against the Dakota Access Pipeline.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250717_salsa?refcode=em20250717-3285&amount=5&refcode2=3285_400544_uIasCZ&akid=3285%2E400544%2EuIasCZ)
_When I lived in Washington and found myself missing home, I’d cook a pot of green chile stew._
To me, New Mexico green chile tastes like home — and one of my favorite ways to cook with it during the summer months is to make a refreshing green chile salsa!
That’s why I was so excited to add our Be Fierce green chile salsa to our campaign store last week.
**We sold out immediately, but here’s the good news: you can still donate to get my special recipe!** It’s the same one I make for our friends and family at summer cookouts, and I’m thrilled to share it with you.
**[Donate any amount using this link today and I’ll send you my official recipe to make your own Be Fierce salsa at home. Every dollar supports the urgent work we’re doing right now to grow our people-powered campaign for governor.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250717_salsa?amount=5&refcode=em20250717-3285&refcode2=3285_400544_uIasCZ&akid=3285%2E400544%2EuIasCZ)**
**[Get the recipe](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250717_salsa?amount=5&refcode=em20250717-3285&refcode2=3285_400544_uIasCZ&akid=3285%2E400544%2EuIasCZ)**
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250717-1&t=2&refcode2=3285_400544_uIasCZ&akid=3285%2E400544%2EuIasCZ)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3285%2E400544%2EuIasCZ)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3285%2E400544%2EuIasCZ)

A top economist at the Brookings Institution just confessed that deportations are raising wages, especially in blue-collar sectors like agriculture, healthcare, and hospitality. Why? **When we stop flooding the labor market with illegal labor, businesses are forced to hire Americans and pay them fairly.** And it's not just talk. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent recently confirmed that real wages for hourly workers are up nearly 2% in the first five months of Trump's second term -- _the strongest growth in 60 years.__[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/rATw4RE17oGRzUlpdkc7I9fjQ3PVCInCubdv_JAqfiSw7DryyZ5KmP4_68yQ8WG7Y1srCKvrEQm1y_vOwSCl88W77EcwTefMiYghbZD1pMGAeRxB1yyUCzcOPBxvom07amybQT1SPnqUglwxQbXqYoiAfif8_sDdYMLX65FCmVJj0u8IYGJsajLE-FigCyT0ZyCHSEPByyKXObW9IkBp3FEKu2AX7biLVTGZwppotu_thYZbicTJT_LP1YbDebYh7-AJpkYGTngPbIVsOZU-_Q_6akXs5uBGl3iNr3_ZWe8pVD-yPVTMDoa9R7oTMZuHAdmqORlIAtoCn5W-GsF3X5AlPI4LY8c/ezf0G0z3oSRDHX7EV34285BItGoIUjDZ/11)_

clean_body: President Trump’s immigration enforcement policies — including deportations — are doing what the career politicians said was impossible: | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Even the elites are starting to admit it, Peter. President Trump's immigration enforcement policies -- including deportations -- are doing what the career politicians said was impossible: ✅ Boosting American wages ✅ Tightening the labor market ✅ Putting U.S. workers FIRST A top economist at the Brookings Institution just confessed that deportations are raising wages, especially in blue-collar sectors like agriculture, healthcare, and hospitality. Why? When we stop flooding the labor market with illegal labor, businesses are forced to hire Americans and pay them fairly. And it's not just talk. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent recently confirmed that real wages for hourly workers are up nearly 2% in the first five months of Trump's second term -- the strongest growth in 60 years. But here's the problem... Democrats in Congress are furious. They want to reverse course, flood the country with cheap labor, and crush the wage gains hardworking Americans are finally seeing. That 's why I'm fighting tooth and nail to defend the America First agenda in the Senate. But I can't do it alone. This is the America we believe in: one where the laws are enforced, our border is secure, and Americans are rewarded for their work, not left behind. Let's keep pushing forward. Let's stand with President Trump and defend the working men and women who built this country. In liberty, Rand Paul | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | | P.O. body:
Two of the nation's top race rankers have officially reclassified Iowa’s U.S. Senate race.
#
Peter — we’ve got some promising news out of the Heartland.
**Two of the nation's top race rankers have officially reclassified Iowa’s U.S. Senate race.**
It’s a small shift — from Safe Republican to Likely Republican — but it’s a very positive sign. We need to compete in states like Iowa if we’re going to take back the Senate in 2026. And this move indicates that election experts see our chances in Iowa looking better and better every day.
**One of the best ways you can help flip Iowa’s Senate seat is by making a donation today to Iowa’s 2026 Democratic U.S. Senate Nominee Fund.** This is a fund that will become immediately available to Iowa’s 2026 Democratic U.S. Senate nominee after they win the primary election — and it will play a big role in making sure their campaign has the resources to get their message in front of voters in the moments it matters most.
_Don’t forget, Joni Ernst is who we’re up against._ She’s the GOP Senator who went viral earlier this year for telling her constituents that “we all are going to die” after they expressed concerns over GOP cuts to Medicaid at a town hall.

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: Make Our Elections Work in Arizona
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=05c63e7807&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Good afternoon!

Today, the _Daily Caller _finally published an election integrity article I submitted for online publication nearly a month ago. You can read it right [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b190baf9fc&e=a7ab36849c).

This past legislative session I sponsored 31 bills. According to one of the local sub stacks, statistics don’t lie. With hard work, those fifteen bills signed into law were the most by a single lawmaker between both the House and Senate this legislative session with the “highest batting average at 45%.”

Here is a list of the bills I sponsored and were signed into law:
[**SB 1103**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=545f933c5a&e=a7ab36849c) penalty assessment; victims' rights enforcement
_[**SB 1104**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=12e4ab595c&e=a7ab36849c)_ police reports; victims; prosecuting agency
[**SB 1105**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=83148563e3&e=a7ab36849c) medical marijuana dispensaries; location
[**SB 1107**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=666953c5c6&e=a7ab36849c) Motorcycle safety fund continuation
[**SB 1206**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=45a575cd7f&e=a7ab36849c) banks; special deposits; requirements
[**SB 1220**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=da495e278e&e=a7ab36849c) victims’ rights; audio recordings; appeal
[**SB 1343**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=75e843dd80&e=a7ab36849c) Probation supervision; transfer
[**SB 1405**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0f208d7c77&e=a7ab36849c) mental health transition program; extension
[**SB 1424**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=903856c94c&e=a7ab36849c) impersonation; veteran; armed forces
[**SB 1449**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2dafb06f25&e=a7ab36849c) lifetime injunction; undesignated offenses
[**SB 1506**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a66f4f023a&e=a7ab36849c) department of corrections; reporting; website
[**SB 1507**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=fdf170477c&e=a7ab36849c) corrections; reports; oversight office
[**SB 1527**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=947705c17e&e=a7ab36849c) occupational boards; renewal extension
[**SB 1658**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=193e2643cc&e=a7ab36849c) failure to treat; animal cruelty
[**SB 1659**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a65a0fb238&e=a7ab36849c) State board; allegations of misconduct

As you read through the Senate Republicans’ legislative highlights [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bb6cfdc394&e=a7ab36849c) from 2025, you will see quite a few of my bills referenced. We adjourned Sine Die more than two weeks ago which also coincides with my auto accident. My insurance company listed it as a total loss and I still suffer from the side effects of whiplash. I am signed up for physical therapy, so hopefully I can put this behind me soon.

As far as the next session goes, I have already been holding meetings dealing with potential legislation for next year. The interim is the time ideas are hashed out. Not everything becomes a bill or a law. Thankfully, many constituents’ issues needing a solution don’t require legislation.

I turned down over 100+ media interviews last year but decided this year I would turn over a new leaf. This is why you are seeing a section included in my email updates that includes a _Bolick in the News_ section. I also don’t mind writing and submitting op-eds for publication. Last week, I co-authored an opinion piece with Rep. Blackman about the prison reform oversight bill signed into law this session. You can read it right [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=44e98b70b1&e=a7ab36849c).

_Bolick in the News_

[https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/07/05/civil-legal-aid-funded-but-still-under-threat-of-federal-cuts/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f275df392e&e=a7ab36849c)

_Bolick Bills in the News_

**Animal Cruelty **

[https://www.dcourier.com/news/sb-1658-to-prevent-loopholes-unreasonable-suffering-to-domestic-animals/article_e67bc79c-eacd-49a6-8ea5-21bdb9105ccb.html](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=552a2d5ecf&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://ktar.com/arizona-politics-news/arizona-animal-cruelty-law/5725684/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ab4d28b44c&e=a7ab36849c)

**Independent Prison Oversight Office**

[https://www.fox10phoenix.com/news/new-arizona-prison-oversight-office-faces-funding-fight](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0feb0c6be9&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://azfreenews.com/2025/07/governor-hobbs-signs-prison-oversight-bill-into-law-but-withholds-funding/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c700a1cf63&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/06/16/arizona-gop-pushes-for-independent-oversight-of-prisons/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e02785c363&e=a7ab36849c)

name: PA Dems
subject: We decide on democracy this November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter — we’re just $1,840 away from hitting our critical mid-month fundraising goal — and every dollar matters right now.

In November, three Pennsylvania Supreme Court justices face retention elections. These justices are our last line of defense against far-right attacks on voting rights, reproductive healthcare, and civil liberties.

If we don’t protect this Court, MAGA extremists will seize the opportunity to remake it in their image — and we’ve seen what that looks like in states like Florida, Texas, and Ohio.

clean_body: Are you with George Soros?| | | | | | | | Dear Friend,Seniors are under attack... Polling and disturbing trends show that seniors—once the backbone of the conservative movement —are now the target of an all-out propaganda war!And I’m worried that it’s working... So today, I’m performing an EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS. ... Time is of the essence because recently we’ve seen disturbing reports. According to RealClearPolitics, President Trump is underwater with seniors aged 70+ —the only age group where his approval is negative.And the anecdotal evidence is even stranger—maybe you’ve noticed that the radical protestors showing up to anti-Trump rallies are often 50+, or that older Americans on social media are suddenly turning on Trump! Maybe you even know friends, family, or neighbors who have suddenly fallen into the left’s trap. But with such a radical shift happening before our eyes, we have to ask... what on earth is going on?Is it the Liberal Media? We know that 66% of seniors still rely on TV for their news , and the media has become an echo chamber for anti-American lies. CNN, MSNBC, CBS, ABC, NPR, PBS...The list goes on and on; and their radicalism and propaganda has only increased since Trump took back the White House.Could it be the AARP? They have a direct line to millions of older Americans—and they aren’t shy about their support for ObamaCare, Medicare for All, the “Inflation Reduction Act” under Joe Biden, LGBTQ ideology, and more, even as they play the role of a moderate, “middle of the road group.” Or maybe it’s even George Soros and his web of influence? You and I know that George Soros has a massive web of NGOs, PACs, and investments designed to influence lawmakers and spread Marxist propaganda and chaos.And according to public tax filings, the left-leaning AARP Foundation accepted over 10 MILLION DOLLARS —in just three years—from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. The AARP once even honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine , calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators ” who’s “changing the world, $100 million at a time. ” My friend, maybe it’s the combination of the three...the Liberal media, the AARP, and George Soros who are targeting seniors; your friends your family, and YOU. And it’s why I’m asking you to stand with AMAC Action. Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative patriots 50 years of age and over. We have 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And we have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. In fact, our efforts have been so effective that President Trump himself has put out the call for mature Americans to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who want ruin our country!And today, we are focusing our efforts on fighting back on the left’s increasing grip on America’s seniors. My friend it’s simple—AMAC Action is THE antidote to forces targeting YOUR generation. Because if we don’t act now, we’ll wake up in a country where American seniors are the backbone of the Marxist movemen t...Where the liberal media has a stranglehold on your friends and family ... And where liberal elites and groups ensure this generation will be remembered for radicalism instead of patriotism ...I know I don’t want to ever see that America...and I think you don’t either.AMAC Action is the most effective voice in the nation, advocating for conservative values and changing the hearts and minds of mature Americans. But all that we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. We don’t receive of dime from the federal government. We’re funded by grass roots patriots just like you. So when you answer YES to your EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS ... When you support AMAC Action, you’re not just declaring your opposition to the left’s propaganda—you’re fighting back! Your donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $250 or even $500 or $1,000 ensures that we have the resources to: Advocate for conservative values and policies Spread the truth to seniors everywhere and counter propaganda Ensure that our generation, yours and mine, is remembered for patriotism, NOT for radicalism. And so much more. My friend, together, we can save this generation and secure America’s future. But it starts with your YES today. Please give your critical answer to your EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS below. Thank you for standing strong.Let’s show them that patriotic seniors aren’t fooled—and we aren’t going anywhere. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | P.S. The most radical left-wing forces in the nation are counting on you to sit this one out. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | |

clean_body: Tim needs to know if he should keep fighting. | | | | | | | | Hey friend, We just got out of a meeting with the boss. The whole Epstein fiasco came up—and Tim’s still pushing for answers. You know how he feels about lies and cover-ups. Transparency is the name of the game for Tim—and if there’s a list, he thinks the American people ought to see it. But he’s worried that folks are starting to tune out and move on. At the end of the day, Tim just wants to know who’s in his corner if he’s going to keep fighting. Every dollar helps him drain the sewer and get to the bottom of this for everyday people like you and me. Thanks for helping us stand up for the truth! Dear Peter,
---
One of the biggest issues facing our nation is the Epstein cover-up — horrific crimes against children hidden in the shadows. On Tuesday, we are gathering on the steps of the U.S. Capitol to pray, worship and intercede for _TRUTH_.

We live in an age of deception and deceit, where a covert lie is pushed over uncomfortable truth. We’re praying for God to unite our leaders and bring the truth into the light.
---

---
| | On the very same steps where we gathered to pray for Roe v. Wade to be overturned — and He answered our prayer.

Let’s worship, pray, and take it to the throne room of heaven. It’s time to hold the line and press in for God to move again!
---
[ **SUPPORT LET US WORSHIP >>>** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=6ecfb3661374458cb2323a11ef31d1c5&_e=oj7pYplEqg9g_qDWUJbti5xtyA37Ut1X0AZSSJh28HA6bxZX5SXibaKctKMzsgs3ngGTrRyTdca8g82wvw0D8iUP_wEJiEa3udE6ZJtGRediP7ieMwEYHc-vSCUN2fOKtNOMfl1OtLNCBB_2Rfc0xdSBL1k0AhvqzYlYY-M3iV2d47tz0xmo5FvI-g2TpJz6qFc0m1z-F3oPGyjrFodnVuT_vn9-hjDaOnXD6YhnFlmRYJw2jEAh-GrJRzHMopGr8-PVeAS1_w7TLtIvP5GoX0y8kZOySmn7N8oYjn8u4hjW1DsdExrTG8Kkeuu2PMQqCh2hQyTgdi68FI6T37qojkIpMbHzMt8UAMtO0q9Lp3EmQ-D9Skb4mT7BkhsjvlaXAH59_TOMVw647vlK6YlsqWzCRdTuDA9jWEqVvX14FI75g4d5C_DUAI12MahWg4t-X_XZ-wLqgQTxKSDKl6VMFIdxRhoTVj_rvCA2akpEaog%3D)

Till all hear,

Sean

clean_body: | | | | | "There is nothing concealed that will not be disclosed, or hidden that will not be made known. What you have said in the dark will be heard in the daylight, and what you have whispered in the ear in the inner rooms will be proclaimed from the roofs." —Luke 12:2-3 Dear Peter, One of the biggest issues facing our nation is the Epstein cover-up — horrific crimes against children hidden in the shadows. On Tuesday, we are gathering on the steps of the U.S. Capitol to pray, worship and intercede for TRUTH. We live in an age of deception and deceit, where a covert lie is pushed over uncomfortable truth. We’re praying for God to unite our leaders and bring the truth into the light. | | On the very same steps where we gathered to pray for Roe v. Wade to be overturned — and He answered our prayer. Let’s worship, pray, and take it to the throne room of heaven. It’s time to hold the line and press in for God to move again! Till all hear, Sean | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship | |

Friend — it’s simple.
If you believe that our tax dollars are better spent here at home than creating violence and instability overseas, **[chip in $5.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250717-1-180&t=3&akid=1717%2E791427%2EQ6sO0y)

It’s not easy to make change in our nation, but as MLK Jr. reminds us: “The arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice.”

clean_body: With your help, we can turn the tide one seat at a time, and your support is crucial to our success. | | | | | ---|--- Did you know that state Democrats are facing TWO flip opportunities in Georgia and Iowa next month? 📍In Georgia, Democratic candidate Debra Shigley is running a close race in a GOP stronghold. 📍In Iowa, Democrats are facing a toss-up special election that would break the GOP’s supermajority in the state Senate. To win in Republican-held districts all over the country, we need the full support of this grassroots movement. Will you chip in to help move the needle for state Democrats everywhere? | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | One of the most powerful things we can do to help working families, LGBTQ+ individuals, and children is to elect Democrats across the country, especially in red states, where winning a single seat can make a huge impact. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111663584/557980023/1833512440?refcode=250717_MFC_SpeakUP_HumblyAsking&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTczZDZkYy00NzYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QT7OnsxVZcg8kpXG-LckIldX4Sj8aHfl0RjYPc341C0=) Folks, I’ll make this quick: [**I’m humbly asking you to chip in $3 to my Speak Up PAC and Seth Moulton.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111663585/557980024/1833512440?refcode=250717_MFC_SpeakUP_HumblyAsking&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTczZDZkYy00NzYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QT7OnsxVZcg8kpXG-LckIldX4Sj8aHfl0RjYPc341C0=) I know – $3 might not sound like much. Especially when the news is filled with terrifying headlines about Trump and his extremist allies’ latest threats to our democracy. But I’ve seen the power of grassroots movements. When thousands of Democrats step up together, even with just a few bucks, we can’t be ignored. Your $3 helps Speak Up PAC support candidates who are committed to fighting for democracy, like Seth Moulton. Your $3 helps fund groups putting out hard-hitting ads, organizing in battleground states, and turning out the voters who decide elections, like Seth Moulton. Your $3 helps us take on Trump’s lies, expose his allies, and flip the seats that will decide control of Congress. If just 7,500 supporters chipped in $3 before midnight, we’ll hit our $60,000 goal – and keep this important fight going strong. [**So please folks, will you please split a $3 donation to power Speak Up PAC and Seth Moulton's grassroots efforts?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111663586/557980025/1833512440?refcode=250717_MFC_SpeakUP_HumblyAsking&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTczZDZkYy00NzYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QT7OnsxVZcg8kpXG-LckIldX4Sj8aHfl0RjYPc341C0=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111663587/557980026/-1446296926?refcode=250717_MFC_SpeakUP_HumblyAsking&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTczZDZkYy00NzYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QT7OnsxVZcg8kpXG-LckIldX4Sj8aHfl0RjYPc341C0=) Sincere thanks, Stacey

body:
This was the Democrats’ plot all along...

This was the Democrats’ plot all along...
| _(**FOR U.S. CITIZENS ONLY**)_
---
Attn: American Patriot
---
President Trump’s border czar, Tom Homan, has officially sounded the alarm.
---
When asked about the MILLIONS of illegals who Joe Biden and the Democrats allowed to pour into our country from 2020 to 2024, here’s what he had to say:
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aOnO/?__vbtrk=MzAzMDk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzMDk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) **_“I think [the Biden] administration thought these millions of people were going to be future Democratic voters. But one of the things Biden also did, in addition to destroying all the programs we put in place to give us the most secure border, he overturned the Trump Census rule, which means _millions of people they release in sanctuary cities will be counted in the next Census_ , which is going to result in what? More seats in the House for the Dems.”_**
---
Simply put, this is a dire moment for our country...
---
**Because of the Democrats' schemes to infiltrate the next Census – _and our elections_ – now more than ever, we need to _VERIFY_ every last voter profile!**

_And that’s where _YOU_ come in._

subject: How we stop Trump's destructive agenda:
body:
Friend, we've gotten this question a lot. Here's the truth:

| |

Team, We've gotten the question a lot: "How do we stop Trump's destructive agenda?" It's a question that's especially urgent following the Trump administrations cuts to Medicaid, and attacks on environmental protections and even Social Security. And here's the truth, friend: **We must win back the House in 2026. ** That's the only way we stop his agenda in its tracks, build an economy that works for working people, and delivers for communities like ours. **Our district is absolutely critical in that fight. name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Good Trouble Still Matters
body:
John Lewis showed us how. Now it's our turn.

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=da1d60ce7e&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=6baeb5ece6&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| **Dear Peter,** I’m thinking about John Lewis today. About what it means to walk into the fire, not away from it. About how he was just twenty-three when he spoke on the steps of the Lincoln Memorial. He had his skull fractured by state troopers on the Edmund Pettus Bridge. He was arrested over forty times for standing up to segregation, racism, and hate. And how even **after all the jail cells, beatings, and threats, he kept fighting back**. Again and again. Because he believed in justice more than comfort.He called it **Good Trouble**. Someone had to stand up against fascists and hate-mongers — and he answered that call. Now again today, someone has to stand up to the bigots, the corporate elite, and billionaire PACs and say, Enough.
**
If you’re with me,**[**I’m asking you to give $27, $54 or as much as you can today to join our movement.**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=37314bbd03&e=5a6ee82cdb)**His fight isn’t over.** Not by a long shot. Voting rights are under attack; book bans and censorship are spreading; and Trump’s regime is fear-mongering with a full-court press.Today we celebrate the life and legacy of John Lewis and continue to work to protect the rights he marched for, bled for, and nearly died for. To defend immigrants and working families from authoritarian overreach. To **stand up to the racists and the billionaires** who want to drag us backwards. We need moral courage in Congress again, not more silence and compromise.That’s what this campaign is about. No shortcuts. No fake promises. Just real work and real people. If you believe in that,**if you’re ready to stir up some Good Trouble of our own,**[**then make a donation today. $27, $54, or $100. Let’s go win this together.**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=ffd5df25af&e=5a6ee82cdb) Let’s Go! **Chris Ahuja** Democratic Candidate for Congress, CA-32

---
| | | | | | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/chrisahuja/ahuja-remembering-john-lewis?e=5a6ee82cdb)
Christopher Ahuja for Congress * 21255 Burbank Blvd Ste 120 * Woodland Hills, CA 91367-6669 * USA

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Republicans voted to strip health care from millions of Americans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
And they are threatening to end Medicaid expansion in North Carolina.

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111664676/557984160/823540626?refcode=ea.f8c58976-4b63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.f8c58976-4b63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGM1ODk3Ni00YjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNFTblXnv8swegla5L3Ts5YauCBJHNSkSozta0QWb8g=&emci=bcb0184e-8562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f8c58976-4b63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1049176)
**Peter, there is no upside to taking health care away from millions of Americans.** Yet Washington Republicans passed a new budget bill that will do just that, even though Donald Trump promised Medicaid and Medicare wouldn’t be touched. Let’s be clear: Americans who rely on Medicaid and federal subsidies under the Affordable Care Act will get sick and die because of this decision. And those of us who are covered by private insurance will be harmed, too. We spent nearly a decade working to expand Medicaid in North Carolina — to help folks get the coverage they need to stay healthy, boost our rural health care system, and help grow our economy. _In 2023, when I was governor, we succeeded. I worked with a bipartisan team of legislators to get expansion passed, and more than 670,000 North Carolinians have enrolled in Medicaid since it was enacted._ **One of the most disturbing consequences of this national GOP bill is that it will likely eliminate health care for those who got it through that expansion, Peter. Rural North Carolinians will be hit hardest.** Medicaid dollars are keeping the doors open at struggling rural hospitals. But now, we’re already seeing reports that at least one rural NC hospital, which had planned to reopen thanks to the funding Medicaid expansion has brought to our state, will likely have to stay closed. North Carolinians’ health and lives are in great jeopardy. **[You stood with me before as we fought to pass Medicaid expansion here in NC. Now, we need to stand together again. Will you let me know you’re with me by adding your name to support health care access for every American?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111664677/557984161/507568809?refcode=ea.f8c58976-4b63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.f8c58976-4b63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGM1ODk3Ni00YjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNFTblXnv8swegla5L3Ts5YauCBJHNSkSozta0QWb8g=&emci=bcb0184e-8562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f8c58976-4b63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111664678/557984162/507568809?refcode=ea.f8c58976-4b63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.f8c58976-4b63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGM1ODk3Ni00YjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNFTblXnv8swegla5L3Ts5YauCBJHNSkSozta0QWb8g=&emci=bcb0184e-8562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f8c58976-4b63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1049176)

clean_body: And they are threatening to end Medicaid expansion in North Carolina. | Peter, there is no upside to taking health care away from millions of Americans. Yet Washington Republicans passed a new budget bill that will do just that, even though Donald Trump promised Medicaid and Medicare wouldn’t be touched. Let’s be clear: Americans who rely on Medicaid and federal subsidies under the Affordable Care Act will get sick and die because of this decision. And those of us who are covered by private insurance will be harmed, too. We spent nearly a decade working to expand Medicaid in North Carolina — to help folks get the coverage they need to stay healthy, boost our rural health care system, and help grow our economy. In 2023, when I was governor, we succeeded. I worked with a bipartisan team of legislators to get expansion passed, and more than 670,000 North Carolinians have enrolled in Medicaid since it was enacted. One of the most disturbing consequences of this national GOP bill is that it will likely eliminate health care for those who got it through that expansion, Peter. Rural North Carolinians will be hit hardest. Medicaid dollars are keeping the doors open at struggling rural hospitals. But now, we’re already seeing reports that at least one rural NC hospital, which had planned to reopen thanks to the funding Medicaid expansion has brought to our state, will likely have to stay closed. North Carolinians’ health and lives are in great jeopardy. | We have work to do, Roy Cooper mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address.
