name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: Defunding public media will impact a generation.
body:
Good Trouble TONIGHT at 5:30pm Majority Baptist Church

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d3a7636b3d48/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6420549?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.

---
|
# Defunding public media will alter access and education for a generation

# Today we celebrate the important work and life of Congressman John Lewis and continue to get into GOOD trouble through [protests ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=398821738f&e=edbde6c9b1)and c[ommunity-level change](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3ba6095ff0&e=edbde6c9b1).
# And on this national day of activation and remembrance the Senate has [voted through a bil](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ed29312374&e=edbde6c9b1)l that will cut $9 Billion in funding for public media and foreign aid.
#
# The House is scheduled to vote on H.R. 4, the Rescissions Act of 2025, by Friday, July 18. CALL YOUR REPRESENTATIVE NOW
# Ralph Norman 202 225 5501
# William Timmons 202 225 6030
|

---
# Like many of you, I grew with a couple of channels in my household and our children’s programming came from PBS and the Corporation for Public Broadcasting. **** I went on to become the Marketing Director for Sesame Street for nearly a decade and have seen first hand how the educational and informative programming offered by public media, especially in rural areas has changed lives. In fact, investment in local stations has actually saved lives, as community members rely on these affiliates for disaster related alerts. We must keep the pressure on. Our future depends on it.
|
---
| **Honor the legacy of Congressman John Lewis on July 17th at 5:30 PM at Majority Baptist Church**
As voter suppression bills like the SAVE Act and efforts to criminalize protest threaten our civil and human rights, we’re standing up to say: the power lies with the people. Join the NAACP Spartanburg 5550 Branch and Reverand Joseph Parks for an evening of Good Trouble at Majority Baptist Church.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=bc3847622f&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [RSVP Here ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3d6eaaa5a8&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | |
---
|
# Hosting Governor Andy Beshear in the Upstate
---
| Yesterday we had the pleasure of hosting Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear on his first visit to South Carolina. Gov Beshear is a three term Democratic Governor in a deeply red state, who has held his seat through his actions. He has implemented extraordinary change through affordable housing, higher wages and a focus on recidivism. We have opportunities up and down the ballot in 2026 and must stay focused.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=19b1273e9a&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Read the full article](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c404abc082&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
# Support my run for Spartanburg County Council
---
| Join me every Sunday for a neighborhood canvass to support my race for Spartanburg County Council! We’ll start at 3pm and you can register to volunteer at the link below.
---
| [Volunteer Sunday’s at 3pm ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e57e278b48&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ed15462044&e=edbde6c9b1)
| **Consider a contribution to help me reach my July fundraising goal.**
---
| [Contribute to Kathryn](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=36a9e02f35&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6243a971e0&e=edbde6c9b1)
| **Early voting for Spartanburg County Sheriff starts Monday, July 21** Earlier this week, Spartanburg voters showed up and asked the tough questions at the Sheriff’s Candidate Forum — vrom public safety and accountability to community trust and transparency, voters deserve to know where each candidate stands. Watch the full forum HERE.Early voting for Sheriff begins July 21 and runs through August 1 at the Spartanburg County Administration Building on Church St, 8 AM to 5 PM, Monday through Friday. Election day is August 5 and the run off is August 19.

---
| [Watch the Forum ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d55f53fbe4&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=82f083de6b&e=edbde6c9b1)
|
---
| July 17: Good Trouble Lives On Event 5:30-7:30pm Majority Baptist Church [**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f5835fb686&e=edbde6c9b1) July 17: Good Trouble Rally at Unity Park Greenville 5:30 [**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4e463a0bda&e=edbde6c9b1) July 20: Rep Ro Khanna, Rep. Jonathan Jackson Greenville 5:30 [**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=07eaf231e8&e=edbde6c9b1) July 21-Aug 1: Early Voting for Primary Election 8:30am-5:00pm 366 N Church St.July 27: Stop the Violence Community Fest 2-7pm Conway Park 103 Pendleton Dr.**Aug 3:** **SPCDP Monthly Meeting at 6pm Dr. TK Gregg Community Center**[**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7f48331be2&e=edbde6c9b1) August 5 Primary Election for Spartanburg County Sheriff and County Council District 3 August 6 Cornerstone Baptist Precinct Town Hall - S. Converse NeighborhoodAugust 13-15 Primary Election Early Voting August 19 Primary Election Runoff (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.)October 21 - 31 Early Voting for the 2025 General Election 8:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily October 20: 2025 General Election (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.)November 4: 2025 General Election (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| This past week I attended the Spartanburg County Sheriff’s Forum hosted by the NAACP with nearly 300 of my fellow community members. I want to thank all nine candidates for agreeing to multiple public forums ahead of the August 5 primary. The level of community engagement has been critical for building the trust and transparency we need right now.
We also welcomed Wofford graduate Hayden Jones to our team! Hayden is operating as our campaign coordinator and we are glad to have him. And finally, we were honored to host Governor Beshear in Greenville yestereday as the first stop on his state-wide tour of SC. Democracy is a participatory experience, join us at [kathrynforcouncil.com](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=56bde9a2e5&e=edbde6c9b1).
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|

---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3a58afa613&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Share this with a friend, sign up for our newsletter using this link: https://bit.ly/KeepingUpWithKathrynHarvey](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d6a66e2811&e=edbde6c9b1)

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Abolish ICE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Trump’s new budget just pumped billions of dollars into ICE. So how
powerful is America’s Gestapo now?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250717?refcode=em20250717-36851&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36851_1203867_qcWIk9&akid=36851%2E1203867%2EqcWIk9 ]Newsweek: ICE Budget Now Bigger Than Most of the World's Militaries

Here’s the terrifying reality: ICE is now better funded than nearly every
military on the planet. Only 15 countries spend more on their armed forces
than we now spend on a single federal agency solely dedicated to
terrorizing immigrant communities.

And we know exactly what this money will fund: More plainclothes officers
kidnapping people off the streets. More homes, churches, workplaces, and
community gathering places being racially targeted. More families ripped
apart by Trump’s mass deportation agenda.

The only way to stop this harm is to ABOLISH ICE.

We don’t need a special enforcement agency charged with targeting
undocumented immigrants – and we certainly don’t need to embolden them
with billions of dollars, especially when poor and working-class people
are struggling to make ends meet.

We must protect the 11 million undocumented immigrants in our country by
fighting for a pathway to citizenship with dignity and justice.

Justice Democrats in Congress are standing up to Trump’s racist agenda and
pushing to dismantle the systems that uphold it. But we need your help.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250717?refcode=em20250717-36851&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36851_1203867_qcWIk9&akid=36851%2E1203867%2EqcWIk9 ]If you’re with us, can you donate your first $5 to help
us elect more leaders who will support abolishing ICE and defend immigrant
communities?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250717?refcode=em20250717-36851&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36851_1203867_qcWIk9&akid=36851%2E1203867%2EqcWIk9 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250717-36851-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36851_1203867_qcWIk9&akid=36851%2E1203867%2EqcWIk9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36851%2E1203867%2EqcWIk9

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Did you vote for me or an activist judge to run the country?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc

body:

|

**BREAKING NEWS: Florida Supreme Court upholds DeSantis’ gerrymandered map — shattering voting rights for Black voters** [**The fight for fair maps is far from over. And we need your support.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111665543/557987129/-1219977196?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_FLDec_email_20250717-AOTL-Tier1-FLDec_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250717-AOTL-Tier1-FLDec_&utm_campaign=FLDec&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzYWM5YWY3LTRlNjMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zJH5maTVzmXvQlrwmjd0biZaxSRdAM4k5qrlLuTpMNg=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111665544/557987130/-1219977196?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_FLDec_email_20250717-AOTL-Tier1-FLDec_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250717-AOTL-Tier1-FLDec_&utm_campaign=FLDec&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzYWM5YWY3LTRlNjMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zJH5maTVzmXvQlrwmjd0biZaxSRdAM4k5qrlLuTpMNg=)
---
Peter,
The Florida Supreme Court just issued a ruling in _Black Voters Matter v. Byrd_ , which leaves the state’s unfairly drawn map in place.
But how did we get here? Florida Governor Ron DeSantis, in an attempt to seize power during the 2022 election, pushed the legislature to pass a discriminatory congressional map that unnecessarily divided Black voters across multiple congressional districts, diminishing the power of those voters by preventing them from electing a candidate of their choice in the state’s 5th Congressional District.
Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, initiated a lawsuit right away, taking Florida to court to restore the power of Black Floridians by challenging the unconstitutional gerrymander, which has now been allowed to stand for the past two elections – even though it blatantly violates the Florida Constitution.
Today’s decision doesn’t just let this unfair and clearly unconstitutional map stand — it gives gerrymanderers a playbook to double down on their attempts to take power away from voters.
**All On The Line is working across the country to fight for equal representation and fair maps, and we can’t do it without grassroots support from people like you.**
[**This case, in just one state, has been a years-long process — and we need to power the grassroots response, because the broader fight is far from over. Please rush in a donation today to power the movement for fair maps nationwide.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111665545/557987131/-1219977196?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_FLDec_email_20250717-AOTL-Tier1-FLDec_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250717-AOTL-Tier1-FLDec_&utm_campaign=FLDec&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzYWM5YWY3LTRlNjMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zJH5maTVzmXvQlrwmjd0biZaxSRdAM4k5qrlLuTpMNg=)

clean_body: Rush an urgent gift to All On The Line today to help keep up the fight for fair maps and fair representation >> | BREAKING NEWS: Florida Supreme Court upholds DeSantis’ gerrymandered map — shattering voting rights for Black voters = | = Peter, The Florida Supreme Court just issued a ruling in Black Voters Matter v. Byrd , which leaves the state’s unfairly drawn map in place. But how did we get here? Florida Governor Ron DeSantis, in an attempt to seize power during the 2022 election, pushed the legislature to pass a discriminatory congressional map that unnecessarily divided Black voters across multiple congressional districts, diminishing the power of those voters by preventing them from electing a candidate of their choice in the state’s 5th Congressional District. Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, initiated a lawsuit right away, taking Florida to court to restore the power of Black Floridians by challenging the unconstitutional gerrymander, which has now been allowed to stand for the past two elections – even though it blatantly violates the Florida Constitution. Today’s decision doesn’t just let this unfair and clearly unconstitutional map stand — it gives gerrymanderers a playbook to double down on their attempts to take power away from voters. All On The Line is working across the country to fight for equal representation and fair maps, and we can’t do it without grassroots support from people like you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, The All On The Line Team is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: Rob Bonta
subject: I’m suing HHS. Read more →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
Far from ‘making America healthier’ — the Trump administration is making it harder to get care.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em250717&t=1&akid=1883%2E1088799%2ESulCLG)
Donald Trump and RFK Jr. have promised to ‘make America healthier’ and lower healthcare costs.
But they’re doing the opposite — RFK Jr.’s Department of Health and Human Services put into effect a rule that makes it _harder and more expensive_ for people to access healthcare under the Affordable Care Act.
[**Not only is this wrong — it violates the law.**](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250717-pet/?t=2&akid=1883%2E1088799%2ESulCLG)
**Today I filed a lawsuit challenging HHS’s illegal rule and asked the court to prevent the unlawful components of it from going into effect.**
Just some of what this rule would do:
* Shorten enrollment periods in state and federal healthcare exchanges, like Covered California
* Drive up out-of-pocket healthcare costs
* Exclude coverage of gender-affirming care as an essential health benefit under the ACA

The rule would result in up to _1.8 million people losing their health insurance_ — and that’s by the administration’s own estimate.
Bottom line: Unless the court intervenes, RFK Jr.’s HHS is going to make it harder and more expensive to get healthcare coverage.
**[If you agree we need to defend access to healthcare and hold RFK Jr. and Donald Trump accountable to the law, please add your name in support.](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250717-pet/?t=3&akid=1883%2E1088799%2ESulCLG)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250717-pet/?t=4&akid=1883%2E1088799%2ESulCLG)**
Thanks for speaking up — I refuse to stand by while the Trump administration puts up these barriers to care. It’s wrong, and it’s illegal.
-Rob
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em250717&t=5&refcode2=1883_1088799_SulCLG&akid=1883%2E1088799%2ESulCLG)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1883%2E1088799%2ESulCLG)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Friend, your membership was brought to my attention
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205g5hlm92zfcppjebdtepqevphn81i0st1h3duwdl69c7csc43acaq5w5lv4lwg3tfp77ur0w61ew0u254&__stmp=szkaee&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szkaee&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol027uh5m0ztq0an2xkpdps0uadch757wnw7flf8azotp8wkykh71hc1rvqx4c6tfjbqyntkjg85l2ryeeu0xb68bwc24cln4bztkct66683380ha1oamwlcur0b5xvs5swvv1kz52xa&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szkaee&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szkaee&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szkaee&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szkaee&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol027uh5m0ztq0an2xkpdps0uadch757wnw7flf8azotp8wkykh71hc1rvqx4c6tfjbqyntkjg85l2ryeeu0xb68bwc24cln4bztkct66683380ha1oamwlcur0b5xvs5swvv1kz52xa&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szkaee&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szkaee&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Tensions boiled over in the Senate Judiciary Committee on Thursday as **[all Democratic members walked out](https://substack.com/redirect/e19ec3a4-593d-48d5-bbfe-3e5fb2795c25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** moments before Republicans pushed through a vote on one of President Donald Trump's judicial nominees, Emil Bove, despite objections over unresolved whistleblower allegations.
**[Sen. Cory Booker's tantrum stole the show:](https://substack.com/redirect/e19ec3a4-593d-48d5-bbfe-3e5fb2795c25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e19ec3a4-593d-48d5-bbfe-3e5fb2795c25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e19ec3a4-593d-48d5-bbfe-3e5fb2795c25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **The walkout followed repeated attempts by Booker** to delay the vote and allow more time to discuss a whistleblower report from former DOJ attorney Erez Reuveni, which raised concerns about Bove's conduct. Chairman Chuck Grassley, R-Iowa, refused.
* **" This lacks decency, this lacks decorum,"** Booker told Grassley. "Debating this [nomination], putting things on the record...Dear God, that's what we are here for."
* **After nearly an hour of debate,** Republicans voted along party lines to advance Bove's nomination to the full Senate, ignoring Democrats' calls to postpone.
* **Senator Sheldon Whitehouse (D-R.I.)** also criticized the process, pointing to opposition from hundreds of former judges and prosecutors before walking out with fellow Democrats.
* **Speaking to reporters after the hearing,** Sen. Richard Blumenthal, D-Conn., called the vote a "blatant violation" of committee rules. "We can disagree about whether they should be on the court, but not about the rules that put them there," Blumenthal said. Grassley defended the move, saying Democrats took similar action in 2023 for former President Biden's judicial nominees.

[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e19ec3a4-593d-48d5-bbfe-3e5fb2795c25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
# President Trump reveals health condition after rising concerns: "In excellent health"
**[President Donald Trump has been diagnosed with chronic venous insufficiency](https://substack.com/redirect/7283121c-a639-475f-941e-9b605e12e44a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after noticing swelling in his lower legs, the White House announced Thursday, addressing concerns over recent bruising seen on his hands.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7283121c-a639-475f-941e-9b605e12e44a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt** said Trump, 79, underwent vascular testing following "mild swelling" and was diagnosed with a "common condition" affecting blood flow, particularly in older adults. "The president underwent a comprehensive examination, including diagnostic vascular studies. Bilateral lower extremity venous doppler ultrasounds were performed and revealed chronic venous insufficiency," Leavitt said to reporters.
* **" There was no evidence** of deep vein thrombosis or arterial disease," Leavitt said, adding that an echocardiogram confirmed normal heart and kidney function.
* **Bruising observed on Trump 's hands** was attributed to "minor soft tissue irritation" caused by frequent handshaking and daily aspirin use for heart health.
* **" The president remains in excellent health,** which I think all of you witness on a daily basis here," Leavitt told reporters. "In the effort of transparency, the president wanted me to share a note from his physician with all of you today."

* * *
# Biden admin spent MILLIONS in tax dollars on swimming pools in third world countries: report
More than **[$1.2 million in taxpayer funds were used](https://substack.com/redirect/3d9de6ac-76af-4719-b73d-e2881465fc7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to upgrade swimming pools at U.S. diplomatic posts in foreigns countries, according to a new analysis released by Sen. Joni Ernst (R-Iowa), who blasted the spending as wasteful and tone-deaf during a time of global crises.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3d9de6ac-76af-4719-b73d-e2881465fc7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The analysis identified 14 pool-related federal contracts** since former President Biden took office, including a $444,000 indoor pool dehumidification system in Baghdad and a $130,000 pool cover upgrade in Zimbabwe.
* **The U.S. Embassy in Moscow received a $40,000** sewer pump replacement for its pool in 2022 -- three months after Russia invaded Ukraine.
* **Projects were identified in seven countries,** including Iraq, Sudan, Haiti, Russia, Ghana, Zimbabwe, and Indonesia. Some of the projects, according to data from USASpending.gov, have yet to be paid out.
* **" Bureaucrats might think wasting millions is a drop in the bucket**, but I am sick and tired of taxpayers getting tossed in the deep end by Washington," Ernst told _The Post_. "I will continue working with the Trump administration to put a stop to the splashy spending of the Biden years," She added, while highlighting ongoing efforts through the Senate DOGE Caucus to uncover federal waste.

* * *
# Columbia University announces new policy to address campus anti-semitism
**[Columbia University announced major policy changes](https://substack.com/redirect/e25f1146-73a1-4f2b-9a68-c90cc1b053a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Tuesday, including a formal adoption of the International Holocaust Remembrance Alliance's (IHRA) definition of antisemitism, as part of ongoing negotiations with the Trump administration following months of federal scrutiny and unrest on campus.
* **The Ivy League school 's new stance redefines antisemitism** to include various forms of anti-Israel rhetoric, such as equating Israeli policy with Nazism or denying Jewish people the right to self-determination.
* **" There is no place for intimidation,** hateful language, or targeting of Jews or Israelis at Columbia," the university said in a statement, pledging "zero tolerance for antisemitism and hate."
* **Columbia also committed to hiring civil rights coordinators** , requiring antisemitism training for students and faculty, and refusing to engage with anti-Israel groups with the move echoing steps already taken by Barnard College, its affiliate.
* **The move follows a Trump administration threat** to revoke $400 million in federal funding due to Columbia's alleged "deliberate indifference" toward antisemitic incidents, including violent pro-Palestine protests in 2023.
* **" In a recent discussion, a faculty member** and I agreed that antisemitism at this institution has existed, perhaps less overtly, for a long while," the university stated. "The work of dismantling it, especially through education and understanding, will take time."

The walkout followed repeated attempts by Booker to delay the vote and allow more time to discuss a whistleblower report from former DOJ attorney Erez Reuveni, which raised concerns about Bove's conduct. Chairman Chuck Grassley, R-Iowa, refused. " This lacks decency, this lacks decorum," Booker told Grassley. "Debating this [nomination], putting things on the record...Dear God, that's what we are here for." After nearly an hour of debate, Republicans voted along party lines to advance Bove's nomination to the full Senate, ignoring Democrats' calls to postpone. Senator Sheldon Whitehouse (D-R.I.) also criticized the process, pointing to opposition from hundreds of former judges and prosecutors before walking out with fellow Democrats. Speaking to reporters after the hearing, Sen. Richard Blumenthal, D-Conn., called the vote a "blatant violation" of committee rules. "We can disagree about whether they should be on the court, but not about the rules that put them there," Blumenthal said. Grassley defended the move, saying Democrats took similar action in 2023 for former President Biden's judicial nominees. **I lost count of the number of people who told me they’ve never been this fired up about Virginia’s elections.**

Why?

**Because they know our elections are our chance to give Trump his first report card** – and after he’s skyrocketed our unemployment, fired thousands of our dedicated federal workers, and ripped away health care to pay for tax cuts for billionaires, _folks are ready to give him his grade_.

We talked a lot about what’s at stake in 2026, too – about how important it is to take back the Senate majority for Democrats.

We talked about how winning this year and next means we can finally hold Trump – and his acolytes in Congress – accountable.

**My point is, folks are fired up and ready to stop Trump and his allies from expanding their foothold of power in Virginia and Washington.**

clean_body: | | | = Derek, Last week, I was in Henrico County canvassing with May Nivar, who’s running to flip a critical House of Delegates seat for Democrats. | = | = | = ---|---|--- I lost count of the number of people who told me they’ve never been this fired up about Virginia’s elections. Why? Because they know our elections are our chance to give Trump his first report card – and after he’s skyrocketed our unemployment, fired thousands of our dedicated federal workers, and ripped away health care to pay for tax cuts for billionaires, folks are ready to give him his grade. We talked a lot about what’s at stake in 2026, too – about how important it is to take back the Senate majority for Democrats. We talked about how winning this year and next means we can finally hold Trump – and his acolytes in Congress – accountable. My point is, folks are fired up and ready to stop Trump and his allies from expanding their foothold of power in Virginia and Washington. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = The fight continues, Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

subject: The voter registration deadlines we're up against this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=oXIhUjZQvJoGmri+6mI2AQOEC9YC54kLUReYsl486yEcopETV33Nn1PdrX1/6BaeUJyFqtlimRhi3izKh7lKc0tsxvzmRLUQJ5Jm/rH2ZeI=]
2025 may be an "off year" election as far as Congress goes, but that doesn't mean we don't have important elections this year or we can take a break with our voter registration work, folks.
Voter registration is open in New Jersey until October 14th -- and early voting starts on October 25th. Control of their state legislature hangs in the balance, while it's also an open race for governor as the current governor is term-limited.
Voters can register in Virginia until October 24th , with early voting starting on September 19th. Virginia's legislature is also up for grabs, plus the opportunity to replace the current vote-suppressing governor (who is also term-limited) with someone who will protect voting in the commonwealth again.
Our mission is simple: The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help .
It costs us roughly $3 to register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=24.00&contactdata=oXIhUjZQvJoGmri+6mI2AQOEC9YC54kLUReYsl486yEcopETV33Nn1PdrX1/6BaeUJyFqtlimRhi3izKh7lKc0tsxvzmRLUQJ5Jm/rH2ZeI=]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:

Yes, there have been a few special elections to fill vacancies, but these elections are our first real opportunity to fight back against the widespread efforts to dismantle our democracy. The results will determine whether our country stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and keep working toward a better future.
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming states nationwide with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- will absolutely tip the scales of these elections towards justice. Please pitch in with $24 or whatever you can to help us register a tidal wave of new voters this year! >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/NghmuUMvWUyqBjVyBWD3rQ2?am=24.00&contactdata=oXIhUjZQvJoGmri+6mI2AQOEC9YC54kLUReYsl486yEcopETV33Nn1PdrX1/6BaeUJyFqtlimRhi3izKh7lKc0tsxvzmRLUQJ5Jm/rH2ZeI=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

body:
Former GOP State Senator Scott Jensen has jumped into the race for Governor of Minnesota. | | | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111666855/557991507/1882300756?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjlkMDM1Yy01MjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6gbQI6qq1vNil1x9JvnQZq11bxtcroMd3QSH5iYPKsc=)****BREAKING:** Extremist Republican Scott Jensen has announced another run for Minnesota Governor
---
Peter, Former GOP State Senator Scott Jensen has jumped into the race for Governor of Minnesota. **This is not his first run, Peter. He also ran for governor in 2022, and because of that, we know exactly what we’re dealing with: an extreme, right-wing conspiracy theorist who does not represent Minnesota’s values.** Jensen made a name for himself by spreading disinformation and wild conspiracy theories. But if you thought his extremism stopped there, think again. When Jensen ran in 2022, he said he’d ban abortion outright in Minnesota. If elected, he would govern as another unhinged MAGA extremist who would do Trump’s bidding without hesitation and try to force his dangerous agenda on all of us. **We’re going to do everything in our power to ensure Scott Jensen will never be Governor of Minnesota. But to do that, we need to make sure we have the resources to warn Minnesotans about the threat he poses right out of the gate.** According to our records, you still haven’t claimed your 2025 Political Contribution Refund (PCR). That means you can give $75 (or $150 for couples) to our party and receive a full refund from the state. [**We’re $7,885 short of this week’s goal and have less than 48 hours to close the gap. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Update for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#

Peter, Just a couple of weeks after ripping health care and food assistance away from working families and giving a handout to billionaires, Donald Trump and his GOP allies are ramming through yet another betrayal of the American people through the Senate. Republicans are rushing to pass their bill before a deadline tomorrow, and there’s a reason why: **They don’t want the American public to know that they’re trying to cut even more funding.** It was quite rich to hear my Republican colleagues applaud cutting funding for public safety broadcasting systems and giving themselves a pat on the back for “restoring fiscal sanity.” Let’s be clear about this: a $9 billion cut to foreign aid and public broadcasting will not repair the $3 trillion hole they blew in the budget for their billionaire tax breaks. **[And I’m also going to continue supporting Senate Democratic candidates across the country so we can secure a majority that puts working families — not billionaires — first. name: Team Schiff
subject: What’s next
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8783%2E5257348%2EXDRx53)
**Derek — let us tell you where we’re at.**
Republicans in Congress sent the Big Ugly Bill to Trump’s desk, which will kick millions of people off their health care, all to fund tax cuts for America’s wealthiest individuals.
**Adam voted HELL NO** on this legislation because he knows that we should be finding better solutions to tackle rising costs, not gutting our public safety nets to hand more money over to wealthy people and big corporations.
As Adam said, it is one of the most shameful bills ever passed by a Congress.
He’s ready to work with anyone to lower costs for hard-working families, protect Californians from wildfires, increase the affordable housing supply, and so much more.
_**This bill ain’t that.** It will raise costs, kick people off their healthcare, and give the rich yet a handout they neither deserve nor need._
**[But we’ll need a strong grassroots base to reach voters across California and beyond to build the coalition we need to secure a Senate majority. Can we count on your monthly support to help us build this team?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/4598?c0=q32025_abs_em.B2ZqEk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250717_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8783%2E5257348%2EXDRx53)**

Thanks for standing with us in this fight,
Team Schiff

clean_body: The Swamp is shaking—we’re forcing a vote on the Epstein files Peter , It's happening. I just co-sponsored a bill with Rep. Thomas Massie to force the FULL RELEASE of the Epstein files-- Because the American people deserve to know: 👉 Who was involved? 👉 How far did the corruption go? 👉 And why has justice STILL not been served? We've waited long enough. Joe Biden's DOJ IGNORED it. The media WON 'T investigate. And the Swamp is hoping we forget. But we won't. That's why we're introducing a discharge petition to FORCE a vote in the House of Representatives to release the FULL , UNREDACTED Epstein files. 👉 No cover-ups 👉 No black bars 👉 No more lies We've seen the playbook. The elites get away with everything. And WE THE PEOPLE are left in the dark. But not this time. I'm PROUD to have co-sponsored this bill with Congressman Thomas Massie, and now we need YOUR help to turn up the pressure. We're building a grassroots army to demand action. We need 10,000 America First PATRIOTS to speak out in YOUR AREA. Add your name before midnight to DEMAND the truth be revealed. Patriot, this is about more than just a list of names. name: Daniel Keenan
subject: My parents got their start cleaning houses.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Daniel Keenan for Congress
body:
| Hello Patriot, Yes, it's true. My parents got started by cleaning houses. Then they started building them, and I followed in their footsteps. I invite you to hear my story and learn why I'm running for Congress in this brief video. You can see it on my website at [https://DanielKeenanforCongress.com/intro](https://contact.danielkeenanforcongress.com/l/mSfSkzsIqMjwhbMhvYtrcQ/Gf892iaiKK4YxMewb9s6NGDQ/RQpK5I9892hQ55c1zzCaqXSg). **Daniel Keenan**

body:
Chris is focused on what really matters.
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Chris Pappas is running for Senate in New Hampshire and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from his team, and [**rush a split donation between Chris's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=partner_ms_cp_em_kelly.9qM-X9&refcode=em250717-1-700&t=1&akid=6124%2E6688874%2Egjp087)
---
Big news, team:
**Another Republican just entered the primary for New Hampshire’s Senate seat.**
He’s another Trump rubber stamp — he even refused to accept the results of the 2020 election.
That means Scott Brown and the growing GOP field will be facing off to see who can appease the MAGA loyalists the most and earn Donald Trump’s endorsement in this race.
While the Republicans wade through their messy primary, **Chris Pappas is focused on what really matters — standing up for Granite Staters and fighting for our future.**
Chris has won competitive elections in New Hampshire four times in a row. But he can’t win this fight alone. He is relying on the support of this grassroots team to make sure we can defeat whichever MAGA clone the Republicans decide to nominate against him.
[**We need you, friend. Please, split $3 right now between Chris and Mark Kelly to fuel Chris’s campaign!**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=partner_ms_cp_em_kelly.9qM-X9&refcode=em250717-1-700&t=2&akid=6124%2E6688874%2Egjp087)

# [Will The Epstein Files Finally Doom the MAGA Cult?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168529634&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NTI5NjM0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTI3ODc3MTksImV4cCI6MTc1NTM3OTcxOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.A2DEerfQ77hgBNhsuUxnEScBOOee_7_d3WYk7fMyw70)
### I can't for sure say Trump is guilty, but his actions are exactly what someone guilty of what's in the Epstein files would do
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jul 17
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168529634&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NTI5NjM0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1Mjc4NzcxOSwiZXhwIjoxNzU1Mzc5NzE5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.afqiFXTa0zIePsFBrCODgaVaOCCz98X69GXgDjkn6CY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168529634&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NTI5NjM0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTI3ODc3MTksImV4cCI6MTc1NTM3OTcxOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.A2DEerfQ77hgBNhsuUxnEScBOOee_7_d3WYk7fMyw70&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168529634&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NTI5NjM0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTI3ODc3MTksImV4cCI6MTc1NTM3OTcxOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.A2DEerfQ77hgBNhsuUxnEScBOOee_7_d3WYk7fMyw70)
---
| | [](https://substack..mrT65ddrv_mjlWd96o5KSMj5T5eK5OOcTuqFm-EC_jM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/will-the-epstein-files-finally-doom?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Donald Trump promised to drain the swamp. Instead, he's drowning it in impunity.
He _ran_ on releasing the Jeffrey Epstein files. He said he'd bring justice. Now he pretends they don't exist--and fires the very prosecutors bringing predators to justice. We knew he was lying the entire time, and so little of this is surprising. What is shocking, however, is that polls have Trump's approval on the Epstein case at an abysmal 3 percent. **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..DI3_SvGqRaRlLmzSj_AJxdHIfhN1IEdVVpnMAVwBPeI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168529634)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6f2434b9-9175-4273-89f4-6f904abe27b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Jeffrey Epstein (L) and Donald Trump (R)
## Trump's Acts of Guilt
Let's recap. Immediately after taking office Donald Trump tried to fire the Inspectors General who keep government accountable. Shortly thereafter, Trump successfully fired the FBI agents who prosecuted the January 6 insurrectionists, which included Nazis, and then pardoned the Nazis. And now, Donald Trump has fired Maurene Comey, the attorney who prosecuted Sean Combs, Ghislaine Maxwell, and one Jeffery Epstein.
It should surprise no one that [Epstein described himself as](https://substack.com/redirect/22cb5549-c7d3-419e-ac4d-4376acf74670?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "Donald Trump's closest friend." Trump in return [said about Epstein](https://substack.com/redirect/c52fb1c4-943f-431a-83d0-3ae8de8e284d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "I've known Jeff for 15 years. Terrific guy. It is even said that he likes beautiful women as much as I do, and many of them are on the younger side."
Here's the truth. A man who aligns himself with child rapists like Jeffery Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell, fires Inspector Generals, pardons Nazis, and fires the people prosecuting sex criminals, is a man who is telling you clearly that he is a Nazi and sex abuser who wants to avoid accountability. And while he still enjoys plenty of support in the GOP, even Speaker Mike Johnson is now claiming he wants the Epstein files released.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9b101c5e-da7b-422f-81ec-8982948eef5b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Sadly, Johnson's vote doesn't match his words, and when given the chance to release these files, he balked and ordered Republicans to vote unanimously to censor them. Meanwhile, Politico [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/65b8656d-17d6-4215-81d4-b5811774e30a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on numerous polls showing just how outraged Americans are at Trump's handling of the Epstein matter:
> Only 17 percent of all respondents to the Quinnipiac poll said they approved of the administration's handling of the Epstein files, compared to 63 percent who said they disapproved and 20 percent not offering an opinion. The Reuters/Ipsos poll reflected similar numbers, with 17 percent of respondents saying they approved of Trump's handling of the situation. And only 3 percent of adults in a [Tuesday CNN/SSRS poll](https://substack.com/redirect/8d94e976-abd7-4475-8ab5-ded0ce7612a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) said that they were satisfied with the amount of information the government has released thus far on the case.
Three percent approval! This is the thread Trump is hanging by. So desperate is Trump that for the first time, he disclosed a medical condition, perhaps in an attempt to gain sympathy and distract from the near certainty that he is in the Epstein files.
## MAGAs Fall In Line
Unfortunately, even among that 3% support, MAGAs are exhibiting grotesque loyalty to Trump. This week they voted near unanimously to block release of the Epstein files, after Democratic Congressman Ro Khanna and Republican Congressman Thomas Massie forced a vote on the issue. And some MAGAs are even going as far as to justify the rape of children. For example, prominent 'Christian' evangelist Brad Faciti posted the following horrifying approval of apparent child rape:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6c0762be-46df-42fd-879b-bc356c6c26da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Reprehensible doesn't begin to describe the depravity exhibited here. Meanwhile, Pam Bondi--the same Florida Attorney General who years ago helped _bury_ the Epstein case--is once again running interference for Trump. Somehow she went from "it's on my desk" to "it doesn't exist."
MAGA Congresswoman Nancy Mace of South Carolina often discusses the horrific sexual assault she suffered. Yet, after supporting a man credibly accused of rape by dozens of women, she now calls for capital punishment for child rapists--and somehow simultaneously uses her power in Congress to _protect_ them.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/89c6c2dd-aea7-4433-82ee-8b41f691c6b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This isn't about policy. It's about cruelty. Cruelty as governance. Hypocrisy as strategy. Because after all, if the Epstein files really don't exist, then MAGA Republicans are claiming that Ghislaine Maxwell is serving 20 years behind prison on false convictions of child trafficking. So why aren't they calling for her release? It's quite simple--because they know she is guilty, and the fear Trump is as well.
MAGA Republicans are proclaiming to the world that they have no moral compass. No values. No vision. Just a hunger for unchecked power. They will say _anything_ , do _anything_ , burn _anyone_ --so long as it feeds the beast of authoritarianism they've come to worship. And before closing, I must mention the abject failure of corporate media.
Where is corporate media on all this? Silent. Not one universal editorial call for the release of the Epstein files. Not one major network demanding Trump resign for this grotesque lie. Not one consistent headline stating the obvious: a man protecting Nazis and child sex abusers _is_ a Nazi sympathizer and an enabler of abuse.
This isn't just cowardice--it's complicity.
## Conclusion
This moment demands clarity--and courage. Donald Trump didn't stumble into protecting Nazis and sex criminals. He's making deliberate choices that reflect who he is and what he values: power without accountability, loyalty without truth, and cruelty without consequence.
We cannot normalize this. We cannot become numb to it. We must keep asking questions, keep raising our voices, and keep the pressure on--not just on Trump, but on the institutions and media outlets that continue to shield him. Whether the Epstein files finally doom the MAGA cult, or not, will in part depend on our willingness to relentlessly demand accountability and justice.
If we fail to act, we don't just fail survivors--we risk failing the next generation who will live in the world we allowed to rot. I'm committed to continuing this work--calling out injustice, exposing corruption, and telling the truth when others won't. But I can't do it without your support. So I'm asking: Keep the pressure on. Demand the release of the Epstein files. Call out the enablers. And if you believe in this work, please support it. Share this post. Subscribe. Tell your friends. Help amplify the truth.

Peter, it _amazes_ me how low the GOP will go.

_Just this year, Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans have:_

❌ Destroyed Medicaid for nearly **17 million** people.
❌ Slashed **$300 billion** from SNAP for vulnerable Americans.
❌ Cut taxes to help billionaires but **hurt working families.**
❌ Defied court orders and issued pardons for **January 6 criminals.**
❌ Paved the way to **abolish** the Department of Education.
❌ And Trump has suggested running for an unconstitutional, unprecedented **THIRD term,** _with support from House Republicans!_

These policy choices aren’t just _dangerous_ – they’re also deeply unpopular. This is what happens when politicians bend to the will of Donald Trump, instead of fighting for their own constituents. **In November, Republicans will pay the price for their actions — and _inaction._**

[That’s why I’m reaching out today, Peter: We can deliver MAJOR defeat to MAGA Republicans if we all work together to flip the House, protect my seat, and end Trump’s MAGA trifecta in Congress and the White House. body:
Trump is holding BILLIONS of dollars in education funding hostage, just weeks before schools are set to reopen for the Fall semester.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111667578/557993861/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTg5ODY5My01NTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2XZxuJ7qNcLmDI4lKE71sUd2953NoKAl4WtddewDGSc=) _You need to see this:_ **_NPR: Trump Administration withholds $6.8 billion in education grants from schools_** **Right now, Donald Trump is holding BILLIONS of dollars in education funding hostage,_just weeks before schools are set to reopen for the Fall semester._** Hours before the grant money — _integral for after-school activities, teacher training, and programs for students learning English_ — was scheduled to disburse to school districts across the country, Trump’s Department of Education froze the payments without giving ANY prior notice. Now, school districts in Oregon and across the country might be forced to reduce hours, shut down student programs, or even cut faculty and staff if Trump refuses to release the funds before their budget plans need to be finalized. But these funds were previously approved by Congress — **_the President does not hold the power to unilaterally freeze these grants without Congressional approval._** **[So we’re calling on every member of this grassroots team _(including you!)_ to help us raise hell and force the Trump administration to release this critical funding NOW, before it’s too late. Can we count on you to add your name? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111667579/557993862/-2071813735?refcode=email_071725_edu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTg5ODY5My01NTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2XZxuJ7qNcLmDI4lKE71sUd2953NoKAl4WtddewDGSc=&emci=7cf42b95-4e63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=79898693-5563-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5643047)** | | **[ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111667580/557993863/-2071813735?refcode=email_071725_edu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTg5ODY5My01NTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2XZxuJ7qNcLmDI4lKE71sUd2953NoKAl4WtddewDGSc=&emci=7cf42b95-4e63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=79898693-5563-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5643047)**

name: A warning
subject: The looming Pearl Harbor moment for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvzBxudtH_vIszJQvgmsF458zzn1DxuV4pWF8dF3oKeGIVoA9h0PHurKF9U18OGMx8BF8ROcj4Ye1HdqCI0h1DcAinFjRYu-k1cLE79jybTdQth70eBIKp4mZPG3hL4y2fpkwwFUdxiuorzHX980fYK5TbaZj69h4mB2N8j2tjIIt6TCf-OlElHeTPTocED60_tfCxBb-aBq2PjQIe2moPZZiuZEXL5Gnuq56fYH26RWd4rwI_0f8wtocUYdB_0Zytx5NfvbPGs5pBPMB04xzIWLkhpTwzhtFSbC3xUli9R3pKdL71lorEXdM_OizOMCtZXlSNlcJBAP-tM8NIoMxZUQQ8vb1S5NjpwLCfcQO28ApjEkY7Zh1Wzm-zOq2M-VHAZhUEI39_M2aUxXDqGt57R/4i9/tPqVPwizSFmwTD9llCrJwA/h0/h001.4dWqFEf0snJpTc3SZv31JAo3-8kxcGHJNE32EFNlQyk)
---
Friend, In Spring 2025, Democrats narrowly avoided a catastrophic defeat in the Wisconsin Supreme Court. A loss here would've meant an extreme MAGA majority on Wisconsin's Supreme Court that would've taken this key swing state out of the cards for Dems in 2026 and in 2028--where Trump is suggesting he'll seek reelection. We won here because we mobilized the might of the entire Democratic party around this singular race. **In November 2025, Dems in Pennsylvania face a court election with identical stakes but this time we are heading into it woefully unprepared:**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvzBxudtH_vIszJQvgmsF458zzn1DxuV4pWF8dF3oKeGIVoA9h0PHurKF9U18OGMx8BF8ROcj4Ye1HdqCI0h1DctkAPUGT02DUzW1L0BOHVNjmHwiBTxzInhTrD48nBuPSJLKpMy1IFNhZD_rsnpX5wFM9b8oImVKh5cF_uK_GbP8gttII_6Y57FQ8ejP_AGEuqBwI5FYSHNw3oqfupvYk71X1mu-ZMMh8VWbP3FlRBwMMAuUxlLlU7EyMWMnjBSmgPezdjgdPL0hhgq4i43I0OZVifeHaBnRnNKxWyXTejVS3VNjGzt2zg3SUJrHrwA7hEWW0vpauWJLvfhE--qdCzimwG46PoHZLM6-GulpIw5r9Eh6seuq1tAN-0iZ0pHyHCH3YL9OVa2YAiHyMFTXQH/4i9/tPqVPwizSFmwTD9llCrJwA/h1/h001.HGHs5qrXf9msXn8PAKR1MwvodsmpaPAs8thb4CoTiS8)
---
**Unless we act quickly, Democrats are on track for a Pearl Harbor moment in Pennsylvania.** The consequence of a Democratic loss in the November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election means the permanent loss of Pennsylvania as a swing state for Democrats, bringing us one step closer to permanent MAGA electoral control. In Wisconsin, we were able to compete with the tens of millions that MAGA pumped into the race because that race was the only show in town--barely any Democrats had announced their 2026 campaigns meaning Democrats could focus almost solely on Wisconsin. **We do not have this luxury for the Pennsylvania 2025 Supreme Court fight.** Defend our Courts is at the forefront of the fight to defend the Democratic majority on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court and we've only raised $300k since we launched in May, but fundraising has drastically slowed this month. To compete with MAGA we will need tens of millions before November...
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvzBxudtH_vIszJQvgmsF458zzn1DxuV4pWF8dF3oKeGIVoA9h0PHurKF9U18OGMx8BF8ROcj4Ye1HdqCI0h1Dcfpz9rpuMF6qPZjsvACilChkQy4j3MAYuKMgvSp89rCWXuoYov_tQO5SchYSxJt6ZoIkvaAqAGFbOoT2-aHD2MgO6nDzvjY8txCCL1ghWAw38OjW0IpVWx7ik8j28ybrm1EqB5fRJxnArQ8wOsm5qFkLSDH-iLjexRNDiXCJeyPl-NGJ-KJ-fZcsKzH0btsXn9uLmAibChsMjvpNFVzvmaBVI3KANfUJuhuESTQhAk4tDsyGZmsGC4zKzezOZ6n4onnX7xgPRsmKD1FfCeaJEZ3K18AZnWATEVcvRmL7GKEYpv4uUqNuSMv1H1w4QH-aG/4i9/tPqVPwizSFmwTD9llCrJwA/h2/h001.25aFDSXLi2i6tj0FGe3HRsouCGFVClbnCVg4vz2Cko4)
---
We launched in May with a strong start but as competition for resources increases heading into midterm season, fundraising has dropped off. We need your help to regain our momentum.
---

clean_body: | | Friend, In Spring 2025, Democrats narrowly avoided a catastrophic defeat in the Wisconsin Supreme Court. A loss here would've meant an extreme MAGA majority on Wisconsin's Supreme Court that would've taken this key swing state out of the cards for Dems in 2026 and in 2028--where Trump is suggesting he'll seek reelection. We won here because we mobilized the might of the entire Democratic party around this singular race. In November 2025, Dems in Pennsylvania face a court election with identical stakes but this time we are heading into it woefully unprepared: | Unless we act quickly, Democrats are on track for a Pearl Harbor moment in Pennsylvania. The consequence of a Democratic loss in the November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election means the permanent loss of Pennsylvania as a swing state for Democrats, bringing us one step closer to permanent MAGA electoral control. In Wisconsin, we were able to compete with the tens of millions that MAGA pumped into the race because that race was the only show in town--barely any Democrats had announced their 2026 campaigns meaning Democrats could focus almost solely on Wisconsin. We do not have this luxury for the Pennsylvania 2025 Supreme Court fight. Defend our Courts is at the forefront of the fight to defend the Democratic majority on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court and we've only raised $300k since we launched in May, but fundraising has drastically slowed this month. To compete with MAGA we will need tens of millions before November... | We launched in May with a strong start but as competition for resources increases heading into midterm season, fundraising has dropped off. We need your help to regain our momentum. Half of July. August. September. October. Three and a half months. That 's how long we have to prevent this looming disaster in Pennsylvania. We're going to need all the help we can get. Defend Our Courts Fighting for Justice. Powered by You. | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . **Disaster Relief Available for Flood-Affected Residents**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bad573a1-191d-4c90-b0d4-77e28efbfb46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Our hearts continue to go out to everyone impacted by the devastating floods that swept through Central Texas over the July 4th weekend. We know many families--including some within our REALTOR® community--are facing difficult days ahead. If you--or someone you know--suffered damage to a primary residence during the July 4th weekend flooding, assistance may be available through the Texas REALTORS® Disaster Relief Fund.
Please click the button below for the [Texas REALTORS® Disaster Relief Fund ](https://substack.com/redirect/66d44439-9720-464c-b6fa-3e52117ba176?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[Application](https://substack.com/redirect/25e8292b-e782-4b09-92ee-1a6f34044905?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
_Who is eligible to apply?_
Texas residents whose primary residence was damaged and who live in a county listed in the Governor's disaster declaration: Bexar, Burnet, Caldwell, Gaudalupe, Travis, and Williamson. Only one application per residence is allowed.
_What must be submitted with the application?_
* A valid photo ID
* Proof of residence that matches the affected address
* If insured, documentation showing the insurance claim, deductible, and payout amount

Application Deadline: All applications must be submitted by September 30, 2025.
To apply or learn more, please visit our website: [Williamson County Disaster Relief](https://substack.com/redirect/3ca4f59b-d4c5-45ac-ab23-7600887d4ddf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

**" Greg Abbott logs $20M campaign haul after school voucher win," **Texas Tribune's **Hayden Betts** -- "Gov. **Greg Abbott** raised more than $20 million for his campaign over just eight days in June -- a haul that came after a legislative session that saw the Texas Republican [sign long-sought private school vouchers](https://substack.com/redirect/1b3d40f7-0323-4326-bbf5-d477919e35e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into law and [veto a ban on hemp-derived THC products](https://substack.com/redirect/dcd3c944-369a-46dd-b1f4-854f6a77f82b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

The Republican now has a whopping $87.2 million in his campaign war chest as he gears up to run for a record-breaking fourth term. He has yet to draw a high-profile Democratic challenger.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/f3b9b49a-c923-4192-95af-5efcb89be121?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Four donors cut Abbott $1 million checks last month in a state with no limit on campaign contributions, [the filing shows](https://substack.com/redirect/17e58015-641b-4e2d-822d-0144bdece8bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

They include **Kenneth Fisher** , who heads the financial investment firm Fisher Investments; real estate titan **Edward Roski, Jr**., a California billionaire who is part owner of the Los Angeles Lakers; and **Kelcy Warren** , a Dallas pipeline company executive who Abbott appointed to the University of Texas System board of regents. All are longtime donors to the governor and each gave the Texas Republican $1 million in June.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/f3b9b49a-c923-4192-95af-5efcb89be121?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Abbott also received a $1 million check from the Peachtree Trust, which is based in West Lake Hills and has virtually no public presence. A website that records show was registered in June and has the same name as the trust includes only the tagline "a living, lasting legacy." That trust responded that it is affiliated with a church in Georgia and has not made any gifts to any organizations in Texas. The donation appears to be the trust's first-ever to a Texas official.

The governor also received $500,000 from **Mackenzie Price,** the co-founder of the Alpha School, a private school that uses artificial intelligence to teach core subjects.

The massive haul comes after the governor logged a series of long-sought wins during the legislative session, including school voucher legislation that once seemed impossible. The law, which rolls out in the 2026-27 school year, allows public dollars to be spent on private education and had long been blocked by the GOP-led House.

The governor's campaign touted that more than 90% of funds raised came from Texans.

"Support from thousands of donors across the state reflect the unwavering trust Texans have in Governor Abbott's strong leadership," campaign manager **Kim Snyder** said in a statement. "The broad backing we've received proves that Texans are committed to keeping our state strong, secure, and prosperous."" [Hou Chron](https://substack.com/redirect/ad786246-8862-48e7-a564-d57f61c51702?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

If you--or someone you know--suffered damage to a primary residence during the July 4th weekend flooding, assistance may be available through the Texas REALTORS® Disaster Relief Fund. Please click the button below for the . Who is eligible to apply? Texas residents whose primary residence was damaged and who live in a county listed in the Governor's disaster declaration: Bexar, Burnet, Caldwell, Gaudalupe, Travis, and Williamson. Only one application per residence is allowed. What must be submitted with the application? A valid photo ID Proof of residence that matches the affected address If insured, documentation showing the insurance claim, deductible, and payout amount Application Deadline: All applications must be submitted by September 30, 2025. To apply or learn more, please visit our website: TOP NEWS " Greg Abbott logs $20M campaign haul after school voucher win," Texas Tribune's Hayden Betts -- "Gov. Greg Abbott raised more than $20 million for his campaign over just eight days in June -- a haul that came after a legislative session that saw the Texas Republican into law and . The Republican now has a whopping $87.2 million in his campaign war chest as he gears up to run for a record-breaking fourth term. He has yet to draw a high-profile Democratic challenger. Four donors cut Abbott $1 million checks last month in a state with no limit on campaign contributions, . They include Kenneth Fisher , who heads the financial investment firm Fisher Investments; real estate titan Edward Roski, Jr., a California billionaire who is part owner of the Los Angeles Lakers; and Kelcy Warren , a Dallas pipeline company executive who Abbott appointed to the University of Texas System board of regents. All are longtime donors to the governor and each gave the Texas Republican $1 million in June. Abbott also received a $1 million check from the Peachtree Trust, which is based in West Lake Hills and has virtually no public presence. A website that records show was registered in June and has the same name as the trust includes only the tagline "a living, lasting legacy." That trust responded that it is affiliated with a church in Georgia and has not made any gifts to any organizations in Texas. The donation appears to be the trust's first-ever to a Texas official. The governor also received $500,000 from Mackenzie Price, the co-founder of the Alpha School, a private school that uses artificial intelligence to teach core subjects. The massive haul comes after the governor logged a series of long-sought wins during the legislative session, including school voucher legislation that once seemed impossible. The law, which rolls out in the 2026-27 school year, allows public dollars to be spent on private education and had long been blocked by the GOP-led House. The governor's campaign touted that more than 90% of funds raised came from Texans. "Support from thousands of donors across the state reflect the unwavering trust Texans have in Governor Abbott's strong leadership," campaign manager Kim Snyder said in a statement. "The broad backing we've received proves that Texans are committed to keeping our state strong, secure, and prosperous."" Our hearts continue to go out to everyone impacted by the devastating floods that swept through Central Texas over the July 4th weekend. We know many families--including some within our REALTOR® community--are facing difficult days ahead. If you--or someone you know--suffered damage to a primary residence during the July 4th weekend flooding, assistance may be available through the Texas REALTORS® Disaster Relief Fund.
Please click the button below for the [Texas REALTORS® Disaster Relief Fund ](https://substack.com/redirect/e43f0bed-c154-4f62-a8a6-4e7326392516?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[Application](https://substack.com/redirect/9e5d62a4-b545-4d7c-a7cb-3b85dab4abe3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
_Who is eligible to apply?_
Texas residents whose primary residence was damaged and who live in a county listed in the Governor's disaster declaration: Bexar, Burnet, Caldwell, Gaudalupe, Travis, and Williamson. Only one application per residence is allowed.
_What must be submitted with the application?_
* A valid photo ID
* Proof of residence that matches the affected address
* If insured, documentation showing the insurance claim, deductible, and payout amount

Application Deadline: All applications must be submitted by September 30, 2025.
To apply or learn more, please visit our website: [Williamson County Disaster Relief](https://substack.com/redirect/9a33f414-70ef-4618-9878-c037ef9b5180?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

**" Greg Abbott logs $20M campaign haul after school voucher win," **Texas Tribune's **Hayden Betts** -- "Gov. **Greg Abbott** raised more than $20 million for his campaign over just eight days in June -- a haul that came after a legislative session that saw the Texas Republican [sign long-sought private school vouchers](https://substack.com/redirect/56f7a621-39f5-4e9a-a39f-834b7cdaf93c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into law and [veto a ban on hemp-derived THC products](https://substack.com/redirect/a1ab6af2-d138-4442-92ba-65627517a5b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

The Republican now has a whopping $87.2 million in his campaign war chest as he gears up to run for a record-breaking fourth term. He has yet to draw a high-profile Democratic challenger.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/cfe3792e-d7f3-44bd-9493-e9604284ef9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Four donors cut Abbott $1 million checks last month in a state with no limit on campaign contributions, [the filing shows](https://substack.com/redirect/03b383b3-9f76-4a6a-9b24-538ac3673eb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

They include **Kenneth Fisher** , who heads the financial investment firm Fisher Investments; real estate titan **Edward Roski, Jr**., a California billionaire who is part owner of the Los Angeles Lakers; and **Kelcy Warren** , a Dallas pipeline company executive who Abbott appointed to the University of Texas System board of regents. All are longtime donors to the governor and each gave the Texas Republican $1 million in June.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/cfe3792e-d7f3-44bd-9493-e9604284ef9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Abbott also received a $1 million check from the Peachtree Trust, which is based in West Lake Hills and has virtually no public presence. A website that records show was registered in June and has the same name as the trust includes only the tagline "a living, lasting legacy." That trust responded that it is affiliated with a church in Georgia and has not made any gifts to any organizations in Texas. The donation appears to be the trust's first-ever to a Texas official.

The governor also received $500,000 from **Mackenzie Price,** the co-founder of the Alpha School, a private school that uses artificial intelligence to teach core subjects.

The massive haul comes after the governor logged a series of long-sought wins during the legislative session, including school voucher legislation that once seemed impossible. The law, which rolls out in the 2026-27 school year, allows public dollars to be spent on private education and had long been blocked by the GOP-led House.

The governor's campaign touted that more than 90% of funds raised came from Texans.

"Support from thousands of donors across the state reflect the unwavering trust Texans have in Governor Abbott's strong leadership," campaign manager **Kim Snyder** said in a statement. "The broad backing we've received proves that Texans are committed to keeping our state strong, secure, and prosperous.""
