A GOOD CAUSE | | ---|---|--- Disaster Relief Available for Flood-Affected Residents | | ---|---|--- Our hearts continue to go out to everyone impacted by the devastating floods that swept through Central Texas over the July 4th weekend. We know many families--including some within our REALTOR® community--are facing difficult days ahead. If you--or someone you know--suffered damage to a primary residence during the July 4th weekend flooding, assistance may be available through the Texas REALTORS® Disaster Relief Fund. Please click the button below for the . Who is eligible to apply? Texas residents whose primary residence was damaged and who live in a county listed in the Governor's disaster declaration: Bexar, Burnet, Caldwell, Gaudalupe, Travis, and Williamson. Only one application per residence is allowed. What must be submitted with the application? A valid photo ID Proof of residence that matches the affected address If insured, documentation showing the insurance claim, deductible, and payout amount Application Deadline: All applications must be submitted by September 30, 2025. To apply or learn more, please visit our website: TOP NEWS " Greg Abbott logs $20M campaign haul after school voucher win," Texas Tribune's Hayden Betts -- "Gov. Greg Abbott raised more than $20 million for his campaign over just eight days in June -- a haul that came after a legislative session that saw the Texas Republican into law and . The Republican now has a whopping $87.2 million in his campaign war chest as he gears up to run for a record-breaking fourth term. He has yet to draw a high-profile Democratic challenger. Four donors cut Abbott $1 million checks last month in a state with no limit on campaign contributions, . They include Kenneth Fisher , who heads the financial investment firm Fisher Investments; real estate titan Edward Roski, Jr., a California billionaire who is part owner of the Los Angeles Lakers; and Kelcy Warren , a Dallas pipeline company executive who Abbott appointed to the University of Texas System board of regents. All are longtime donors to the governor and each gave the Texas Republican $1 million in June. Abbott also received a $1 million check from the Peachtree Trust, which is based in West Lake Hills and has virtually no public presence. A website that records show was registered in June and has the same name as the trust includes only the tagline "a living, lasting legacy." That trust responded that it is affiliated with a church in Georgia and has not made any gifts to any organizations in Texas. The donation appears to be the trust's first-ever to a Texas official. The governor also received $500,000 from Mackenzie Price, the co-founder of the Alpha School, a private school that uses artificial intelligence to teach core subjects. The massive haul comes after the governor logged a series of long-sought wins during the legislative session, including school voucher legislation that once seemed impossible. The law, which rolls out in the 2026-27 school year, allows public dollars to be spent on private education and had long been blocked by the GOP-led House. The governor's campaign touted that more than 90% of funds raised came from Texans. "Support from thousands of donors across the state reflect the unwavering trust Texans have in Governor Abbott's strong leadership," campaign manager Kim Snyder said in a statement. "The broad backing we've received proves that Texans are committed to keeping our state strong, secure, and prosperous."" **“Greg Abbott logs $20M campaign haul after school voucher win,”** Texas Tribune's **Hayden Betts** — “Gov. **Greg Abbott** raised more than $20 million for his campaign over just eight days in June — a haul that came after a legislative session that saw the Texas Republican [sign long-sought private school vouchers](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eNCDHcRdv524vOoQmRT6HI51J14spDzdVoLQq-qj1UyJsXwk-_6Uq9F92a48s6tFtn3T6lA3iV1PgHDsJ3pF18vHDMmQJAKhXUeeYwtKJObRX_Y0ARFXP-J9UXiRVLP_c_0NaWoOfO6m_zfGF0wXrH9RVKuRj0gFr9vXcOZlTOVvmxt_afv_hBY0ib3Ci5JIn-WHKoxcPybccGb8YnYoq4eFz-bKmjZZByLbQbWQekSD1mF9bvKBXMY73zic_HnPak-Dvl77GznTYP8n3OiInWKCOI00OgD3wobq0em1Q3vy15AreTc593MTp_UTjMWdPgPPi2aliwvesK_ydGD7ZA9KIfW2OI6rkXbC0vauCBblxoHUMKXmOyzYnVZg_tMsO9PlNl-4-4OsoROLqjPRbrl7wjWPo1vV2NeCwy_kMTXhpDQM_XZ527FwVm_GHrnErkIZuJ0O7mzyR8qomspOOsVKsaFcvLShVNNh3di3xdPm/4i9/VqOtQAmqTC-sMU8TfdkDQg/h10/h001.qv_0lGjAj2ikgYKIzYUB29dOjISsS_Qt03WqT5NwG4E) into law and [veto a ban on hemp-derived THC products](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eNCDHcRdv524vOoQmRT6HI51J14spDzdVoLQq-qj1UyJ2Mqk0AtNcP69vdhHcj1OLaEaTKOtVN9LuWsxlPfuPLRdMj6Qtuy4T5rFOUECKDZRUBb-5lmT-CMW4vsnMkleY1ZjwKjV2cEMJsJg-kkxR-hZ0LWjTck7zwY1geqOh7v8aozslq-PRGmoRSsr1i7L_goT-xwqXEXTYDtx32gV9JNqm74nhrU2iK26waC81E2RirKXuNT-6xEfPbJ2KYODy8U4UmR1YRKoDlCjd_nISk9DqRyah_kbwGZ7n6msde050vnHnNW-jCWSb2HLl-ji2GKTLAd7ejQgNhNy0QNm4JEUDH-ucZmH_7_nN2jedHNwAJR8ikLsQ_1YP-T1Kzw_ZlrWkn1492Z0cIli9yuBEi3xWp9_d3Imm3AJzCBENe2j9gXR3LXduFVSEwetS-tIg7B0QOC2NRKfzUEuy73iP80qzebYSm62hd9imCiq6frwdVAqXFBV5Q_In8obVpS3hQ/4i9/VqOtQAmqTC-sMU8TfdkDQg/h11/h001.8U5HPuR819-8AoLEWUeO01YXyEtbRKBbiC_8qUWGrpM).

Four donors cut Abbott $1 million checks last month in a state with no limit on campaign contributions, [the filing shows](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.CcXEjFYCudHDsx_-qIoXEnn8b8DYQHYUvyKJKj8t2T1XvbRAqyIq2pi7JcVdQB01KRszfou9Olu-137nHCGevqMHt8TmBTFSkuJxro60dE7q8EPX_803XiYOKRMhSdoPhKSOsJboc7ffvg4b3tQOjyFGBnw_rQF99D4gLEh8pZAQZIYE3CA3lSKeasuZ--u00FBBdWYr3N5z3QmogGC4Qj7Fl__jpSb25mr_k7wZmPQfQ8R6Pvm1ShiDfQx-17yeMVkrXae0No0bwpGLCLqbRWgbidbpmwdVUYAOKuEocxz1bUMsMDxQVulb-YLSnrFBOUkTmeLoZrwZOnULNhmMYN5QlF4W2vodBzM6gtWPdxnnMS_lJOWVSUSEXrCTee3UVSbzfWuBcpHnwC7is6kOK2ecIl83nXTdc3MmW4BWfeM9Q67Bs7d67KQoonV8P6NRRuWvT7vC4liA9wbxDZ28I79Zk-ICFMqG6vRGc8B8nDhZ3FUTABnLPRgUK42E923O/4i9/VqOtQAmqTC-sMU8TfdkDQg/h13/h001.E3EkAT4YCjYObtfpbgBQ4ya5jfUWm-kB34cDGIIdfDY).

They include **Kenneth Fisher** , who heads the financial investment firm Fisher Investments; real estate titan **Edward Roski, Jr**., a California billionaire who is part owner of the Los Angeles Lakers; and **Kelcy Warren** , a Dallas pipeline company executive who Abbott appointed to the University of Texas System board of regents. All are longtime donors to the governor and each gave the Texas Republican $1 million in June.

Abbott also received a $1 million check from the Peachtree Trust, which is based in West Lake Hills and has virtually no public presence. A website that records show was registered in June and has the same name as the trust includes only the tagline “a living, lasting legacy.” That trust responded that it is affiliated with a church in Georgia and has not made any gifts to any organizations in Texas. The donation appears to be the trust’s first-ever to a Texas official.

The governor also received $500,000 from **Mackenzie Price,** the co-founder of the Alpha School, a private school that uses artificial intelligence to teach core subjects.

The massive haul comes after the governor logged a series of long-sought wins during the legislative session, including school voucher legislation that once seemed impossible. The law, which rolls out in the 2026-27 school year, allows public dollars to be spent on private education and had long been blocked by the GOP-led House.

The governor's campaign touted that more than 90% of funds raised came from Texans.

“Support from thousands of donors across the state reflect the unwavering trust Texans have in Governor Abbott’s strong leadership,” campaign manager **Kim Snyder** said in a statement. “The broad backing we’ve received proves that Texans are committed to keeping our state strong, secure, and prosperous.”" [Hou Chron](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eNCDHcRdv524vOoQmRT6HI51J14spDzdVoLQq-qj1UyJ2Mqk0AtNcP69vdhHcj1OLey3lQCB_IXwWRnH6L6kAswmShXlModmvl_5GQM7WFtJtZqWK6FLhniaj2FCEabAtaiD1KJqVWM9l6MBUdaYSNmqJ9vQRdZadcrVwMJndwcoF3Kmjmo6nQi3vGxaeVQQ9BdmprjQrgEy3o3Sr9z_oz4wsRtIEOwQ2i2NL40u9QZW_qfhK8WnnY1JV4ODzV3BBY8o6Je4u1-oe2sNqVaD4HKQA1b-vprggToo0vE0QcCr3R_G-o7s8dQ1jA5WwwIrjCuIhgCR3Te-E8EfOuqsBHMyTefZEiRHcmKVxdR8W20nhF-_piprtU6LXhjb9T843WZF-RLqLWQq3qMDLnr9wZA5eQcWwP1pwMdMV488qoONFNF7vNVpMvg6IkJbURoQ__BMTtpRIjFSbzKU_OCLYheqynToVTc-D4tDQy_7yzQbC5WM8bZ6ozZUp_-L9JxBzQ/4i9/VqOtQAmqTC-sMU8TfdkDQg/h15/h001.yCNJ3lDfIBMJ9PA3jo6VQ-hakVgG7WeLMgM55IxUhow) ($)

Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr | TOP NEWS “Greg Abbott logs $20M campaign haul after school voucher win,” Texas Tribune's Hayden Betts — “Gov. Greg Abbott raised more than $20 million for his campaign over just eight days in June — a haul that came after a legislative session that saw the Texas Republican into law and . The Republican now has a whopping $87.2 million in his campaign war chest as he gears up to run for a record-breaking fourth term. He has yet to draw a high-profile Democratic challenger. » Four donors cut Abbott $1 million checks last month in a state with no limit on campaign contributions, . They include Kenneth Fisher , who heads the financial investment firm Fisher Investments; real estate titan Edward Roski, Jr., a California billionaire who is part owner of the Los Angeles Lakers; and Kelcy Warren , a Dallas pipeline company executive who Abbott appointed to the University of Texas System board of regents. All are longtime donors to the governor and each gave the Texas Republican $1 million in June. » Abbott also received a $1 million check from the Peachtree Trust, which is based in West Lake Hills and has virtually no public presence. A website that records show was registered in June and has the same name as the trust includes only the tagline “a living, lasting legacy.” That trust responded that it is affiliated with a church in Georgia and has not made any gifts to any organizations in Texas. The donation appears to be the trust’s first-ever to a Texas official. The governor also received $500,000 from Mackenzie Price, the co-founder of the Alpha School, a private school that uses artificial intelligence to teach core subjects. The massive haul comes after the governor logged a series of long-sought wins during the legislative session, including school voucher legislation that once seemed impossible. The law, which rolls out in the 2026-27 school year, allows public dollars to be spent on private education and had long been blocked by the GOP-led House. The governor's campaign touted that more than 90% of funds raised came from Texans. “Support from thousands of donors across the state reflect the unwavering trust Texans have in Governor Abbott’s strong leadership,” campaign manager Kim Snyder said in a statement. “The broad backing we’ve received proves that Texans are committed to keeping our state strong, secure, and prosperous.”" ($) | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. **But instead of addressing those problems, Donald Trump is focused on supercharging his unconstitutional kidnapping and disappearing operation.**
Pramila hasn’t been shy about calling out ICE for their terrorizing pattern of abducting people off the street with no explanation. And now that their budget has _more than tripled_ , things are set to get even worse.

https://www.wrtv.com/news/local-news/crime/significant-crackdown-governor-braun-addresses-public-safety-ahead-of-all-star-weekend [Click Here To Read the Full Article](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/WL5xEMUq3-P1GDI8KSyVIoGn1EEJbyu4oX_zv4qv4eWmi8ogCl1KyRUsbRQxRCl8dLcRLA9q6vNo8NtNVBZxDEpAVuhlfD5mOQ0bovJlxxdQ5SfjICMjkJWul2JR9zjd_0oykgbXlFeaxAVVuU99NW-OBUK0XdGA6fzDm71-3CuNGBR3Ek1lqp84_c21R-Yn-Lrn5Ka8GEOz-j_U3NI5wilgw0mcDLQwJrj6zlN3DQXIj6wl9qzG-RIQu7zd5vqTBvlSMcal7hFy9Gb51km37I2KYRKIDsMtUiVOd1Cu86IvxnG6KByR9MbLcLVYuW9AmLB8JkksRS1CTLjYCzDZ3iv_3oAUjhoPWKF1IHHT3SfFp1_XeQbc1P02LY4_cusjusf7PwtNVTDjjVcI-CJlZ6f9djZpnbH91RYWc9ic2Uo-86RXFZ9dDWc8hX9O8RBuQ-zUvtjfyhmpVxYTBFpJN2mRg1BfCg4I2nVrc6hh6kjnOpblh7-1LeseIOUxAKjFSUcsIUSop4sKgbulx9Mg5hg5kXAETvpEIckCSa9IlLPPWMUP60omaVgdn8DuKQDf-EHLneag9VctfegZJP8SiHllHVQ_5BEux8YhvVaZtLuSb_L4Y_UeAIW7zNz2gdQ/nPPoqMswtB5WcsAZhVXFL3YEYhy-b2LV/11) Governor Mike Braun, along with Indiana State Police Superintendent Anthony Scott, held a press conference Wednesday to discuss a "significant crackdown" on crime in Indianapolis ahead of WNBA All-Star weekend. This comes in response to recent violence in the city, including a mass shooting on July 5th that left two people dead and five injured. Braun said that the situation in Indianapolis has changed over the past several years. He stated, “Something in the last eight or nine years is different than it used to be.” He believes that while police are doing their part, the justice system needs to do better. “Indianapolis' own justice system is not doing its job,” he said, highlighting the importance of holding prosecutors accountable. “That is a major part of my Freedom and Opportunity Public Safety Agenda. It's the next step to ensure law and order is maintained.” In preparation for the All-Star Weekend, Governor Braun assured the public that extra precautions are being taken. “We are going to take every additional caution to make sure Indy All-Star Weekend is safe.” Superintendent Scott added that there will be a significant increase in troopers patrolling the city. When asked about the need for increased police presence after the eventful weekend, Braun pointed to Mayor Hogsett and the Marion County Prosecutor. He said, “Until they start doing things differently, especially on the prosecution side, they shoulder the full responsibility for what we’re having to do to intervene.” [Click Here To Read the Full Article](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/iEfoXpsnfF5QqGuLJJ7YL4LGLAY2960Rf-Yb-2KwLPlKOPfUditWGsRNjDgL-T16DiF8sUvNPou0fDpza4-WsT94NBnnqAeu4lEPR6dXEGQbDJ6BnJwJbkLedbEnwooHkCKWLEGlDRo0alZW2bEuokMaDPzD7hWjrG4PyiD0kzgKnKHp-0nIuaIXmOHsvKLlG_Hw-DfAXHHFfOVVjNO2qzC3FVKyAbgjAIPhVyF3TpOc4Ia2rlU6djSF8ymj6e76n4UDc71byV9vgoWvRDAOWlVs1UrWyRK4VeCNxiOqjr51IGr9v2htDF40VgX-cmLTJmJ6drneCBk-GJ4ZxyUMRW4V7hCUFgWf7AC9DlD_lV7N_QPlCinA2MVMGKh9rqSS24o8kCD3GGHmPTdEyrCZATDwZpDMHDep4El-fkITm_F2YjYXXhUEhga_M9vBeK73T38EjWg7EBpMUb9B2QOKIsJKlgC8OKyBrm-izl-3FvpixJH9Lc0acbmHzUH0D6cCOU4GTAz7nUT0ThNoIVhV8A2mgANTl8cafRLYf8YrqifRnO_tOVbqPs2lupHmfIBMnxaN699Oi9WNnRgZiKyTTfkq7gyBPR_Axc4pZbLA-4IUTL0_lJaETx5lIVqXxKg/cyQT4cm5btGh33sdvX-IQXV2Ka3FzQFt/11)

name: Patty
subject: not the email I wanted to send (PBS)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
I can't make the GOP watch “Sesame Street” to brush up on their math – but we can teach them a lesson they'll never forget.
| | |
---
Peter,
Before I start: If you took action with me to save funding for public TV and radio, I hope you know how much I truly appreciate you joining me in this fight.
**So I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but earlier this morning at about 2:30 AM after I forced hours of amendment votes, Republicans still voted to shred funding for PBS and NPR by passing Trump's more than $9 billion DOGE budget cut wishlist.**
The GOP wants us to think that after passing trillions in tax cuts for billionaires, there's nothing left for our kids.

Maybe this isn’t exactly how “Sesame Street” would say it, but we know that _this message is brought to you by the letters B-S _– **because even a child could calculate that these billions in cuts still won't come close to adding up to cover what Trump's Big, Ugly Bill is adding to the national debt!** (We can thank Count von Count on "Sesame Street" for that.)
Sadly, I can't make my GOP colleagues tune in to brush up on their math and reading skills, let alone instill some compassion for their constituents with a few episodes of _ _ "Mister Rogers' Neighborhood _._ "
**But together, we _can_ teach them a lesson they'll never forget at the ballot box – [and it starts with your help to reach my $20,000 rapid response goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111668421/557996888/-145648726?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk534-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGE3NTY3OC01OTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULbIaFf8ES4JCHgJSc6I-7SGNscukegomNECRX-M2wc=)**
See, polling shows that the American people overwhelmingly support their taxes going to NPR and PBS, _not_ tax cuts for billionaires.
Americans know that ripping away funds that help over 1,500 local affiliates nationwide keep the lights on will only force stations like those in rural communities to cut back on programming, lay off staff, and, in many cases, go off the air for good.
While it won't be the death knell for PBS and NPR's national networks, it **will** hurt the people who tune in for emergency alerts, unbiased news, and quality educational programs for all ages – and _We the People_ won't have anyone but Trump and the GOP to blame when that happens.
**So if everyone who supports funding for public media were to chip in $5 now, we'd have the resources to remind them that feeding Big Bird to the fat cats will cost them their majorities come Election Day. **But realistically, I know not everyone will. That's why today, Peter, I'm counting on you.
**[Please, Peter, will you rush $5 – or the best gift you can make before midnight – toward my $20,000 rapid response goal so we can keep up the fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111668422/557996889/-145648726?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk534-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGE3NTY3OC01OTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULbIaFf8ES4JCHgJSc6I-7SGNscukegomNECRX-M2wc=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111668423/557996890/-145648726?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk534-fr-nd&recurring=0&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGE3NTY3OC01OTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULbIaFf8ES4JCHgJSc6I-7SGNscukegomNECRX-M2wc=)

name: Team WFP
subject: Take our quick July pulse survey >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, We’re just about six months into Donald Trump’s second administration, and each day we have been bombarded with an onslaught of bad news — from cutting essential programs like Medicaid, to threatening war with Iran, to ICE spreading terror through our communities. But amidst the chaos there have been glimmers of hope, too. We’ve turned out by the millions to show our opposition month after month. And we’ve beat back some of the billionaire class’ attempts to buy elections, including in Wisconsin and NYC. These glimmers tell a story — that even when the odds are stacked against us and our democracy has never before been in such peril, there are millions of people who are willing to join together and stand up and fight for a country that works for everyone. At the Working Families Party, we’re proud to be electing candidates and building a party accountable to the multiracial working class, and that’s why **we dedicate time each month to hear from _you_ directly.** **[Can you fill out our July 2025 Pulse Survey to share what you’re focused on and what you’d like to see more of in this political moment? It only takes a few minutes — and we read every response to help guide our next steps.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRI-9MMp9XRImnsQejMVe-q1XcyT3BRzoPeHAeDSS2vU2c2R_5J4EiiQr8dBfHDwZGzyR5ou-7BcBA7q44_ep7KckCF8OTmUA-g5kT9JWCqKGcAwTWNcjZ7NJvu_unkuGvhZa0cBEo9jtZdaBCv7bFv1gW_w4EVPdFRZM4QYX0X5amKbc2JU1my-bclog_LOk5Uzp6z0NimLfnV4MxmwkZpwXhxFN_oTCobIDM0mnX4eOLcXvk_MuQQ_gV3bHyUEfhKDIflvR1IQQ3zpPoOeijft/4i9/sKBjmWg0RTO_Pz5_mRXEVQ/h0/h001.LntC7N-YEsQAPjhY3V2oZcy3j_OrupOV-UnlJsEZWuY)** **[Take the survey](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRI-9MMp9XRImnsQejMVe-q1XcyT3BRzoPeHAeDSS2vU2c2R_5J4EiiQr8dBfHDwZGzyR5ou-7BcBA7q44_ep7KcyjLkcqU-5solbrtBctpqJQDzCz72ff-3c6bNfku4011rZ3eRnBJcvPEgklSuPVT9Xrvhr8aSJmvqA5GgKFLJJszGlH_rLlxtb_WXNHkOdmsqL6yUdemnOIcorY3SfttOV5kgUAh-017u0VaSVX6--CcHlZMb1f0RfXmI51x7qSI_GNbkS7_MgmaZ-PN-qDol/4i9/sKBjmWg0RTO_Pz5_mRXEVQ/h1/h001.joLTwwLjNjdCF0AN0zZMrKUhz6trQNj9cCUkZ88kCXM)** Our monthly surveys are an opportunity to share your concerns for our country, the issues that you think are most urgent to address, and the role you’d like to see the Working Families Party play in the fight against MAGA extremists and power-hungry billionaires. clean_body: | | | Peter, We’re just about six months into Donald Trump’s second administration, and each day we have been bombarded with an onslaught of bad news — from cutting essential programs like Medicaid, to threatening war with Iran, to ICE spreading terror through our communities. But amidst the chaos there have been glimmers of hope, too. We’ve turned out by the millions to show our opposition month after month. And we’ve beat back some of the billionaire class’ attempts to buy elections, including in Wisconsin and NYC. These glimmers tell a story — that even when the odds are stacked against us and our democracy has never before been in such peril, there are millions of people who are willing to join together and stand up and fight for a country that works for everyone. At the Working Families Party, we’re proud to be electing candidates and building a party accountable to the multiracial working class, and that’s why we dedicate time each month to hear from you directly. Our monthly surveys are an opportunity to share your concerns for our country, the issues that you think are most urgent to address, and the role you’d like to see the Working Families Party play in the fight against MAGA extremists and power-hungry billionaires. As a WFP member, this is your party , and we are committed to fighting for you. By taking our monthly surveys, you’re helping keep us in touch with your priorities so we can represent you better each day. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23120255.12081.1.e7429aa5d408d8120eea580bb4ad44f9) is out and has reached **#13 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23120255.12082.1.4614dfbc59a579a16a9b4caf9e0a90cc)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23120255.12083.1.fac55cf1788cfaa7e6bc8853d9b88db8)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23120255.12084.1.3845918b7b96ab2efa2b8a37b964e5f2). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23120255.12085.1.ff2a56b01cc492364cef892070fef639) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23120255.12086.1.c63c23162062ca5287a22593c4613115) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23120255.12087.1.5e3e126c50068cd36b80db1dd8fbf5a6) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: priorities twisted

body:
Trump and the GOP made lofty promises during the election, but what have they actually done for working people?

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111668569/557997381/1435897075?refcode=email_071725_priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmRmZjM1MC01OTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u0orApCSrQE1nmGTAcsqoA2KdOsyAuxHnSLOaEuQxwU=&emci=195430b5-8d5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cfdff350-5963-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7280715) Folks, over the course of last year’s elections, Trump and Washington Republicans made many lofty promises about bringing down prices, fixing the economy, and bringing jobs back to American soil. But since taking office, what have they actually done for working people? **_Let’s take a look:_** Donald Trump incited a global trade war, pushing our economy toward a RECESSION with shifting deadlines and the constant seesaw of on-again off-again tariffs. The so-called Department of Government Efficiency gutted agencies across the federal government, laying off thousands of workers critical to maintaining public lands, medical research, _and even the folks tasked with ensuring seniors get their Social Security checks on time._ **And now, Trump and the Republicans just passed and signed into law a budget that will likely kick 17 million Americans off their health care, shutter thousands of rural hospitals, and add $4 trillion – that’s FOUR TRILLION DOLLARS – to our debt,_just to pay for a lavish tax handout to the wealthiest among us._** It’s absolute lunacy. **But I promise you this: we're doing everything I can in the Senate to deliver for _you._** I'm fighting to lower the cost of living, protect your access to health care, and actually create more good-paying jobs here in the U.S. — _instead of just talking about it._ I’m bringing folks together to address the Colorado River crisis — _like I have since I was Governor_ — and passing bipartisan legislation that’ll help keep water flowing to all seven basin states. And I’m going to keep fighting tooth and nail to stop any and all Republican schemes to sell our public lands — _just like how we stripped it out of the recent GOP budget_ — because public lands belong in public hands, not auctioned off to the highest bidder. **[My top priority is and always will be serving the people of Colorado — no matter what Trump and the Republicans throw our way. If you’re with me, please, chip in a couple bucks to defend this seat and keep me in the fight for Colorado’s values in Washington. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111668571/557997384/1973964750?refcode=email_071725_priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmRmZjM1MC01OTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u0orApCSrQE1nmGTAcsqoA2KdOsyAuxHnSLOaEuQxwU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111668572/557997385/1973964750?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_071725_priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmRmZjM1MC01OTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u0orApCSrQE1nmGTAcsqoA2KdOsyAuxHnSLOaEuQxwU=)

**➤➤ URGENT: Trump dismantling election security from the inside** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111668600/557997474/55160957?refcode=em-7.17.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmE3NTY3OC01OTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iawpRCEc2z4WfYUN_L5ti6WaQ4v7kD1Qewf3Ow0xlho=)**
* * *
Trump is ramping up his efforts to undermine our elections, friend. The federal agency responsible for defending our elections from cyberattacks and disinformation, CISA, **is being gutted.** Reports from across the country show election offices struggling without the security support they once relied on. Training has been scaled back. Communication has slowed. Tools to detect interference are going dark. This is Trump’s plan in action: Strip away the guardrails. Starve election infrastructure. Create chaos. Then step in to “fix” it with authoritarian control. **It’s already happening. And CISA is just the start.** We can’t wait for the next crisis to respond. Democratic Secretaries of State are stepping up in the vacuum — **defending our systems, training election workers, and holding the line.** [**But doing that without federal help takes serious resources. Can you chip in $3 or whatever you can today to help DASS fill the gap and keep election offices running securely, fairly, and independently?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111668601/557997475/1071238056?refcode=em-7.17.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmE3NTY3OC01OTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iawpRCEc2z4WfYUN_L5ti6WaQ4v7kD1Qewf3Ow0xlho=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111668603/557997476/1071238056?refcode=em-7.17.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmE3NTY3OC01OTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iawpRCEc2z4WfYUN_L5ti6WaQ4v7kD1Qewf3Ow0xlho=)**

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: I’m not giving up
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
Last week, I joined KOIN 6 News to discuss our continued fight to protect Medicaid after Republicans voted to cut funding. **_Rep. Bynum vows to fight for Medicaid restoration after major cuts_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111668703/557997897/-629675555?refcode=email_071725_Medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UzNzk1NmUtNWE2My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=S1giRc0rAr62Xy2VwprqkXhAdMI29QfG1JVuazQSZtc=) Here in Oregon, 1 in 3 people depend on Medicaid and more than 50% of our children rely on it. But because of Trump’s trash bill – which includes about $1 trillion in cuts to Medicaid – over 1 MILLION Oregonians could lose their healthcare. **That’s unacceptable and I’m not giving up in our fight to restore Medicaid funding and protect Americans’ healthcare.** I’m doing everything I can to continue to apply pressure, elevate your voices, and show the harm these cuts are causing our communities and our country — but I can’t win this fight without you by my side. In order to show Trump and Republicans that we’re not backing down in our fight to defend Medicaid, it’s going to take all of us standing together and doing our part to hold them accountable. **[And the best way we can do that is by defending this swing seat and helping Democrats flip the House. So please, chip in now to help me keep fighting in Congress to push back on the GOP’s extreme policies, work to restore Medicaid funding, and protect Oregonians’ healthcare →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111668704/557997898/-629675555?refcode=email_071725_Medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UzNzk1NmUtNWE2My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=S1giRc0rAr62Xy2VwprqkXhAdMI29QfG1JVuazQSZtc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111668705/557997899/-629675555?refcode=email_071725_Medicaid&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UzNzk1NmUtNWE2My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=S1giRc0rAr62Xy2VwprqkXhAdMI29QfG1JVuazQSZtc=)

clean_body: Last week, I joined KOIN 6 News to discuss our continued fight to protect Medicaid after Republicans voted to cut funding. Rep. Bynum vows to fight for Medicaid restoration after major cuts = Here in Oregon, 1 in 3 people depend on Medicaid and more than 50% of our children rely on it. But because of Trump’s trash bill – which includes about $1 trillion in cuts to Medicaid – over 1 MILLION Oregonians could lose their healthcare. That’s unacceptable and I’m not giving up in our fight to restore Medicaid funding and protect Americans’ healthcare. I’m doing everything I can to continue to apply pressure, elevate your voices, and show the harm these cuts are causing our communities and our country — but I can’t win this fight without you by my side. In order to show Trump and Republicans that we’re not backing down in our fight to defend Medicaid, it’s going to take all of us standing together and doing our part to hold them accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Janelle Bynum | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Susan Wild
subject: My friend Carol
body:
Let's fight for Carol Obando-Derstine! |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111668825/557998417/1263844317?refcode=WUEFH736_20250717_Wild4COD_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056620&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTVhMzZkNi01YTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tMU8dWkJ0dmACanjcGzHwPMdLPcbFP2XwLYefepJfDs=) Peter,

I know Pennsylvania. It was my privilege and honor to serve as the congresswoman for Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District from 2018 to 2025. So when I tell you that I am all in for **Carol Obando-Derstine** to flip the seat, which is currently held by a Republican extremist, you know I mean it.

My friends at EMILYs List just endorsed Carol, which means they will be with her every step of her race. [**Already fired up and ready to flip this seat next year? Split a donation between Carol's campaign and EMILYs List today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111668826/557998418/1263844317?refcode=WUEFH736_20250717_Wild4COD_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056620&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTVhMzZkNi01YTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tMU8dWkJ0dmACanjcGzHwPMdLPcbFP2XwLYefepJfDs=) | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111668827/557998419/1263844317?refcode=WUEFH736_20250717_Wild4COD_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056620&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTVhMzZkNi01YTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tMU8dWkJ0dmACanjcGzHwPMdLPcbFP2XwLYefepJfDs=)

Pennsylvania is one of the truest swing states in the country. Our electoral votes have been pivotal (and in some cases, decisive) in the last several presidential elections. When most folks think of our state, they think of close margins and nail-biter election nights. And we don't expect 2026 to be any different.

That's where you, the EMILYs List community, come in.

EMILYs List knows that investing early in first-time candidates like Carol is the single best step we can take to ensure her success on Election Day. So it's my job to tell you that Carol — an engineer, advocate, educator, and bilingual community leader — is absolutely the best candidate to beat Trump-puppet Ryan McKenzie at the ballot box next year and win back this seat for hardworking Pennsylvanians who deserve authentic representation. And it's your job, as members of the best team in politics when it comes to electing Democratic pro-choice women, to give it your all to help her win.

Are you with me, Peter? Let's elect Carol. Let's win back PA-07. Let's flip the House in 2026 — and let's take back power. [**Starting right now. clean_body: Let's fight for Carol Obando-Derstine! | = Peter, I know Pennsylvania. It was my privilege and honor to serve as the congresswoman for Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District from 2018 to 2025. So when I tell you that I am all in for Carol Obando-Derstine to flip the seat, which is currently held by a Republican extremist, you know I mean it. My friends at EMILYs List just endorsed Carol, which means they will be with her every step of her race. = | = Pennsylvania is one of the truest swing states in the country. Our electoral votes have been pivotal (and in some cases, decisive) in the last several presidential elections. When most folks think of our state, they think of close margins and nail-biter election nights. And we don't expect 2026 to be any different. That's where you, the EMILYs List community, come in. EMILYs List knows that investing early in first-time candidates like Carol is the single best step we can take to ensure her success on Election Day. So it's my job to tell you that Carol — an engineer, advocate, educator, and bilingual community leader — is absolutely the best candidate to beat Trump-puppet Ryan McKenzie at the ballot box next year and win back this seat for hardworking Pennsylvanians who deserve authentic representation. And it's your job, as members of the best team in politics when it comes to electing Democratic pro-choice women, to give it your all to help her win. Are you with me, Peter? Let's elect Carol. Let's win back PA-07. Let's flip the House in 2026 — and let's take back power. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for stepping up. \- Susan Former U.S. Rep. Susan Wild (PA-07) = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Shutting down the Department of Education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Trump’s attacks on education are escalating—and the Supreme Court is helping every step of the way. | |
---
Peter, The Trump administration has made it clear that it’s coming for our kids’ education. **This week, the Supreme Court greenlit Trump’s attacks on education, ruling that he’s allowed to fire thousands of Department of Education employees and essentially shutter the agency.** The MAGA justices gave no explanation for their “emergency” ruling. But their decision strips lower courts and Congress of their ability to stop Trump’s illegal activity before it’s too late. But Congress can still protect America’s students. **The Trump administration is currently holding up $7 billion in approved K-12 education funding, impacting classrooms and students nationwide.** It’s the job of Congress and the Supreme Court to check the executive branch’s dangerous and undemocratic activity. The Supreme Court may be working hand in hand with Trump, but that makes it even more important that we demand Congress act. [**Tell Congress: Stand up to Trump’s attacks on education. clean_body: Trump’s attacks on education are escalating—and the Supreme Court is helping every step of the way. | | Peter, The Trump administration has made it clear that it’s coming for our kids’ education. This week, the Supreme Court greenlit Trump’s attacks on education, ruling that he’s allowed to fire thousands of Department of Education employees and essentially shutter the agency. The MAGA justices gave no explanation for their “emergency” ruling. But their decision strips lower courts and Congress of their ability to stop Trump’s illegal activity before it’s too late. But Congress can still protect America’s students. The Trump administration is currently holding up $7 billion in approved K-12 education funding, impacting classrooms and students nationwide. It’s the job of Congress and the Supreme Court to check the executive branch’s dangerous and undemocratic activity. The Supreme Court may be working hand in hand with Trump, but that makes it even more important that we demand Congress act. Congress passed and Trump signed a funding bill that included funding for schools, classrooms, and after-school programs in March. But just before the funding was supposed to go out on July 1st, the White House announced it was withholding $7 billion—illegally impounding the money. The funding was meant to be spent on things like curriculum and technology. Now, schools are faced with laying off teachers and staff. Every state and school district will be impacted. It’s clear that the MAGA Supreme Court isn’t working for us and our kids—it fully intends to bow to Trump’s anti-education agenda. But our democracy doesn’t belong to the Supreme Court. It belongs to us. Thank you for fighting for our kids’ classrooms, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . body:
Today and every day, we remember the lifelong work of John Lewis to protect the right to vote. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669067/557999183/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250717_T1_JohnLewisAnniv_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWMwYjBmOS01YjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U33XucE1m6FnEI7bJdGl86sNDMGiz_gMCdu95fvUfZQ=&emci=dcc0b0f9-5b63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e1c0b0f9-5b63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1037277)

| | Hey friend, Five years ago today, we lost a Georgian trailblazer who paved our country’s path toward justice and freedom — **and fought tirelessly to protect the sacred right to vote. ** The late Congressman John Lewis represented Georgia's 5th Congressional District from 1987 until his death, and dedicated his life to making the promise of democracy a reality. Despite the constant threats of violence by police, white supremacists, and state-sanctioned violence on various occasions while peacefully protesting, Congressman Lewis continued to rise in the face of adversity to ensure that Black folks had equal access to the ballot. Congressman Lewis was a major force in the Civil Rights Movement: as a Freedom Rider, chairman of the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee, and one of the organizers of the March on Washington. His tireless commitment to ending racial segregation helped pave the way for the Voting Rights Act of 1965, and his legacy endures as we continue the fight for his vision of a more just democracy. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669068/557999184/950351755?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250717_T1_JohnLewisAnniv_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWMwYjBmOS01YjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U33XucE1m6FnEI7bJdGl86sNDMGiz_gMCdu95fvUfZQ=)
---
As Congressman Lewis once said:
**“Do not get lost in a sea of despair. Be hopeful, be optimistic. Our struggle is not the struggle of a day, a week, a month, or a year, it is the struggle of a lifetime. Never, ever be afraid to make some noise and get in good trouble, necessary trouble.”**
Let us continue to make good trouble in Congressman Lewis’ honor.
— Fair Fight Action

name: Thomas Massie
subject: Do you want the Epstein files released?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for Congress PO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
Patriot, this is one of the biggest risks I’ve ever taken. Will you have my back when they come for me?
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e39692207/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvaG1KSnBqcGZ6ZQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTc/LbmNsUEVYSUc5bQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNLS2tTb25tdThZNU1scw/gaHl3zQ/sdja8400f12)
| | Dear Patriot, I’m hoping you get this message in time. What I’m about to do is going to put me in the crosshairs. **_But it must be done._** I’m going to force every Member of Congress to go ON RECORD about Jeffrey Epstein. And if you support what I’m doing here, _**_[I hope you’ll consider having my back by making a donation of just a few bucks.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_**_ I am about to file something called a “discharge petition.” **_In simple terms, I am using a congressional procedure to attempt to FORCE a vote on releasing the Epstein files in their entirety._** \- The client lists \- The blackmail networks \- The foreign intelligence interests ALL must be exposed. **If this vote succeeds, EVERY Member of Congress will be forced to vote simply “YES” or “NO” on whether or not the government should release the Epstein files.** **And at the end of the day, this decision, this action right here and right now, could be the end of a 20-year-long saga of CORRUPTION, LIES, and CRIMINAL ACTIVITY.** I’m about to make a lot of enemies – Republicans, Democrats, Independents, and everyone in between. I don’t care who I upset – all I care about is the TRUTH. Thank you for taking a moment out of your time to read my message. Sincerely, Congressman Thomas Massie P.S. Whether or not you donate today, I am moving forward with this. I’m not pay-to-play like so many other politicians in Washington. **I won’t be bought, bribed, or blackmailed.**
But the tidal wave of pressure from the Uniparty is about to get 10X worse when I force them to go on record over the Epstein files... _**_[_**_and when it does, I truly need patriots like you in my corner. _**_](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) _**_

name: Katie Porter
subject: We’re moving even further back on health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39904%2E3422442%2EuxgDGF)
This is outrageous, Peter.
Earlier this month, Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans passed their signature law to rip health care away from millions of Americans.
**_[More below on this latest attack, but first, can you chip in $5 to my campaign to be Califirnia’s next Governor so I can stand up to DC Republicans who are forcing people to lose their health care?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250717_2_ak?refcode=em20250717-39904&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39904_3422442_uxgDGF&akid=39904%2E3422442%2EuxgDGF)_**
A Trump-appointed judge just struck down the Biden Administration rule that removed medical debt from credit reports.
So, not only will it be harder for Americans to get covered, but if they do happen to get sick, they could face a lifetime of financial pain on top of that. AND that debt will follow them, making it even harder or more expensive for them to rent or buy a home, get a car loan, or use a credit card.
This is all happening because Trump is giving billionaires a tax cut.
This is why I’ve consistently said that California’s next governor must be a health care governor.
In Congress, I led efforts to keep medical debt off credit reports. **As Governor, I’ll make it a priority to get all Californians the care they need.**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250717_2_ak?refcode=em20250717-39904&refcode2=39904_3422442_uxgDGF&akid=39904%2E3422442%2EuxgDGF)
—KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250717-39904&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39904_3422442_uxgDGF&akid=39904%2E3422442%2EuxgDGF)**

name: Dan Carr
subject: A Call To Action
body:
We must stand for what we believe in!!

| |
---|---|---
|
# A Call To Action
### We must stand for what we believe in!!
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Jul 17
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
The Christian life is not a life of neutrality--it is a battleground. We are soldiers of Christ, not spectators. Paul commanded, _" Endure hardness, as a good soldier of Jesus Christ"_ (II Timothy 2:3). If there was ever a time for the people of God to stand up and fight for eternal truth, it is now. Here are **ten things we must stand and fight for** without apology or retreat.
**1\. The Souls of Men**
Nothing in this world compares to the eternal value of a soul. Jesus said, _" For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?"_ (Mark 8:36). We must weep for the lost, witness to the broken, and warn the indifferent.
The Great Commission is not a suggestion; it is a command: _" Go ye therefore, and teach all nations... Teaching them to observe all things whatsoever I have commanded you."_ - Matthew 28:19-20
_**The Gospel of Jesus Christ prescribes the wisest rules for just conduct in every situation of life.**_** - Benjamin Rush**
**[Click Here To Finish Reading:](https://substack.com/redirect/6344ce97-68d5-455b-8a82-3dd65dafd644?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Dan Carr

subject: They are ignoring your real problems….

This is a WASTE of tax dollars...
Friend, thousands of National Guard troops are still stationed in Los Angeles even though they’ve been asked to leave.
Most of them aren’t doing anything. Just standing around.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/5A394270383762585454576742464D52792B52766A35793148784A756F573069634D465A4A504451714E446F715168624D58584C6C533658714454443068584C/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-17%20at%202.09.53%E2%80%AFPM.png]
Meanwhile in Florida?
– Our insurance crisis keeps getting worse
– Schools are overcrowded and underfunded
– Seniors are getting crushed by health care costs
This is what MAGA prioritizes: political theater over real solutions.
While they show off force in California, they’ve abandoned families here in Florida. The worst part is that MAGA loyalist Ashley Moody has been our senator, has been witness to it all and won’t lift a finger.
They want you distracted. We want you informed.
They want control. We want change.
That’s why I’m running, because you deserve a Senator who doesn’t treat governing like a cable news segment. You deserve someone who sees past the spectacle and gets to work.

clean_body: Patriot - This is my final message to you before time expires. Knowing that, will you please read every word carefully? Thanks for opening this email! I wouldn't be reaching out like this if my situation weren't truly dire. Let me explain my predicament: FIRST, while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! THEN, a Soros-backed, liberal group gave my Democrat opponent $500K all in one shot! My Democrat opponent has continued to OUTRAISE me by MILLIONS of dollars. NOW, the polls are TIED. But I cannot win with this crippling cash disadvantage. TO MAKE MATTERS WORSE, I'm facing a CRUCIAL Mid-Month Deadline Goal and I'm WAY behind! in a serious bind here, Fellow Patriot. I'm over $10,000 behind pace to reach my upcoming Goal. I'm asking you as a Christian, a Marine, and a mother: Democrat opponent has Leftist billionaires like George Soros and Hollywood liberals backing her, but I'm 100% relying on you! can't thank you enough for reading this message all the way through, Fellow Patriot. You are truly a key part of my team! Together, we will close this fundraising gap and beat my liberal opponent in November! Thanks again and may God bless you! -Winsome Earle-Sears | | | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump just called for my prosecution — here’s why I won’t back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
Hi — this is Adam Schiff. Ohio House Dems said I could reach out with this urgent message: **Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.** Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. This is just Trump’s latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived enemies. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669475/558000693/499343156?refcode=250717_Schiff_BackDown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGVkNGE3ZS01ZTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S__Ql2QuxqeE5EC6CZ-fn46HF1JEvug0P2H7NNH_6so=)** Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless attempt at political retribution won’t stop me from holding him accountable — not by a long shot. I’m not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his standards, this one’s weak. And as much as Trump may hope, this latest smear will not distract from his Epstein files problem. [**Nevertheless, I need your help right now to respond: rush a split donation between me and Ohio House Dems to help us fight back and keep holding Trump accountable.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669476/558000694/499343156?refcode=250717_Schiff_BackDown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGVkNGE3ZS01ZTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S__Ql2QuxqeE5EC6CZ-fn46HF1JEvug0P2H7NNH_6so=) | | [**$15 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669477/558000695/499343156?amount=15&refcode=250717_Schiff_BackDown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGVkNGE3ZS01ZTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S__Ql2QuxqeE5EC6CZ-fn46HF1JEvug0P2H7NNH_6so= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

| [**$26 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669478/558000696/499343156?amount=26&refcode=250717_Schiff_BackDown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGVkNGE3ZS01ZTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S__Ql2QuxqeE5EC6CZ-fn46HF1JEvug0P2H7NNH_6so= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

Trump doesn’t want to talk about skyrocketing prices, his tariff failures, the big ugly bill or why his rabid supporters are demanding answers over his refusal to release the Epstein files. So he goes back to the same tired playbook: Attack, distract, repeat.
But I won’t be intimidated. And I won’t stop doing my job – not now, not ever.
Instead of working to help families hit by extreme weather, rising costs, or his own healthcare cuts, Trump is using his platform to lash out at those who tell the truth. He wants to silence his critics. But I refuse to back down – and with you in my corner, I never will.
[**Please, rush a split donation to help me and Ohio House Dems fight back today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669481/558000699/499343156?refcode=250717_Schiff_BackDown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGVkNGE3ZS01ZTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S__Ql2QuxqeE5EC6CZ-fn46HF1JEvug0P2H7NNH_6so=)
Trump can lie and threaten me all he wants. I will never be deterred from fulfilling my duties as a U.S. Senator.
Thank you for standing with me,
Adam

clean_body: | Hi — this is Adam Schiff. Ohio House Dems said I could reach out with this urgent message: Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted. Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. This is just Trump’s latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived enemies. = Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless attempt at political retribution won’t stop me from holding him accountable — not by a long shot. I’m not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his standards, this one’s weak. And as much as Trump may hope, this latest smear will not distract from his Epstein files problem. = | | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Trump doesn’t want to talk about skyrocketing prices, his tariff failures, the big ugly bill or why his rabid supporters are demanding answers over his refusal to release the Epstein files. So he goes back to the same tired playbook: Attack, distract, repeat. But I won’t be intimidated. And I won’t stop doing my job – not now, not ever. Instead of working to help families hit by extreme weather, rising costs, or his own healthcare cuts, Trump is using his platform to lash out at those who tell the truth. He wants to silence his critics. But I refuse to back down – and with you in my corner, I never will. = Trump can lie and threaten me all he wants. I will never be deterred from fulfilling my duties as a U.S. Senator. Thank you for standing with me, Adam = = = OHDC 545 E. name: MGP for Congress HQ
subject: Rural communities depend on public broadcasting
body:
| | Peter,

Today, the Senate voted to claw back _billions_ of dollars in funding, including **$1.1 billion for nonpartisan, independent public broadcasting** , a critical resource that rural communities like ours rely on every day.

We depend on public broadcasting for so much: quality local journalism, educational children’s programming, and even lifesaving emergency alerts. By gutting these funds, public radio and television stations across the country could be forced to close, including 14 here in Washington.

Marie voted against this harmful plan last month, and we know she’ll continue fighting for public broadcasting as it heads back to the House for a final vote.

[But, we need to back her up and send a clear message right away: The majority of Americans don’t support cuts to public broadcasting. Add your name if you agree.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669539/558000931/291540376?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_90DO_250717_1_1&refcode2=6cc92731-5f63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M5MjczMS01ZjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rZahUx9y_tjh2Vx2xxlxLjG1xJKy1VWd_pOJKjxcFCs=&emci=6bc92731-5f63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6cc92731-5f63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31138575)

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: This Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria is hosting a town hall in Elise Stefanik’s district.
#
Alexandria has been traveling across the country to meet with thousands of working people to say: our lives deserve dignity and our work deserves respect.
And this Sunday, she’s getting back on the road: **Alexandria will be hosting a town hall in Republican Elise Stefanik’s district**.
Because the working people there deserve representation that won’t sell out their healthcare for a failed bid to be Trump’s UN Ambassador.
[Our work to win the hearts and minds of our fellow Americans is complicated, but it must start now — before our country becomes a slush fund for MAGA. Will you chip in $5 today to power Alexandria’s work on the road? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250717.PtpiKa&refcode=em20250717-9338-P_FND_EVT_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9338%2E2526796%2EKW3z3P)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250717.PtpiKa&refcode=em20250717-9338-P_FND_EVT_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9338%2E2526796%2EKW3z3P)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250717.PtpiKa&refcode=em20250717-9338-P_FND_EVT_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9338%2E2526796%2EKW3z3P)**
The fact is, people are standing up against the GOP’s attacks on the working class — **and we’re doing everything we can to meet with as many of them as possible**.
We have received an outpouring of invitations to districts across the country. We will keep you updated as more town halls are finalized.
Thank you for standing with our movement.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: Putting Californians first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

Let me be honest with you: Trump’s “Big Ugly Bill” was one of the worst pieces of legislation I’ve ever voted on.

As a doctor, I’ve cared for patients who depend on Medicaid to manage chronic conditions and stay healthy. This bill **slashes critical funding** , hands out giveaways to billionaires, and shortchanges working families across California.

That’s not progress — and I couldn’t support it in good conscience.

Now, because I spoke out, **special interests are lining up to target this seat.** They want to replace me with someone who will fall in line and rubber-stamp their agenda.

Our mid-month goal is $5,971, and we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help defend this seat.

[**👉 Can I count on you to chip in today and stand with me?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669619/558001185/-1775192550?amount=8&source=EM_NBI_AB_20250717_FR_EOM_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2Y2NjU5Yy01ZjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibPZBvjLTwOmMLYHvLdLfgYoKJLjiOI0CV-QZfjaJHI=) If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately by pressing a button below. **[DONATE $8 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669620/558001186/1652568267?amount=8&express_lane=true&contactdata=lNFc3/+NuJ1rJq2mppjxfvT2crtqInHghb7+c8F+s3dP4jFR1QXe7fXwTIf+YDcvRYdcXtWooPYSaXCJ9vQoX2ZK31Jr9cYeDpzUxK7lOvUROR5/XOyYbqy+wqiOQikcDXoU+bXcaYmgDqdIPdwwLhbWv2qISuLBzbOMwoqp69blFcW/81AOzEs5Mz4wRRaL&refcode2=e3f6659c-5f63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&source=EM_NBI_AB_20250717_FR_EOM_0_3MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2Y2NjU5Yy01ZjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibPZBvjLTwOmMLYHvLdLfgYoKJLjiOI0CV-QZfjaJHI=)**

clean_body: | Peter, Let me be honest with you: Trump’s “Big Ugly Bill” was one of the worst pieces of legislation I’ve ever voted on. As a doctor, I’ve cared for patients who depend on Medicaid to manage chronic conditions and stay healthy. This bill slashes critical funding , hands out giveaways to billionaires, and shortchanges working families across California. That’s not progress — and I couldn’t support it in good conscience. Now, because I spoke out, special interests are lining up to target this seat. They want to replace me with someone who will fall in line and rubber-stamp their agenda. Our mid-month goal is $5,971, and we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help defend this seat. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately by pressing a button below. = = = = = Thank you for always standing up for what’s right. body:
Trump’s budget cuts threaten public broadcasting and more. Here’s the breakdown — and how we’re fighting back. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669675/558001473/-530215862?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.17_OTS-Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2Y1YWFiZi01ZjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHFzpDeZcRMwZkMD2_P8n9GoS0cHst5OYcV7SQn1bdA=)
Donald Trump’s allies in the Senate just took a hatchet to NPR and PBS funding. **In just 60 seconds, here’s what Trump doesn’t want you to know about the bill that is on its way to the House:** 📉 $1.1 billion slashed from the Corporation for Public Broadcasting. That’s the funding lifeline for NPR, PBS and over 1,500 local stations. 🚨 Emergency alerts in rural areas are at risk. Stations like KUCB in Alaska provided critical updates during a tsunami warning — but could now go dark. 🎓 Free educational programming, like PBS Kids, faces collapse. These stations offer trusted, ad-free learning — especially for low-income families. 📺 The cuts start taking effect this fall. Public media executives are already planning layoffs and program reductions. While big-city stations might be able to sustain themselves, smaller stations often can’t fundraise at the same rate. **So why are they doing this? Because silencing independent media, cutting off vulnerable communities and dismantling public trust are central to Trump’s playbook.** **If you’re as opposed to these cuts as we are, please contact your representative in the House to make your voice heard ahead of the vote’s Friday deadline:** | | [CONTACT YOUR REP >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669676/558001474/305343292?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.17_OTS-Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2Y1YWFiZi01ZjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHFzpDeZcRMwZkMD2_P8n9GoS0cHst5OYcV7SQn1bdA=&emci=649331eb-3963-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c7f5aabf-5f63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)
---
**Another way you can take action is by pitching in today. Off the Sidelines is organizing a grassroots movement to fight back — and hold every Republican who voted for this to account.** Your support today means we can reach the voters who will decide control of Congress — and make sure they know what’s at stake.

**[_Will you chip in now to help us build power and push back against these attacks?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669677/558001475/-204835043?amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.17_OTS-Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2Y1YWFiZi01ZjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHFzpDeZcRMwZkMD2_P8n9GoS0cHst5OYcV7SQn1bdA=)**

name: Ken Mitchell for Virginia
subject: Ken Mitchell: A Real Leader for VA-06
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Mitchell for Virginia**
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=36351532e0&e=0fced71d8c)
| | | | [|
---](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=5900dc6628&e=0fced71d8c)
| Ken Mitchell has dedicated his life to service — to his country, his community, and his family. With 24 years in the U.S. Army, experience as a small business owner, and deep expertise in infrastructure, Ken brings the kind of leadership and real-world know-how we need in Congress.Ken has served in nonpartisan roles across multiple federal agencies, leading key infrastructure and broadband expansion projects in Virginia. Whether he’s working to modernize telecommunications systems or restore historic buildings in rural communities, Ken knows how to get results — and he knows what rural families actually need, because he’s lived it.
---
|
---
| **Meanwhile, Rep. Ben Cline has chosen a different path — one that follows Donald Trump’s extremist agenda, not the people of Virginia’s 6th District.** Here’s what that looks like:
* Cline voted to overturn the results of the 2020 election — even after a violent insurrection at the Capitol.
* He co-sponsored legislation to pull the U.S. out of the World Health Organization, weakening America’s role in global health cooperation.
* He’s refused to stand up to Trump’s chaos, including Trump’s open flirtations with pardoning January 6 rioters.
* While Trump flip-flops on national security — pausing military aid to Ukraine in the middle of escalating attacks from Russia, then reversing himself days later — Cline stays silent.
* He’s ignored urgent needs here at home: skyrocketing costs, crumbling infrastructure, and rural Virginians still lacking access to high-speed internet.

Ben Cline’s priorities are clear: protect Trump, slash essential services, and help corporate donors — not working families.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [➡️ [DONATE NOW – STAND WITH KEN]](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=9bb46deef9&e=0fced71d8c)
---
| **Ken Mitchell offers a better way forward.** He’s worked across industries — from telecommunications to clean water systems — with one mission: improving people’s lives. He believes in:✔️ Expanding access to broadband and affordable health care
✔️ Investing in rural infrastructure, including roads, schools, and water systems
✔️ Supporting working families, small businesses, and local economies
✔️ Defending democracy and rejecting all forms of extremism
* * *
Ken is ready to serve again — this time in Congress. But to defeat Ben Cline and flip VA-06, we need your help.

Every contribution helps us fight GOP disinformation, reach more voters, and elect a leader who puts Virginia first — not Donald Trump’s chaos agenda.
---
|
---
| Let’s win this — for service, for community, and for Virginia.—Team Ken Mitchell

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Ken Mitchell has dedicated his life to service — to his country, his community, and his family. With 24 years in the U.S. Army, experience as a small business owner, and deep expertise in infrastructure, Ken brings the kind of leadership and real-world know-how we need in Congress.Ken has served in nonpartisan roles across multiple federal agencies, leading key infrastructure and broadband expansion projects in Virginia. Whether he’s working to modernize telecommunications systems or restore historic buildings in rural communities, Ken knows how to get results — and he knows what rural families actually need, because he’s lived it. | | Meanwhile, Rep. Ben Cline has chosen a different path — one that follows Donald Trump’s extremist agenda, not the people of Virginia’s 6th District. Here’s what that looks like: Cline voted to overturn the results of the 2020 election — even after a violent insurrection at the Capitol. He co-sponsored legislation to pull the U.S. out of the World Health Organization, weakening America’s role in global health cooperation. He’s refused to stand up to Trump’s chaos, including Trump’s open flirtations with pardoning January 6 rioters. While Trump flip-flops on national security — pausing military aid to Ukraine in the middle of escalating attacks from Russia, then reversing himself days later — Cline stays silent. He’s ignored urgent needs here at home: skyrocketing costs, crumbling infrastructure, and rural Virginians still lacking access to high-speed internet. Ben Cline’s priorities are clear: protect Trump, slash essential services, and help corporate donors — not working families. | | | | | | | | | | | [➡️ [DONATE NOW – STAND WITH KEN]]() | Ken Mitchell offers a better way forward. He’s worked across industries — from telecommunications to clean water systems — with one mission: improving people’s lives. He believes in:✔️ Expanding access to broadband and affordable health care ✔️ Investing in rural infrastructure, including roads, schools, and water systems ✔️ Supporting working families, small businesses, and local economies ✔️ Defending democracy and rejecting all forms of extremism Ken is ready to serve again — this time in Congress. But to defeat Ben Cline and flip VA-06, we need your help. Every contribution helps us fight GOP disinformation, reach more voters, and elect a leader who puts Virginia first — not Donald Trump’s chaos agenda. | | Let’s win this — for service, for community, and for Virginia.—Team Ken Mitchell | [➡️ [DONATE – HELP KEN WIN VA-06]]() | | | | | | | | | Authorized and Paid for by Ken Mitchell for Virginia PO Box 1795 Harrisonburg, VA 22803 | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Ken Mitchell for Virginia 850 W Market Street Harrisonburg, VA 22801 * USA

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump just called for my prosecution — here’s why I won’t back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
| Hi friend — this is Adam Schiff. New Dems said I could reach out with this urgent message:

**Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.**

Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. This is just Trump’s latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived enemies. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669800/558001873/-1141856202?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250717_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjY3NjVkZS02MDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19q9jRCAtamJzWkkjS9s8mv0Np2fjn2JeNEhAsVPGk0=)** Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless attempt at political retribution won’t stop me from holding him accountable — not by a long shot.

I’m not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his standards, this one’s weak. And as much as Trump may hope, this latest smear will not distract from his Epstein files problem.

**[Nevertheless, I need your help right now to respond: rush a split donation between me and New Dems to help us fight back and keep holding Trump accountable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669801/558001876/-1141856202?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20250717_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjY3NjVkZS02MDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19q9jRCAtamJzWkkjS9s8mv0Np2fjn2JeNEhAsVPGk0=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and New Dems will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669802/558001879/-1141856202?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=NDCAF_20250717_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjY3NjVkZS02MDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19q9jRCAtamJzWkkjS9s8mv0Np2fjn2JeNEhAsVPGk0=)

[CUSTOM AMOUNT »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669806/558001890/-1141856202?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20250717_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjY3NjVkZS02MDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19q9jRCAtamJzWkkjS9s8mv0Np2fjn2JeNEhAsVPGk0=)
Trump doesn’t want to talk about skyrocketing prices, his tariff failures, the big ugly bill or why his rabid supporters are demanding answers over his refusal to release the Epstein files. So he goes back to the same tired playbook: Attack, distract, repeat.

But I won’t be intimidated. And I won’t stop doing my job – not now, not ever.

Instead of working to help families hit by extreme weather, rising costs, or his own healthcare cuts, Trump is using his platform to lash out at those who tell the truth.

He wants to silence his critics. But I refuse to back down – and with you in my corner, I never will.

**[Please, rush a split donation to help me and New Dems fight back today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669807/558001891/-1141856202?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20250717_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjY3NjVkZS02MDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19q9jRCAtamJzWkkjS9s8mv0Np2fjn2JeNEhAsVPGk0=)**
Trump can lie and threaten me all he wants. I will never be deterred from fulfilling my duties as a U.S. Senator.

Thank you for standing with me,

Adam
