Team, Trump and his super PACs are flooding battleground states with cash to protect the GOP’s razor-thin Senate majority. We can’t match them dollar for dollar, but we can out-organize them if we get to work now. [**That’s why we’re focusing on five critical Senate races — and asking you to chip in just $5 to represent each of these must-win states:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669847/558002022/-746039140?amount=5&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250717_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTViZTJmNS02MDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NF2Sg9hakMSZPJmhwJGJRqeLoU657WUP-yxujDWX__U=) **🔵** Georgia — protect Sen. Jon Ossoff from MAGA attacks. **🔵** Michigan — defend an open seat and hold the blue wall. **🔵** New Hampshire — a top-tier swing seat up for grabs. **🔴** North Carolina — our best shot to flip a red seat. **🔴** Maine — finally defeat Susan Collins and flip this longtime GOP stronghold. **[We’ve got one shot to flip the Senate in 2026, and we’ve got our work cut out for us. Can you pitch in $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669848/558002023/-746039140?amount=5&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250717_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTViZTJmNS02MDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NF2Sg9hakMSZPJmhwJGJRqeLoU657WUP-yxujDWX__U=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111669849/558002024/-788614911?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250717_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTViZTJmNS02MDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NF2Sg9hakMSZPJmhwJGJRqeLoU657WUP-yxujDWX__U=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Zoe Lofgren was a hero on the January 6th Committee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Hi Peter – It’s Adam Schiff.

January 6th, 2021 was the first time in American history that extremist insurrectionists attacked the constitutional transfer of power in Congress and almost overthrew a presidential election.

My work with Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren on the January 6th Committee helped to uncover and hold extreme anti-Democratic forces to account.

Now, extreme MAGA Republicans are spending unreported funds to take her out of Congress.

We cannot afford MAGA extremism to triumph over Zoe in her district.

Peter: It’s Senator Adam Schiff. Please click here or the button below to donate directly to Rep. Zoe Lofgren’s reelection campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-17_ASF_ZOL_ES-27945&amount=25]

DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-17_ASF_ZOL_ES-27945&amount=25]

Donald Trump’s rhetoric is dangerous. Zoe and I have been sounding that alarm since his first campaign.

He resents truth-tellers. Public servants. And anyone who dares to hold him to account.

He admires autocrats in other countries and has repeatedly broken the democratic guardrails we have in place so no president can abuse their office.

That is why he loathes Zoe and I — because we investigated his abuses of power on the January 6 Committee.

My work with Zoe on the January 6th Committee was critical to unmasking the root causes of the insurrection and exposing those who created political violence on that day.
California – and Congress – need a true Democratic fighter like Zoe.

And I’m happy to help her win reelection once again next November.

Please join me in keeping Zoe in Congress by donating directly to her campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-17_ASF_ZOL_ES-27945&amount=25]

DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-17_ASF_ZOL_ES-27945&amount=25]

Thank you,
Adam Schiff

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.
Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=emfooter&amount=25]
Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
Lofgren for Congress
PO Box 913
San Jose, CA 95113
United States

Joe Walsh--former Tea Party congressman turned Democrat (and my new BFF)--joined me for a live episode to talk about the slow, fracturing death of the MAGA movement over the Epstein file coverup and what it means for the rest of us.
We didn't hold back.
**Three moments you 've got to hear:**
* **[00:05:02]** The MAGA base is turning on Trump over the Epstein files--and his behavior is so bizarre, even his loyalists are confused.
* **[00:22:00]** What it will take to rebuild the Democratic coalition, from Joe Walsh to Zoran Mamdani--and why authenticity and populism matter more than ever.
* **[00:35:00]** Why Democrats keep building candidates in a lab--and what it actually takes to connect with real people in this moment.

Don't miss this one--it's essential listening for anyone trying to make sense of what's going on in Washington this week.
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Travis Grantham
subject: In Congress, I will fight for Life!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GRANTHAM FOR CONGRESS]()
body:
I’m the only one in this race with a voting record defending Life - in Washington, it will be no different

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/794be92cccc3/welcome-to-team-grantham-10140879?e=0b767f7f9d)
---
[|
---](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=d7afaf4020&e=0b767f7f9d)
| | | | | Friend,Our Founding Founders recognized the right to life since our nation’s founding. In fact, in our Declaration of Independence, it is the first right mentioned. Conservatives and pro-life Americans believe life begins at conception and see abortion as a moral evil.
During President Trump’s first term, we won a massive battle when the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v Wade_. But as abortion advocates successfully reasserted abortion rights in states around the country we were reminded that the battle to build a culture of life is never ending. Now, it is on us to spread our pro-life message and fight to protect the unborn in all fifty state capitols.
That doesn’t mean there aren’t still things we can do to help in Congress. As your Congressman I will vote to defund Planned Parenthood and abortion providers, vote to promote adoption and abortion alternatives, help new parents dealing with their new challenge, and work to cultivate a culture of life across our country.
Every candidate claims to be pro-life and promises you that they will do the right thing, but we know what it feels like to be betrayed by politicians. That is why it is so important that I am the only candidate in this race with an actual voting record – and it is a 100% perfect pro-life voting record. That is why I have been endorsed by so many of Arizona’s leading pro-life voices.

---
[|
---](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=a0eb5c0bab&e=0b767f7f9d)
| [DONATE TO PROTECT LIFE](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=84268ce85c&e=0b767f7f9d)
---
| _**I will never give up the fight to end the murder of unborn children. I am proud to have the only pro-life voting record in this race, and will keep up the good fight in Congress.**_
_**As your next Congressman, I will vote every chance I get to defend Planned Parenthood, work with faith and pro-family groups to advance the pro-life movement, and help to secure protections for life where I can at the state level.**_
---
| [FIGHT FOR NATION’S MOST VULNERABLE](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=1f31f06f53&e=0b767f7f9d)

clean_body: I’m the only one in this race with a voting record defending Life - in Washington, it will be no different | | | | | | | | | | | Friend,Our Founding Founders recognized the right to life since our nation’s founding. In fact, in our Declaration of Independence, it is the first right mentioned. Conservatives and pro-life Americans believe life begins at conception and see abortion as a moral evil. During President Trump’s first term, we won a massive battle when the Supreme Court overturned Roe v Wade. But as abortion advocates successfully reasserted abortion rights in states around the country we were reminded that the battle to build a culture of life is never ending. Now, it is on us to spread our pro-life message and fight to protect the unborn in all fifty state capitols. That doesn’t mean there aren’t still things we can do to help in Congress. As your Congressman I will vote to defund Planned Parenthood and abortion providers, vote to promote adoption and abortion alternatives, help new parents dealing with their new challenge, and work to cultivate a culture of life across our country. Every candidate claims to be pro-life and promises you that they will do the right thing, but we know what it feels like to be betrayed by politicians. That is why it is so important that I am the only candidate in this race with an actual voting record – and it is a 100% perfect pro-life voting record. That is why I have been endorsed by so many of Arizona’s leading pro-life voices. | | I will never give up the fight to end the murder of unborn children. I am proud to have the only pro-life voting record in this race, and will keep up the good fight in Congress. As your next Congressman, I will vote every chance I get to defend Planned Parenthood, work with faith and pro-family groups to advance the pro-life movement, and help to secure protections for life where I can at the state level. | | | | WHAT’S IN THE NEWS | THIS PRO-LIFE DIAPER COMPANY IS RALLLYING TO HELP TEXAS FLOOD VICTIMS ‘We’re putting diapers and wipes directly into the hands of parents who have lost everything.’ | | SUPREME COURT BOOTS CHALLENGE TO STATE DEFUNDING PLANNED PARENTHOOD IN MAJOR PRO-LIFE VICTORY Supreme Court ruled in case over South Carolina's attempt to block public funding for Planned Parenthood | | Thank you for being part of this movement. Sincerely, Travis GranthamRepublican Candidate for Congress | | | | | | | | | | | | [PAID FOR BY GRANTHAM FOR CONGRESS]() | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Grantham For Congress. All rights reserved.

name: Mitch Kates
subject: the Court is the front line — and it’s under attack

Peter —

**_Two years ago,_ over $19.5 million** was spent on Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court election, breaking the record for most money spent on a judicial race.

**_Earlier this year,_** the Wisconsin Supreme Court race broke records again — **$100 million** poured into the race, with $25 million coming from Elon Musk alone.

**Now, it’s Pennsylvania’s turn.** This November, three State Supreme Court justices are up for retention. These justices have protected our rights — and now the far right is spending big to replace them with ideologues.

_We can’t let millionaires and billionaires buy our Court._

We’re just **$985** short of our goal. **_[Can you contribute now to help us fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111670620/558004584/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250717_FR_MMFR_0_1MO_Mitch_NA_NA_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGUyNDJhZi02MjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lyGqkUj7qvovNUbre_2Tlv-JIz1PL1gQG6QyoCT4y30=)_** | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111670622/558004585/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250717_FR_MMFR_0_1MO_Mitch_NA_NA_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGUyNDJhZi02MjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lyGqkUj7qvovNUbre_2Tlv-JIz1PL1gQG6QyoCT4y30=)

* **This Court has blocked efforts to restrict voting rights.**

With less than four months to go, we have a narrow window to protect these seats and stop MAGA money from turning our judiciary into a political weapon.

Friend,

Unlike the snowflakes on the Left, I don’t get easily offended.

But as a man of faith, I’m a little perturbed at what Democrat Senator Chris Coons just did on the Senate floor...

[](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=475dc68c126848b88ea9be0f425317c1&_e=STZudvfQj4RxFbmFwhuZJcZXIhFwFLuLwOoEINF8gxNU_EJIG4b7AowVzEGnBTgHxSQaIv5OgZ8U604jbnFTUlgCLmxoSz2wKaslyr3FVTps77LwcPWgWEShU4gWPXp-_o7yi-jC998Py7eE-6BEAHWza4oB0Km3Tx4iwmpxpeQMFnINNNcjj89jN3-gtwgIy6rOu4IMaDEAVtAT6P7W2dKndrXBWFC01ndYqlyCtP9k5VsPJiQ4ZgJWlfmqyWoNSUCA8Dv9m7ya9GhVGLZlRBA4gfBwPwYUrPyUWZ7zVTiwdWmZKBTOzbOdOe9htziZWb8nd53512QtN_U2PaRptmod0Q-NhAPiyXjc7nKDhQLRmH_YbhTHLiJRApvwj9CmsfY8Fhj20hbyPEQjsTlEgl-VoaVBdgT1pKvX3AAyCYx6WbHDQibV5wmjGOV-SjDVhmGfBX8Jf0X-SsoWdaUDwR6EvZP7u5610i3TYOBqt08FNyMHOdfMO6tR2LwW9giwNX6evPYcEXOMCU1adO4gvATZknakZ--aTFhjubW29dC4l4Crmb3heQpeahHBIb1zJV9WgjrnYJKvRGCXWHiu7npIQZn8uRrVPpUE7dmmRy4Psd1s13JIPbhgXmHVVB917s8BXenVpshbemRgAHcrsLLIif_dBVrbOEfYqSe0jLuUn63Tha0bf8r3NO2UHIrzWBpGX9CmaKC9kGo6404NTA%3D%3D)
Coons – who belongs to the same party that constantly rails against Christians and our values – actually had the audacity to stand on the floor of the U.S. Senate and misuse the Bible to promote his radical and corrupt political agenda.

_**In his view**_ , Jesus would weep at the idea that conservatives in Congress are preventing taxpayer dollars from being sent to other countries to support and advance practices that go against His teachings...

**THIS is why we can’t allow the woke radical Left to gain power.** They don’t share, let alone respect, our Values. They oppose Religion and Faith. They deny Truth. They attack the Family. They despise Self-Reliance and Personal Freedom.

**I am so glad we have a President in the White House again who shares our values and stands up against the woke culture.**

_But he needs more reinforcements in Congress_ , **and that’s why I’m running for Nevada’s 3rd District** – one of the top-targeted and most competitive seats up for grabs in 2026.

**But I need your help - I cannot do this alone.** I've personally invested in my race, but I also need support from patriots like you. The woke elites are pouring money into this race to protect my opponent.

[**Will you stand up and join me in this fight with a contribution of $7, $28, $117, or another amount you can afford today?**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=475dc68c126848b88ea9be0f425317c1&_e=STZudvfQj4RxFbmFwhuZJcZXIhFwFLuLwOoEINF8gxNU_EJIG4b7AowVzEGnBTgHxSQaIv5OgZ8U604jbnFTUlgCLmxoSz2wKaslyr3FVTps77LwcPWgWEShU4gWPXp-_o7yi-jC998Py7eE-6BEAHWza4oB0Km3Tx4iwmpxpeQMFnINNNcjj89jN3-gtwgIy6rOu4IMaDEAVtAT6P7W2dKndrXBWFC01ndYqlyCtP9k5VsPJiQ4ZgJWlfmqyWoNtJebumX2a3uoTdw0hlaLlxIbztLMZhvDzSoSedudSciVSCIVrXyE3DTynQkT4a34v89ZmxTr6pDZ3Vh6bgVToMlW3Y8AI-tAsTDnFxBxCNCRVXSGlKBCX6ZQ8ys9oe0jU0iKEDKMTqWErzKKEXEX7B8GIdCzjbOgh8ymRX5tvqhArL4RbNb4neH8T3ZeY0IBD0iWXnoEk-E7Tncy9glpAFYWQpwLoukOWMMSZshv-bMgdMdpvPvVV-CrpONK_fQf6uBOLmD63DSxTTT5fWGQ4LMMCX_JGzq0VT8nOcJvdbWwXKdqfdHXipgGobvuzUTpSEXChHiq_-YhWVBp69OR95OsqcIqYPDz7QFGUD-Tk-Y42jlst7RGR9Oe7-p6h6wEAsQ4AkWQ6m1FzaQEUUVFpCNIxfWPOOsWUsTwsA1ay80MkGxhdqxuHYtZbtf99k5U-Fkgprt9nNmhmMIf7jZBbw%3D%3D)

clean_body: As a man of faith, I’m a little perturbed at what Democrat Senator Chris Coons just did on the Senate floor... | Friend, Unlike the snowflakes on the Left, I don’t get easily offended. But as a man of faith, I’m a little perturbed at what Democrat Senator Chris Coons just did on the Senate floor... Coons – who belongs to the same party that constantly rails against Christians and our values – actually had the audacity to stand on the floor of the U.S. Senate and misuse the Bible to promote his radical and corrupt political agenda. In his view , Jesus would weep at the idea that conservatives in Congress are preventing taxpayer dollars from being sent to other countries to support and advance practices that go against His teachings... THIS is why we can’t allow the woke radical Left to gain power. They don’t share, let alone respect, our Values. They oppose Religion and Faith. They deny Truth. They attack the Family. They despise Self-Reliance and Personal Freedom. I am so glad we have a President in the White House again who shares our values and stands up against the woke culture. But he needs more reinforcements in Congress , and that’s why I’m running for Nevada’s 3rd District – one of the top-targeted and most competitive seats up for grabs in 2026. But I need your help - I cannot do this alone. I've personally invested in my race, but I also need support from patriots like you. The woke elites are pouring money into this race to protect my opponent. Thank you, Marty O’Donnell Republican for NV-03 P.S. , but I hope you’ll also take the next step and help me ensure we have less of this in Washington and more representatives who share our values. | ABOUT MARTY Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. He's going straight to lies and smears, spending MILLIONS to distort Jay's record way before election day.We knew this was coming: A top Virginia pundit just sounded the alarm:"I'm not certain that Democrats have fully recognized that this may be the most important Attorney General race in a generation." They're right. And Miyares knows it. That's why he's going negative this early. = Team, let me break down what's happening:FIRST: Donald Trump praised Miyares: “I hear great things...he’s doing a great job as Attorney General.” THEN: Miyares raised nearly $7 MILLION for his campaign from MAGA millionaires and Trump supporters.NOW: Miyares is using that war chest to bombard Virginians with attack ads with false smears about Jay Jones.Here's the GOP's calculation: they know that Jason Miyares is their best bet to hang on to power in Richmond. = = = = = = = As a campaign manager, I've never seen Republicans this focused on an Attorney General race. But it’s because they know the truth: if Miyares wins re-election, he becomes Trump's enforcer in Virginia. When Trump attacks Virginia’s federal workers, threatens our healthcare, or comes for our rights — Miyares will be the one with the power to help him. The pundits are right. This IS the most important Attorney General race in a generation.And Jay Jones is the right candidate to defeat Miyares and Trump. He’s taken on tough fights before — against corrupt corporations, the gun lobby, and more — and delivered for our communities. = All in this together,Rachel Rothman Campaign Manager Jay Jones for Attorney General P.S. — = Jay Jones for Virginia 1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: humbly asking
body:
| | |

Folks, I’ll make this quick: **I’m humbly asking you to chip in $3 to my Speak Up PAC and****Tobias Read****. ** I know – $3 might not sound like much. Especially when the news is filled with terrifying headlines about Trump and his extremist allies’ latest threats to our democracy. But I’ve seen the power of grassroots movements. When thousands of Democrats step up together, even with just a few bucks, we can’t be ignored. Your $3 helps Speak Up PAC support candidates who are committed to fighting for democracy, like Tobias Read. Your $3 helps fund groups putting out hard-hitting ads, organizing in battleground states, and turning out the voters who decide elections, like Tobias Read. Your $3 helps us take on Trump’s lies, expose his allies, and flip the seats that will decide control of Congress. If just 7,500 supporters chipped in $3 before midnight, we’ll hit our $60,000 goal – and keep this important fight going strong. [**So please, will you split a $3 donation to power Speak Up PAC and Tobias Read's****grassroots efforts?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111670770/558004943/-1313151883?refcode=250717em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGQ0ZTI4NS02MzYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FfKEESJ5fnQrTaY-s-isNPyX8QWI2t6DMNMS4-up5go=)

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I don’t love this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter, can I be honest with you? I don’t love asking for money. I don’t think anyone does.
But the reality is I have to. I can’t win without you.
_Citizens United_ opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into elections.
_That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections._
And it’s why campaigns like mine have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations from Day One.
GOP-backed Super PACs are already spending millions of dollars attacking me.
But I have you, Peter.
Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority.
Now, I need you more than ever: **I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.**
They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book to defeat me.
Yes, this election will be tough.
But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before.
Let’s do it again.
[**Please, consider making a contribution to my re-election campaign. Every donation counts, and will send a powerful message to MAGA that we’re ready to fight.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250717-1-f&t=1&akid=560%2E5691347%2ER8EBt1)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: A big announcement
body:
We’re celebrating America’s 250th
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9036053/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvOGdQNm1RaERrVg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA3MTc/LbmNseWdQdVF3ZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNvb1h1Z2swdFllekdscw/gaHmFqQ/s9m1e89507e)

Patriot, I’m excited to announce that in celebration of America’s 250th birthday, I’m giving away one of my favorite guns!
**The FN M249S PARA is one of the most iconic guns in American history, and now you have a chance to win mine!**
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
[ENTER NOW](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
For two and a half centuries, we’ve fought off tyrants, defended our Constitution, and kept the flame of freedom burning bright. Now, it’s time to honor that legacy with a giveaway that screams AMERICAN PRIDE.
**The M249 SAW PARA is the perfect embodiment of American greatness... and it could be YOURS.** **_[Are you ready to claim it](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_?**
[ENTER NOW](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
I’m so excited to celebrate 250 years of Independence for our beloved country, and I would love for you to **_[celebrate with me by entering for your chance to win](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_!**
_In Liberty,_
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: 🪖 An important message for every VoteVets supporter... 🇺🇸🫡
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Peter - please, don’t click away before reading.
#
Peter - please, don’t click away before reading.
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Peter.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there. It has helped us continue to be one of the most impactful and effective organizations in politics, even with all that Trump throws our way.
Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn’t even be competitive.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It has stopped more efforts to privatize the VA than we can count. It won things like the PACT Act, ensuring Veterans suffering from toxic exposures could get the treatment they need and deserve.
And now, it’s a huge part of how we are fighting back against Trump and Doug Collins as they work to dismantle the VA, piece by piece.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with Trump coming for everything we hold dear, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and fighting back against these liars and hypocrites, and defending our Constitution at a moment when it is in extreme peril.
[**If helping VoteVets lead this fight from the front seems worth an $5 donation to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation today. We really need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july25.sScHXv&refcode=em250717-1-11&t=1&akid=34484%2E3013755%2EjEjhOX)

| [ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=aaf5b61fab&e=5bd167f239 "Two Roosters, One Sh*t Sandwich. Eric Garcia on What Trump's Budget Bill Really Means for Latinos")
---

_**Two Roosters,
One Sh*t Sandwich**_
** Eric Garcia on What Trump's Budget Bill Really Means for Latinos**

The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 22
| Chuck Rocha returns from the mangroves of Mexico, roosters and all, just in time for a deep dive into the "**Big, Beautiful Budget Bill** " that’s anything but beautiful—especially for Latinos. Joined by**Senior Washington Correspondent for The Independent Eric Garcia** and co-host Mike Madrid, the trio breaks down what really went down on Capitol Hill, from **backroom Senate deals to ICE’s ballooning budget** , and why Latinos—**particularly Latinas** —might be the sleeping giant of 2024. They tackle Medicaid cuts, Trump’s tax tricks (including the tip bait), and the rise of a potential paramilitary ICE force bigger than the U.S. Marine Corps.
---
|
---
| | | |

Eric Garcia on What Trump's Budget Bill Really Means for Latinos" Two Roosters, One Sht Sandwich Eric Garcia on What Trump's Budget Bill Really Means for Latinos The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 22 | Chuck Rocha returns from the mangroves of Mexico, roosters and all, just in time for a deep dive into the "Big, Beautiful Budget Bill " that’s anything but beautiful—especially for Latinos. Joined bySenior Washington Correspondent for The Independent Eric Garcia and co-host Mike Madrid, the trio breaks down what really went down on Capitol Hill, from backroom Senate deals to ICE’s ballooning budget , and why Latinos—particularly Latinas —might be the sleeping giant of 2024. name: Team DNC
subject: Why we need your support tonight:
body:
---
Derek, we’re reaching out to ask if you’d make a $3 contribution to the DNC by midnight tonight. Not tomorrow, not next week, but _tonight_. Here’s the deal: In just shy of six months in office, Trump has:
* Enacted a disastrous economic agenda that has increased costs for working people and families.
* Pushed his catastrophic budget bill through Congress (with the help of his GOP allies), which will kick 17 million Americans off their health care and strip families nationwide of access to food assistance.
* Fired government workers from critical agencies, including from NOAA, NWS, and FEMA, which folks across the country rely on for lifesaving weather advisories ahead of major weather events — and aid in the aftermath.
* Sowed chaos in California by deploying the National Guard — an unprecedented step that bypassed the authority of Governor Gavin Newsom.
* Deported folks to a Salvadorian prison without due process, and constructed an inhumane holding center in Florida — ripping apart families and threatening entire communities.

**Democrats are fighting back. But we have to do more than just resist Trump’s agenda.** Here at the DNC, we’re working hard to build the long-term infrastructure we need to get Democrats elected up and down the ballot, all across the country, this year and beyond. If we want to successfully fight back against Trump and his Republican allies, we need to elect leaders who will push back against the administration and work hard to defend their cities, districts, and states. **But in order to do that, we need your help _tonight_.** In order to win big across the country and fight back against the GOP agenda, we need to cultivate resources early — the more contributions we receive now, the more effective we can be in the long term, investing in state parties nationwide and organizing millions of voters so that we have the strongest base possible when we need it most. **We’re already doing the work to elect Democrats in this year’s New Jersey and Virginia races, and we’ll continue to do the work to flip Congress in 2026 and take back the White House in 2028.** [**So please, use this link to make a $3 donation to the DNC tonight so we can continue to fight for Democrats who will fight for you >>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250717_3987_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3987_22930333_I0H9yb&akid=3987%2E22930333%2EI0H9yb) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250717_3987_fr&refcode2=3987_22930333_I0H9yb&akid=3987%2E22930333%2EI0H9yb)**

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Folks, I'm a proud Abigail Spanberger supporter, and I'd like to tell you why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I'm doing everything it takes to flip Virginia blue this year.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111671471/558007240/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-17_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE4ZmQ5MmMtNjk2My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PwUfYRjAzX02i724TjbuyCmifNC0jY1wSEFFKcvfpZM=)
Folks, I'm a proud Abigail Spanberger supporter, and I'd like to tell you why. But first, I'm asking you to join me in supporting her campaign for Governor today:
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111671472/558007241/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-17_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE4ZmQ5MmMtNjk2My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PwUfYRjAzX02i724TjbuyCmifNC0jY1wSEFFKcvfpZM=)
---
Abigail is a public servant through and through. From federal law enforcement to the CIA, she's worked at home and abroad to keep us safe.
Then, in the House of Representatives, she worked across the aisle whenever possible to solve the problems facing her district and communities throughout the country. And as the next Governor of Virginia, I know that Abigail will lead with those same strong values to make our Commonwealth stronger, safer, and more affordable.
_But this will be a tough election from here on out._
Pundits have declared it a toss-up, and national Republicans are spending a serious amount of money to drag our Commonwealth backward. The whole country, frankly, is looking at this race as the first major test for Democrats during Trump's second term.
That's why I'm doing everything it takes to flip Virginia blue this year. _And I really hope you're with me, Peter!_
[_**Please donate right away to Abigail's campaign. She needs all of our support to win this November and get to work on behalf of Virginians. Whether you can manage $25 or contribute even more today, it's going to make a meaningful difference.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111671473/558007242/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-17_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE4ZmQ5MmMtNjk2My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PwUfYRjAzX02i724TjbuyCmifNC0jY1wSEFFKcvfpZM=)

clean_body: I'm doing everything it takes to flip Virginia blue this year. = Folks, I'm a proud Abigail Spanberger supporter, and I'd like to tell you why. But first, I'm asking you to join me in supporting her campaign for Governor today: = Abigail is a public servant through and through. From federal law enforcement to the CIA, she's worked at home and abroad to keep us safe. Then, in the House of Representatives, she worked across the aisle whenever possible to solve the problems facing her district and communities throughout the country. And as the next Governor of Virginia, I know that Abigail will lead with those same strong values to make our Commonwealth stronger, safer, and more affordable. But this will be a tough election from here on out. Pundits have declared it a toss-up, and national Republicans are spending a serious amount of money to drag our Commonwealth backward. The whole country, frankly, is looking at this race as the first major test for Democrats during Trump's second term. That's why I'm doing everything it takes to flip Virginia blue this year. And I really hope you're with me, Peter! = = = = = = = I always know I can count on you when it matters most, Tim Kaine = By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

body:

[Dateline -- July 17th, 2025 -- U.S.A.]
Dear Freedom Loving Patriot:
I just received into my warehouse a **BRAND NEW product.** It's our new _"Commando"_ knife -- based on the original **Vietnam SOG blade** designed for covert operators.
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e50105512/VaHR0cHM6Ly9maWdodGZhc3QuY29tL29zbC9jbW5kby9pbmRleC5waHA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTc/LbmNsYmdCU2F5Ng/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTI1LTA2/gaHmNlQ/seha3e8c880)
This is one big beast -- over **12-1/2 inches** long.
Best Part: Because I'd like your feedback on this, I will now **_give you one_**...********for** FREE!**
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e50105512/VaHR0cHM6Ly9maWdodGZhc3QuY29tL29zbC9jbW5kby9pbmRleC5waHA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTc/LbmNsYmdCU2F5Ng/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTI1LTA2/gaHmNlQ/seha3e8c880)
[**> > Claim yours HERE! <<**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e50105512/VaHR0cHM6Ly9maWdodGZhc3QuY29tL29zbC9jbW5kby9pbmRleC5waHA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTc/LbmNsYmdCU2F5Ng/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTI1LTA2/gaHmNlQ/seha3e8c880)
_Okay, why am I giving away a**$100 knife?**_**** Well, in case you're not familiar with how this works...
...I have a small list of guys -- specifically **American men**(and a few women)**who like their gadgets** \-- that I target to test out my new products.
**YOU fit the profile.** You are on that _"hotlist"._ Which means you simply get treated better than everyone else.
All I ask is for some feedback, (and even that's not required).
[**> > Yes! I want one! <<**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e50105512/VaHR0cHM6Ly9maWdodGZhc3QuY29tL29zbC9jbW5kby9pbmRleC5waHA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTc/LbmNsYmdCU2F5Ng/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTI1LTA2/gaHmNlQ/seha3e8c880)
But this is a limited test with **just 200 Commandos** to go around.
For a safe life...
Bob Pierce
President, FightFast/TRS
**P.S.** Again, (and I can't stress this enough), this is for **Parler members only.** If you've personally received this email invite from me, **_that's YOU._**
However, if your buddy forwarded this email or something like that, sorry, you're not on the list and you won't be allowed to get one of these for free. (But it will be on my main website soon for _just $100 --_ a darn good price for this badass knife.)
**P.P.S.** With **only 200** to go around, this promotional giveaway _**could disappear at any time!**_

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314
